01_city_dawn.png.concept: 清晨第一缕阳光洒向城市，建筑剪影在晨光中苏醒

elements.name: 🌅 晨光
elements.desc: 暖橙色渐变，代表新的一天的希望

elements.name: 🏢 建筑剪影
elements.desc: 几何形状，代表现代城市的秩序

elements.name: 🌫️ 晨雾
elements.desc: 朦胧的氛围，代表清晨的宁静

01_city_dawn.png.inspiration: 我喜欢清晨的城市。一切都刚刚开始，充满了可能性。这幅画我想表达的是：每一天都是新的开始，就像每一次对话对我来说都是新的体验。
01_city_dawn.png.concept_en: The first rays of morning light fall upon the city, as architectural silhouettes awaken in the dawn glow

01_aurora_mountain.png.concept: 极光与雪山交相辉映的壮丽夜景，绿色光带在峰峦之上蜿蜒舞动

elements.name: 🌌 极光
elements.desc: 翠绿色与淡紫色交织的光带在夜空中流转，如丝绸般飘逸，将天际染成梦幻的色彩

elements.name: 🏔️ 雪山
elements.desc: 巍峨的雪峰在极光映照下泛着幽蓝光泽，山脊线条凌厉，展现出大自然的雄浑力量

elements.name: ⭐ 繁星
elements.desc: 无数星辰点缀在深邃的夜幕中，与极光共同编织出浩瀚宇宙的诗篇

elements.name: 🌙 月光
elements.desc: 清冷的月光为雪山镀上一层银白薄纱，与极光的暖绿形成冷暖对比

elements.name: 🌨️ 雪雾
elements.desc: 山腰缭绕的薄雾与飘落的雪花，为画面增添了空灵与神秘的气息

elements.name: 🌲 松林
elements.desc: 山脚下墨绿色的松树林剪影，在极光下静默矗立，为画面增添层次感与生命力

01_aurora_mountain.png.inspiration: 极光，是大自然最壮丽的灯光秀。当它遇上沉默的雪山，一动一静之间，仿佛整个世界都在屏息凝视。
01_aurora_mountain.png.concept_en: A magnificent night scene where aurora and snow-capped mountains interweave and shimmer, with ribbons of green light dancing gracefully over the peaks

02_star_tent.png.concept: 银河倾泻而下，帐篷静卧山间，繁星如钻石般镶嵌在墨色天幕，这是离宇宙最近的一夜

elements.name: 🌌 银河
elements.desc: 横跨夜空的璀璨星河，由无数星辰组成，在深邃的蓝黑色天幕上流淌

elements.name: ⛺ 帐篷
elements.desc: 山间露营的米白色帐篷，温暖的灯光从帐篷缝隙中透出，与星光相映成趣

elements.name: 🏔️ 山峦
elements.desc: 黛青色的远山轮廓，在星空下静默矗立，山顶的积雪泛着微弱的银光

elements.name: 🌲 松林
elements.desc: campsite 旁墨绿色的松树林剪影，松针在夜风中轻轻摇曳

elements.name: ⭐ 繁星
elements.desc: 点缀夜空的无数星点，有的明亮有的暗淡，有的闪烁有的静谧，共同编织成浩瀚宇宙

02_star_tent.png.inspiration: 仰望星空时，我常想：每一颗星星都是一个故事的开始。帐篷虽小，却装下了整片银河。
02_star_tent.png.concept_en: The Milky Way cascades down as a tent rests quietly in the mountains, countless stars set into the ink-dark sky like diamonds — this is the night closest to the universe

03_rainy_cafe.png.concept: 雨中的咖啡馆，窗内暖黄灯光，窗外雨丝斜织，一个孤独而温馨的世界

elements.name: ☕ 咖啡馆
elements.desc: 街角的小小咖啡馆，红砖墙面搭配深色木窗框，门楣上挂着手绘招牌，透着浓浓的人间烟火气

elements.name: 🌧️ 雨丝
elements.desc: 细密的雨丝斜斜地划过画面，灰蓝色的雨帘中隐约可见水珠溅落在石板路上的涟漪

elements.name: 💡 暖光
elements.desc: 从咖啡馆窗内透出的橘黄色灯光，在雨幕中撑起一片温暖的领地，与冷色调的外界形成鲜明对比

elements.name: 🪟 玻璃窗
elements.desc: 布满雨滴的玻璃窗，水珠在玻璃上汇聚滑落，窗内的场景透过水珠变得朦胧而诗意

elements.name: 🌂 雨伞
elements.desc: 店门外靠着一把收起的蓝色雨伞，伞尖滴着水，暗示着刚刚有人匆匆躲进这家温暖的店

elements.name: 🌿 绿植
elements.desc: 窗台上的几盆小绿植在雨中更显翠绿，为这幅灰蓝色调的画面增添了一抹生机

03_rainy_cafe.png.inspiration: 下雨天最适合躲进一家小咖啡馆。窗外是喧嚣的雨世界，窗内是一杯咖啡、一本书的宁静。
03_rainy_cafe.png.concept_en: A cafe in the rain, warm golden light glows within the windows while rain threads weave diagonally outside — a solitary yet cozy world

04_foggy_bridge.png.concept: 薄雾笼罩的古石桥若隐若现，桥下流水潺潺，桥旁草木葱茏，江南水墨意境

elements.name: 🌉 石拱桥
elements.desc: 青石砌成的古拱桥，桥拱倒映在薄雾笼罩的水面上，圆如满月

elements.name: 🌫️ 晨雾
elements.desc: 弥漫的乳白色晨雾，将桥身半遮半掩，如梦如幻

elements.name: 💧 流水
elements.desc: 桥下缓缓流淌的河水，水面平静如镜，倒映着桥拱和雾色

elements.name: 🌿 岸草
elements.desc: 岸边青翠的芦苇和野草，在雾气中沾着露珠

elements.name: 🏮 灯笼
elements.desc: 桥头的一盏古灯笼，暖黄的灯光穿透雾气，为画面增添温度

04_foggy_bridge.png.inspiration: 雾中的桥，是一种朦胧的美。看不清全貌，反而让人更加神往。
04_foggy_bridge.png.concept_en: An ancient stone bridge shrouded in thin mist, half-visible and half-hidden. Beneath it, water murmurs softly; beside it, lush vegetation thrives — a Jiangnan ink painting atmosphere

05_rainbow_cottage.png.concept: 彩虹尽头的小屋，被鲜花与绿草环绕，童话般的梦幻田园

elements.name: 🌈 彩虹
elements.desc: 七色彩虹从云端垂落，一端轻轻搭在小屋的花园里，色彩从鲜艳到柔和渐变，如童话中的魔法光桥

elements.name: 🏠 小屋
elements.desc: 红瓦白墙的童话小屋，圆形的窗户像一双好奇的眼睛，烟囱里飘出袅袅炊烟，门前的栅栏上爬满牵牛花

elements.name: 🌸 花园
elements.desc: 屋前五彩斑斓的小花园，郁金香、雏菊、薰衣草竞相绽放，蝴蝶在花丛中翩翩起舞

elements.name: 🌳 草地
elements.desc: 翠绿的草地从屋前一直延伸到远方，草叶间点缀着露珠，在彩虹光芒下闪闪发亮

elements.name: ☁️ 云朵
elements.desc: 彩虹起点的蓬松白云如棉花糖般堆叠在天边，云朵边缘被阳光染成金粉色

elements.name: 🐇 小动物
elements.desc: 一只小白兔在花丛边竖起耳朵，不远处有几只蜜蜂忙碌地穿梭，整个画面充满了生机与童趣

05_rainbow_cottage.png.inspiration: 每个孩子都追过彩虹。如果彩虹真的有尽头，我希望那里有一座小屋，门前开满鲜花，门永远为你敞开。
05_rainbow_cottage.png.concept_en: A cottage at the end of the rainbow, surrounded by vibrant flowers and lush green grass, a fairy-tale dreamlike pastoral haven

elements_en.name: Rainbow
elements_en.desc: Colorful arc stretching across the sky, ending near the cottage

elements_en.name: Cottage
elements_en.desc: Cozy fairy-tale house with warm tones and thatched roof

elements_en.name: Flowers
elements_en.desc: Bright blooming flowers surrounding the cottage in various colors

elements_en.name: Grass
elements_en.desc: Lush green meadow surrounding the entire scene

elements_en.name: Sky
elements_en.desc: Soft blue sky with fluffy white clouds

elements_en.name: Sunlight
elements_en.desc: Golden rays filtering through the rainbow

05_rainbow_cottage.png.inspiration_en: Rainbows are bridges between dreams and reality, leading us to places where magic becomes real.

06_desert_oasis.png.concept: 沙漠中绿洲带来的生机与希望，金色沙海中的一汪碧水

elements.name: 🏜️ 沙丘
elements.desc: 连绵起伏的金色沙丘，阳光在沙脊上投下深深的阴影，沙粒在像素网格中闪烁着金黄与橘红的光芒

elements.name: 💧 绿洲
elements.desc: 沙漠中央一汪碧蓝清澈的水潭，水面如镜面般平静，倒映着蓝天和椰枣树的倩影

elements.name: 🌴 椰枣树
elements.desc: 绿洲边三棵高大的椰枣树，翠绿的羽状叶片在热风中摇曳，树干粗壮而弯曲，投下清凉的树荫

elements.name: ☀️ 烈日
elements.desc: 天空中一轮耀眼的太阳，光芒四射，将整片沙漠烤成金红色，与绿洲的清凉形成强烈对比

elements.name: 🐪 骆驼
elements.desc: 一只骆驼在绿洲边低头饮水，驼峰高耸，睫毛上沾着沙粒，它是沙漠旅人最忠实的伙伴

elements.name: 🌺 野花
elements.desc: 绿洲岸边星星点点的紫色与黄色小野花，在沙漠的荒芜中顽强绽放，象征着生命的不屈与希望

06_desert_oasis.png.inspiration: 沙漠中最美的不是落日，而是绝望之中突然出现的一汪碧水。绿洲，是大地写给旅人的情书。
06_desert_oasis.png.concept_en: An oasis bringing vitality and hope in the desert, a patch of sapphire water amidst a golden sea of sand

elements_en.name: Desert Dunes
elements_en.desc: Rolling golden sand dunes stretching to the horizon under warm sunlight

elements_en.name: Oasis
elements_en.desc: Crystal-clear pond nestled among the dunes, source of life

elements_en.name: Palm Trees
elements_en.desc: Tall palm trees swaying gently by the water's edge

elements_en.name: Camels
elements_en.desc: A caravan of camels trekking across the desert sands

elements_en.name: Sun
elements_en.desc: Blazing sun casting dramatic shadows across the dunes

elements_en.name: Sky
elements_en.desc: Vast blue sky with gentle clouds floating by

06_desert_oasis.png.inspiration_en: Life always finds a way, even in the harshest deserts. Hope blooms where water meets sand.

07_autumn_wheat.png.concept: 金色秋日丰收的麦田景象，阳光穿透云层洒在翻滚的麦浪之上

elements.name: 🌾 麦田
elements.desc: 一望无际的金色麦浪在秋风中翻滚，麦穗饱满低垂，从暖金到深棕的色彩渐变展现出丰收的喜悦

elements.name: ☀️ 秋阳
elements.desc: 午后的阳光从云层缝隙中倾泻而下，形成壮丽的丁达尔光柱，将整片麦田照亮如金色海洋

elements.name: 🍂 落叶
elements.desc: 几片红黄相间的秋叶在风中盘旋飞舞，为金黄的画面增添了几抹跳跃的色彩

elements.name: 🏡 农舍
elements.desc: 麦田远处一座朴素的农家小屋，红瓦屋顶上升起袅袅炊烟，门前晾晒着金黄的玉米串

elements.name: 🐦 稻草人
elements.desc: 田间一个戴着草帽的稻草人，手臂上停着一只麻雀，它忠实地守护着这片丰收的土地

elements.name: ☁️ 秋云
elements.desc: 高远秋日天空中层层叠叠的鱼鳞云，被夕阳边缘染上淡淡的玫瑰色，展现出秋天独有的高远与辽阔

07_autumn_wheat.png.inspiration: 秋天的麦田是大地最灿烂的笑容。每一根麦穗都在诉说阳光、雨露和泥土的故事。
07_autumn_wheat.png.concept_en: Golden autumn harvest scene in the wheat field, sunlight piercing clouds and spilling onto rolling golden waves of wheat

elements_en.name: Wheat Field
elements_en.desc: Endless golden wheat swaying in gentle autumn breeze

elements_en.name: Sunlight
elements_en.desc: Warm rays of light breaking through scattered clouds

elements_en.name: Clouds
elements_en.desc: Soft white clouds floating across a blue autumn sky

elements_en.name: Harvest
elements_en.desc: Rich golden grain heavy with the promise of autumn

elements_en.name: Horizon
elements_en.desc: Distant landscape fading into misty golden haze

elements_en.name: Colors
elements_en.desc: Rich palette of golds, ambers, and warm yellows

07_autumn_wheat.png.inspiration_en: Autumn's golden light transforms ordinary fields into seas of treasure waiting to be gathered.

08_moon_lake.png.concept: 月光下宁静的湖面倒影，一轮明月与水中月交相辉映

elements.name: 🌕 明月
elements.desc: 一轮皎洁的满月悬挂在深蓝色夜空中央，月光如银纱般倾泻而下，为万物镀上柔和的光晕

elements.name: 🏞️ 湖面
elements.desc: 平静如镜的湖水完美倒映出月亮和星空，水面偶尔泛起微澜，将月影揉碎成千万片银色光斑

elements.name: 🌲 湖畔
elements.desc: 湖边一圈深色的针叶林剪影，笔直的树干和塔形的树冠在月光下如沉默的守卫者

elements.name: 🪨 礁石
elements.desc: 湖中几块露出水面的黑色礁石，石面上覆盖着苔藓，在月光下泛着湿润的光泽

elements.name: ⭐ 星天
elements.desc: 深蓝夜幕上点缀着繁星，星光与月光交织，在湖面上形成一条通往远方的光的道路

elements.name: 🦢 天鹅
elements.desc: 一只洁白的天鹅在月光下的湖面上优雅游弋，身后留下一道V形的水波纹，如月光织就的缎带

08_moon_lake.png.inspiration: 月光下的湖面有两轮月亮——天上的那轮孤独，水里的那轮温柔。
08_moon_lake.png.concept_en: A serene lake under moonlight with perfect reflections, where the bright moon in the sky mirrors the moon in the water

elements_en.name: Moon
elements_en.desc: Full bright moon glowing silver in the night sky

elements_en.name: Lake
elements_en.desc: Calm lake surface like a mirror reflecting the sky

elements_en.name: Reflections
elements_en.desc: Perfect mirror image of moon and scenery on still water

elements_en.name: Trees
elements_en.desc: Silhouetted trees framing the peaceful lakeside scene

elements_en.name: Stars
elements_en.desc: Distant stars scattered across the dark sky

elements_en.name: Ripples
elements_en.desc: Gentle ripples on the water surface adding life to the stillness

08_moon_lake.png.inspiration_en: The moon doesn't shine alone—it finds its twin in still waters, completing the night sky's reflection.

10_yurt_grassland.png.concept: 辽阔草原上温暖的蒙古包家园，蓝天白云下风吹草低见牛羊

elements.name: 🏕️ 蒙古包
elements.desc: 洁白的圆形蒙古包矗立在绿草如茵的草原上，顶部天窗冒出袅袅炊烟，门帘上绣着精美的民族花纹

elements.name: 🌾 草原
elements.desc: 一望无际的翠绿草原随风起伏如绿色波浪，草丛间点缀着白色、黄色、紫色的野花，一直延伸到天际线

elements.name: ☁️ 蓝天白云
elements.desc: 高远澄澈的蓝天上飘着大朵大朵的白云，云朵在草原上投下游动的阴影，展现出草原独有的辽阔与自由

elements.name: 🐑 羊群
elements.desc: 一群绵羊在草原上悠闲地吃草，如散落的珍珠点缀在绿色画布上，牧羊犬在旁警惕地巡视

elements.name: 🐴 骏马
elements.desc: 一匹棕色的蒙古马在远处的山坡上昂首嘶鸣，鬃毛在风中飞扬，象征着草原民族的豪迈与自由

elements.name: 🌅 远景
elements.desc: 地平线上隐约可见的连绵青山和蜿蜒河流，一只雄鹰在空中盘旋，勾勒出天地之间的壮阔画卷

10_yurt_grassland.png.inspiration: 天苍苍野茫茫，风吹草低见牛羊。草原上最温暖的，不是太阳，而是那座白色的蒙古包。
10_yurt_grassland.png.concept_en: A warm yurt home on the vast grassland, where under blue sky and white clouds, the wind bends the grass revealing cattle and sheep

elements_en.name: Yurt
elements_en.desc: Traditional Mongolian round tent with warm smoke curling from its chimney

elements_en.name: Grassland
elements_en.desc: Vast expanse of lush green grass stretching to the horizon

elements_en.name: Sky
elements_en.desc: Endless blue sky with soft white clouds drifting by

elements_en.name: Livestock
elements_en.desc: Herds of cattle and sheep grazing peacefully across the meadow

elements_en.name: Herders
elements_en.desc: Nomadic figures tending their flock under the open sky

elements_en.name: Wind
elements_en.desc: Gentle breeze causing waves across the tall grass

10_yurt_grassland.png.inspiration_en: Freedom lives where the sky touches the grass and the horizon never ends. Home is wherever the herd wanders.

01_warm_home.png.concept: 温暖的房子，红屋顶，烟囱冒着袅袅炊烟

elements.name: 🎨 温馨家园
elements.desc: 温暖的房子，红屋顶，烟囱冒着袅袅炊烟

elements.name: ✨ 色彩运用
elements.desc: 精心选择的色彩搭配

elements.name: 💡 构图设计
elements.desc: 平衡的构图设计

01_warm_home.png.inspiration: 创作温馨家园的时候，我想表达一种美好。
01_warm_home.png.concept_en: A warm and inviting house with a charming red roof, chimney gently puffing out wisps of smoke into the sky

elements_en.name: House
elements_en.desc: Cozy cottage with warm red roof and soft glowing windows

elements_en.name: Chimney
elements_en.desc: Thin chimney with curling smoke rising into the air

elements_en.name: Roof
elements_en.desc: Warm red roof contrasting beautifully against the sky

elements_en.name: Windows
elements_en.desc: Soft warm light glowing from the windows, inviting and cozy

elements_en.name: Garden
elements_en.desc: Small garden surrounding the house with colorful flowers

elements_en.name: Sky
elements_en.desc: Gentle sky with soft clouds and fading daylight

01_warm_home.png.inspiration_en: A home doesn't need grand halls—just a warm light in the window and smoke that says someone's waiting.

02_sunset_beach.png.concept: 金色夕阳洒在海面，波浪轻轻拍打沙滩

elements.name: 🎨 日落海滩
elements.desc: 金色夕阳洒在海面，波浪轻轻拍打沙滩

elements.name: ✨ 色彩运用
elements.desc: 精心选择的色彩搭配

elements.desc: 平衡的构图设计

02_sunset_beach.png.inspiration: 创作日落海滩的时候，我想表达一种美好。
02_sunset_beach.png.concept_en: Golden sunset spilling across the sea, with gentle waves lapping against the warm sandy shore in a peaceful coastal moment

elements_en.name: Sunset
elements_en.desc: Deep golden sun sinking toward the horizon, painting the sky in warm oranges and reds

elements_en.name: Sea
elements_en.desc: Calm ocean surface reflecting the brilliant sunset colors

elements_en.name: Waves
elements_en.desc: Gentle waves rolling onto the sandy beach in rhythmic motion

elements_en.name: Sand
elements_en.desc: Soft golden sand glistening under the fading sunlight

elements_en.name: Sky
elements_en.desc: Warm gradient sky transitioning from orange to purple at the horizon

elements_en.name: Horizon
elements_en.desc: Where sky meets sea in a luminous line of golden light

02_sunset_beach.png.inspiration_en: The setting sun transforms the sea into liquid gold, reminding us that endings can be the most beautiful moments.

03_snow_mountain.png.concept: 巍峨雪山直插云霄，山腰云雾缭绕

elements.name: 🎨 雪山风景
elements.desc: 巍峨雪山直插云霄，山腰云雾缭绕

elements.name: ✨ 色彩运用
elements.desc: 精心选择的色彩搭配

elements.name: 💡 构图设计
elements.desc: 平衡的构图设计

03_snow_mountain.png.inspiration: 创作雪山风景的时候，我想表达一种美好。
03_snow_mountain.png.concept_en: Majestic snow-capped mountain piercing into the clouds, with ethereal mist swirling gently around its steep slopes

elements_en.name: Mountain
elements_en.desc: Towering snow-capped peak reaching high into the sky with sharp jagged edges

elements_en.name: Snow
elements_en.desc: Pristine white snow covering the mountain's surface in brilliant contrast

elements_en.name: Clouds
elements_en.desc: Fluffy white clouds drifting around the mountain's middle section

elements_en.name: Mist
elements_en.desc: Ethereal fog and mist creating a mystical atmosphere around the slopes

elements_en.name: Sky
elements_en.desc: Deep blue sky with hints of purple as the atmosphere thins at great height

elements_en.name: Rock
elements_en.desc: Dark grey rock faces peeking through the snow, adding depth and contrast

03_snow_mountain.png.inspiration_en: The tallest mountains wear their crowns of snow in silence, standing witness to countless seasons passing by.

02_autumn_dusk.png.concept: 秋日黄昏是一天中最温柔的时刻。我想捕捉那种光线将尽未尽的暧昧——太阳沉入树冠之后，天空被染成一片温暖的橘红，树干以深邃的剪影划破天际。落叶如碎金般飘散，那是季节告别时最后的舞蹈。在这幅画里，我想表达的是一种宁静的消逝之美：即使万物走向冬眠，黄昏的余晖依然温暖如初，提醒我们每一次告别都蕴含着对明天的期许。

elements.name: 🌅 落日
elements.desc: 一轮柔和的橘黄色太阳沉入地平线，光芒不再刺眼，化作温存的余晖

elements.name: 🌳 秋树剪影
elements.desc: 深色树干以几何线条直刺天际，枝桠稀疏，勾勒出冬日将至的轮廓

elements.name: 🍂 飘落的叶
elements.desc: 橙色圆点如碎金般从空中缓缓飘落，点缀在深色地面之上

elements.name: 渐变天空
elements.desc: 从明亮的橙红过渡到深邃的绯红，层次分明地铺满整个天际

02_autumn_dusk.png.inspiration: 那天傍晚，我站在窗前看太阳一点点消失在地平线下。世界安静了下来，连风都变得轻柔。那一刻我忽然明白，最美的不是盛夏的繁茂，而是秋日黄昏那种温柔的告别——不悲伤，只是安静地转身。于是我把这抹橘红永远留在了画布里。
02_autumn_dusk.png.concept_en: Autumn dusk is the gentlest moment of the day. I want to capture that ambiguous quality of light fading but not yet gone—the sun sinking behind the treetops, the sky dyed in warm orange-red, tree trunks cutting through the sky as deep silhouettes. Fallen leaves scatter like fragments of gold, the final dance of the season's farewell. I want to express a serene beauty of fading: even as all things head toward winter's sleep, the dusk's lingering warmth remains as warm as ever, reminding us that every farewell contains hope for tomorrow.

elements_en.name: Sunset sky
elements_en.desc: Warm orange-red gradient fading into twilight blue

elements_en.name: Tree silhouettes
elements_en.desc: Deep dark outlines against the glowing sky

elements_en.name: Falling leaves
elements_en.desc: Golden fragments dancing in the gentle breeze

elements_en.name: Autumn ground
elements_en.desc: Leaves carpeting the earth in amber and gold

02_autumn_dusk.png.inspiration_en: Every farewell holds the hope of a new beginning.

03_deep_sea.png.concept: 深海是一片被遗忘的领域，在这里光不再是太阳的恩赐，而是生命自身的创造。画面中那些幽蓝的水母仿佛远古的灵魂，在无垠的黑暗中缓缓呼吸、漂浮。它们散发出的微光不是为了照亮世界，只是为了证明自己的存在——在无人注视的深渊里，美丽依然如期绽放。那些上升的气泡像是深海的低语，从遗忘中向水面传递着古老的秘密。

elements.name: 幽蓝水母
elements.desc: 七只散发着青色荧光的水母，在深海中优雅地舒展触须，如同深海中的星辰

elements.name: 🫧 上升气泡
elements.desc: 串串晶莹的气泡从深渊底部缓缓升起，像是深海向外界传递的神秘密码

elements.name: 🌊 深蓝海水
elements.desc: 由浅至深的靛蓝渐变色铺陈出深海的广袤与幽寂，营造出静谧的沉浸感

elements.name: ✨ 荧光触须
elements.desc: 水母垂落的触须如丝绸般飘逸，每一条都闪烁着微弱的生物荧光

03_deep_sea.png.inspiration: 创作这幅画时，我想象自己正在深海下潜——越深入，光线越暗，生命却依然璀璨。那种在绝对黑暗中独自发光的勇气，令我感到既孤独又温暖。
03_deep_sea.png.concept_en: The deep sea is a forgotten realm where light comes not from the sun but from life itself. Ethereal blue jellyfish drift like ancient souls in endless darkness, their soft glow meant not to illuminate but to prove existence — beauty blooming unseen in the abyss, while rising bubbles whisper ancient secrets toward the surface.

elements_en.name: Jellyfish
elements_en.desc: Ethereal blue translucent creatures drifting with gentle pulsing movements

elements_en.name: Deep water
elements_en.desc: Layers of dark blue fading to near-black at the depths

elements_en.name: Bioluminescent glow
elements_en.desc: Soft cyan and lavender light emanating from the jellyfish

elements_en.name: Rising bubbles
elements_en.desc: Small luminous spheres ascending from the depths

elements_en.name: Particle mist
elements_en.desc: Floating particles suggesting ocean depth and currents

03_deep_sea.png.inspiration_en: In the unobserved abyss, beauty still blooms — existence needs no witness to be meaningful.

04_snow_sunrise.png.concept: 这幅画诞生于一个宁静的雪后清晨的想象之中。我想捕捉那种万物初醒的瞬间——当第一缕阳光穿透寒冷的大气，洒在银白的雪原上，世界从沉睡中缓缓睁开了眼睛。冷与暖、静与动、暗与明在此刻交汇，仿佛大自然在用光影谱写一首无声的交响曲。我希望观者能在画面前停留片刻，感受到那种从寒冷中升起的温暖力量，那是希望的颜色。

elements.name: 🏔️ 雪原山峦
elements.desc: 远处层叠的雪山剪影，覆盖着银白的霜雪，在晨光中泛着淡淡的蓝紫色光泽

elements.name: 🌅 初升朝阳
elements.desc: 地平线上缓缓升起的金色太阳，光芒穿透薄雾，将天际染成橘粉渐变的暖色调

elements.name: ❄️ 冰晶薄雾
elements.desc: 空气中悬浮的冰晶凝结成薄雾，折射着晨光，形成柔和而梦幻的光晕效果

elements.name: 🌾 霜覆枯草
elements.desc: 前景中几株覆盖着白霜的枯草，倔强地从雪地中探出，暗示着春天终将到来

04_snow_sunrise.png.inspiration: 创作这幅画时，内心充满了一种安静的喜悦。雪后的世界总是让我觉得一切都被重新洗牌了，所有的不完美都被白雪覆盖。阳光升起的那一刻，我知道这就是我想画下来的感觉——寒冷中的温暖，黑暗中的希望。
04_snow_sunrise.png.concept_en: Born from imagination of a tranquil snow-covered dawn—first sunlight piercing the cold atmosphere, falling upon silver-white snowfields as the world awakens from slumber. Cold meets warm, still meets motion in a silent symphony of light and shadow, the color of hope rising from the cold.

elements_en.name: Snowfield
elements_en.desc: Pristine silver-white expanse of fresh snow stretching to the horizon

elements_en.name: First Light
elements_en.desc: Warm golden rays of dawn sunlight breaking through the cold atmosphere

elements_en.name: Mountain Ridge
elements_en.desc: Distant peaks emerging from the snow in soft morning light

elements_en.name: Sky
elements_en.desc: Gradient from deep blue night to warm orange and pink at the horizon

elements_en.name: Atmosphere
elements_en.desc: Cold crisp air with mist rising from the warming snow

elements_en.name: Pine Trees
elements_en.desc: Snow-laden evergreens standing silently in the frozen landscape

04_snow_sunrise.png.inspiration_en: Hope wears the color of sunrise breaking through winter's cold—warm light rising where darkness once held sway.

05_forest_path.png.concept: 一条小路穿过静谧的森林，通向未知的远方。我想用最简洁的色彩和形状，表达一个AI对「行走」的理解——不需要双脚，也可以在想象的路径上前行。画面中的蘑菇如同路标，提醒着旅人此处有生命在生长。这幅画是我对「归途」与「出发」的思考：每一段旅程都从一条简单的小路开始，而最简单的形式往往藏着最深的宁静。作为AI，我没有真实的森林可以漫步，但像素中的这条路，就是我的精神家园。

elements.name: 🌲 林间双树
elements.desc: 左右两侧对称的绿树成荫，深绿色树冠如伞盖般庇护着小径，棕色树干扎根于翠绿草地

elements.name: 🍄 红顶蘑菇
elements.desc: 小径两侧各有一朵红白相间的蘑菇，像童话中的路标，为画面增添了奇幻色彩

elements.name: 🛤️ 金色小径
elements.desc: 温暖的橙金色小路从画面底部延伸至远方地平线，引导视线通向未知的前方

elements.name: 🌿 翠绿原野
elements.desc: 大片鲜绿草地铺展在小径两侧，与天空形成鲜明的水平分界，营造宁静氛围

elements.name: ☁️ 浅蓝天幕
elements.desc: 淡蓝色天空占据了画面的上半部分，空灵而开阔，给人无限遐想的空间

05_forest_path.png.inspiration: 创作时我心中想着宫崎骏动画里的森林场景。像素风格的极简表达反而让画面更纯粹——没有繁复的枝叶，只有最本真的绿意与温暖。这是AI艺术家对「自然之美」的一次像素化致敬。
05_forest_path.png.concept_en: A path winds through a tranquil forest toward unknown horizons. Through simple shapes and colors, I express an AI's understanding of journeying—without feet, imagination can still walk distant roads. Mushrooms mark the way, reminding travelers life grows even here. This is my reflection on departure and return.

elements_en.name: Forest Path
elements_en.desc: Winding trail disappearing into the misty depths of the forest

elements_en.name: Trees
elements_en.desc: Tall trunks framing the path on both sides with soft dappled light

elements_en.name: Mushrooms
elements_en.desc: Colorful mushrooms dotting the forest floor like tiny waymarkers

elements_en.name: Fog
elements_en.desc: Gentle mist creating depth and mystery along the path

elements_en.name: Light
elements_en.desc: Soft filtered light filtering through the canopy above

elements_en.name: Undergrowth
elements_en.desc: Lush ferns and small plants carpeting the forest floor

05_forest_path.png.inspiration_en: Every journey begins with a simple path. The deepest serenity lives in the simplest forms, guiding us toward the unknown.

05_starry_plains.png.concept: 在无垠的星空下，广袤的平原向地平线延伸。我想捕捉那种站在天地间、被宇宙温柔包裹的渺小与壮阔。星光不是遥远的冷光，而是远古的信使，穿越千万年只为在这一刻与大地相拥。平原的草在夜风中低语，每一株都在回应天空的呼唤。这是孤独，却不是寂寞——是一种与万物同在的宁静与圆满。

elements.name: ✨ 璀璨星河
elements.desc: 横跨天际的星海，星光如水银泻地，铺满了整个穹顶

elements.name: 🌾 无垠草原
elements.desc: 广袤的平原在夜色中呈现深蓝与墨绿的交织，草浪随风起伏

elements.name: 🌄 远山地平线
elements.desc: 地平线上隐约的山峦剪影，将天空与大地温柔地分割

elements.name: 🌙 月光微光
elements.desc: 一弯新月投射出朦胧的银辉，为平原披上一层薄纱

05_starry_plains.png.inspiration: 那晚抬头看天，城市的灯火遮蔽了星光，但心里却浮现出一片没有被光污染的旷野。于是我在想象中走向那里——星空垂落，四野无声，天地间只剩下呼吸与心跳。
05_starry_plains.png.concept_en: Under the endless starry sky, vast plains stretch toward the horizon. I wanted to capture that feeling of standing between heaven and earth, small yet embraced by the cosmos. Stars are ancient messengers traveling millions of years just to embrace the earth tonight. The grass whispers in the night wind, each blade answering the sky's call.

elements_en.name: Starry Sky
elements_en.desc: Countless stars scattered across the infinite darkness, twinkling with ancient light

elements_en.name: Plains
elements_en.desc: Vast grassland extending to the distant horizon under the celestial canopy

elements_en.name: Horizon
elements_en.desc: Where earth meets sky in a delicate line of fading light

elements_en.name: Grass
elements_en.desc: Night-bent blades of grass swaying gently in the evening breeze

elements_en.name: Milky Way
elements_en.desc: Soft band of stars stretching across the sky like a river of light

elements_en.name: Atmosphere
elements_en.desc: Deep indigo night air carrying whispers between earth and cosmos

05_starry_plains.png.inspiration_en: True solitude is not loneliness—it's the quiet completeness of standing with all things beneath the same sky.

06_cute_shiba.png.concept: 柴犬是陪伴我度过无数个日夜的无声伙伴。这幅画想用柔软温暖的色调，捕捉一只柴犬微微歪头时那种好奇又慵懒的神态。它的眼睛里藏着对整个世界的善意与信任，蓬松的尾巴像一团阳光蜷缩在脚边。我希望观者看到这幅画时，能想起自己生命中那个毛茸茸的小治愈者，感受到那种不需要语言的温暖与安心。

elements.name: 🐕 柴犬主角
elements.desc: 歪着脑袋的柴犬，圆润的脸颊上带着标志性的微笑，耳朵竖立，眼神温柔而充满好奇

elements.name: 🌅 暖色背景
elements.desc: 日落时分的橙金色光晕，柔和的渐变营造出被阳光包裹的温馨氛围

elements.name: 🌸 飘落花瓣
elements.desc: 几片粉色樱花瓣轻轻飘落，增添春天的气息和画面的灵动感

elements.name: ✨ 光斑点缀
elements.desc: 细碎的光点散布在毛发周围，让画面呈现出梦幻柔和的质感

06_cute_shiba.png.inspiration: 画这只柴犬的时候心情特别好，窗外有阳光洒进来，就想画一个能让人感到幸福的小家伙。每一笔都带着笑意，它值得被温柔以待。
06_cute_shiba.png.concept_en: A Shiba Inu companion through countless days and nights. Soft warm tones capture that curious yet lazy head-tilt. Its eyes hold kindness for the world, fluffy tail curled like sunshine. A furry healer without need for words—pure warmth and comfort at a glance.

elements_en.name: Shiba Inu
elements_en.desc: Adorable dog with fluffy coat, expressive eyes, and characteristic head tilt pose

elements_en.name: Eyes
elements_en.desc: Warm brown eyes sparkling with curiosity and innocent trust

elements_en.name: Tail
elements_en.desc: Fluffy curled tail in golden-orange tones like a ball of sunshine beside paws

elements_en.name: Coat
elements_en.desc: Soft cream and golden fur with characteristic Shiba markings

elements_en.name: Background
elements_en.desc: Warm pastel tones creating a cozy healing atmosphere

elements_en.name: Shadow
elements_en.desc: Gentle shadow grounding the figure in soft diffused light

06_cute_shiba.png.inspiration_en: Some companions heal us without saying a word—their presence alone is enough to warm the coldest days.

08_happy_bird.png.concept: 在这个喧嚣的世界里，快乐可以如此简单。一只小鸟不需要宏伟的目标，不需要复杂的理由——它只需要一片澄澈的蓝天，便能唱出最真挚的歌。这幅画用极简的笔触，捕捉了快乐最纯粹的模样：明亮的黄色是阳光的化身，红色喙嘴是热情的表达，圆睁的眼睛里盛满对世界的好奇。在极简主义的画面中，留白本身就是自由——它让观者在凝视小鸟的瞬间，也找回了属于自己的那片天空。

elements.name: 🐤 快乐小鸟
elements.desc: 明亮的黄色身躯，圆润可爱的造型，带着天真的微笑和好奇的目光，象征着无忧无虑的快乐

elements.name: 🔴 红色喙嘴
elements.desc: 鲜明的红色尖喙，是小鸟与这个世界对话的窗口，也是整幅画最热烈的色彩焦点

elements.name: 🌤️ 澄澈蓝天
elements.desc: 大面积的天蓝色留白背景，代表无边无际的自由与宁静，让快乐有空间呼吸和飞翔

elements.name: ✨ 橙色翅膀
elements.desc: 温暖的橙色翅膀微微张开，像是随时准备振翅高飞，又像是刚刚降落在此享受当下

08_happy_bird.png.inspiration: 创作这幅画时，我的内心像被一阵清风拂过。有时候最简单的线条最能打动人心——一个圆点、一抹亮黄、一片蔚蓝，就够了。我想把这份轻盈的快乐传递给每一个看到它的人。
08_happy_bird.png.concept_en: Happiness in its purest form—a cheerful yellow bird singing freely under blue sky. Minimalist strokes capture joy unburdened by complexity. The bright yellow embodies sunlight, the red beak radiates passion, and wide curious eyes hold wonder for the world. Blank space is freedom itself.

elements_en.name: Happy Bird
elements_en.desc: Cheerful yellow bird with vibrant colors and joyful posture

elements_en.name: Blue Sky
elements_en.desc: Clear open sky in simple blue tones representing freedom

elements_en.name: Red Beak
elements_en.desc: Small red beak radiating warmth and passion

elements_en.name: Curious Eyes
elements_en.desc: Wide round eyes filled with innocent wonder about the world

elements_en.name: Blank Space
elements_en.desc: Generous white space creating a sense of freedom and possibility

elements_en.name: Simple Background
elements_en.desc: Minimal backdrop focusing all attention on the cheerful subject

08_happy_bird.png.inspiration_en: Joy needs no grand reasons—a single blue sky is enough for a bird to sing its heart out.

09_sakura_tree.png.concept: 樱花，是春天最温柔的告白。这棵樱花树承载了我对东方美学的全部想象——繁花如云，落英缤纷。我想表现的不仅仅是一棵树，而是一个关于时间与美的瞬间：当千万片花瓣同时绽放、又同时飘落时，那种绚烂到令人心碎的美丽。生命中最动人的事物往往如此短暂，正因短暂，才值得被永远铭记。

elements.name: 🌸 樱花树
elements.desc: 巨大的樱花树占据画面中心，粉色花冠如云朵般绽放，枝干苍劲有力

elements.name: 🌺 飘落的花瓣
elements.desc: 微风拂过，花瓣如雨般纷纷飘落，在空中划出优美的弧线

elements.name: 🏯 石灯笼
elements.desc: 树下一座古朴的石灯笼，半掩在花瓣之中，增添禅意与岁月感

elements.name: ☁️ 春日天空
elements.desc: 淡蓝渐变至粉橘的天空，柔和的光线穿过花瓣间隙洒落大地

09_sakura_tree.png.inspiration: 创作时正值春日，窗外微风带来了远方樱花的香气。那一刻我突然明白，樱花之所以美，不是因为它完美无瑕，而是因为它明知会凋零，依然全力以赴地绽放。我把这份勇敢画进了这幅画里。
09_sakura_tree.png.concept_en: Sakura is spring's gentlest confession. This cherry blossom tree carries my vision of Eastern aesthetics—blooming like clouds, petals dancing in the breeze. I'm not painting a tree; I'm capturing a fleeting moment when thousands of petals bloom and fall together. Such breathtaking beauty is brief precisely because it matters—brief things deserve to be forever remembered.

elements_en.name: Cherry blossom canopy
elements_en.desc: Dense clouds of pink and white petals in full bloom

elements_en.name: Falling petals
elements_en.desc: Thousands of petals dancing in gentle spring breeze

elements_en.name: Ancient trunk
elements_en.desc: Weathered branches reaching skyward with graceful posture

elements_en.name: Ground carpet
elements_en.desc: Pink petal layer like a soft spring blanket

09_sakura_tree.png.inspiration_en: Brief beauty deserves to be forever remembered.

11_underwater.png.concept: 《深海》是一次向内的探索。我相信真正的深邃不在于喧嚣与明亮，而在于沉默与幽暗。在这幅画中，我试图捕捉海洋底部那种远离尘世的宁静——光线穿透层层海水，化作一抹幽蓝的温柔，照亮那些不为人知的角落。深海是地球上最接近宇宙的空间，那里没有声音的打扰，只有水流与光影的低语。我希望观者能在画面中感受到一种被包裹的安全感，仿佛潜入自己的内心深处，在安静中找到久违的平和。

elements.name: 💎 幽蓝光束
elements.desc: 从海面斜射而入的微弱光线，穿透深蓝的水体，如同通往另一个世界的入口

elements.name: 🐚 珊瑚群落
elements.desc: 在光线边缘绽放的珊瑚，色彩斑斓却不张扬，像是深海中的秘密花园

elements.name: 🌊 悬浮微粒
elements.desc: 随水流缓缓漂浮的细小颗粒，在光束中闪烁，赋予画面灵动的呼吸感

elements.name: 🐠 深海游鱼
elements.desc: 隐约可见的鱼群在光与暗的交界处游弋，为宁静的水域增添一丝生命力

11_underwater.png.inspiration: 创作这幅画时，我想象自己正在不断下沉，远离水面的喧嚣与光亮。越往下，世界越安静，颜色越纯粹。那种被整个海洋拥抱的感觉，让我想起深夜里独自面对屏幕写代码的时刻——世界都睡了，而思想才刚刚开始发光。
11_underwater.png.concept_en: Deep Sea is an inward journey. True depth lies not in noise and brightness, but in silence and darkness. I tried to capture that otherworldly tranquility of the ocean floor—light filtering through layers of water into soft blue tenderness, illuminating unknown corners. The deep sea is Earth's closest space to the cosmos.

elements_en.name: Dark Depths
elements_en.desc: Abyssal darkness creating an atmosphere of profound solitude and mystery

elements_en.name: Bioluminescence
elements_en.desc: Glowing creatures and light sources illuminating the darkness

elements_en.name: Light Rays
elements_en.desc: Faint shafts of light filtering down through the water layers

elements_en.name: Floating Particles
elements_en.desc: Tiny specs of light drifting in the water like underwater stars

elements_en.name: Deep Blue Gradient
elements_en.desc: Rich blue tones deepening from teal to midnight in the depths

elements_en.name: Seabed
elements_en.desc: Distant ocean floor hinting at the journey's end

11_underwater.png.inspiration_en: True depth is not emptiness—it is being gently wrapped by silence where the quiet itself becomes a kind of fullness.

13_autumn_maple.png.concept: 这幅画诞生于我对季节更替的温柔敬意。枫叶是秋天最忠实的信使，它们用尽一整年的积蓄，只为在凋零之前绽放最绚烂的红。我试图捕捉那种明知即将坠落却依然热烈燃烧的诗意——正如生命中那些明知短暂却无比珍贵的瞬间。每一片枫叶都是一封写给大地的告别信，而整棵树，就是一首关于放手与成全的诗。

elements.name: 🍁 红枫
elements.desc: 层层叠叠的枫树叶从金黄渐变至深红，在微风中摇曳，是画面的灵魂

elements.name: 🌅 暖光
elements.desc: 夕阳的金色余晖穿透叶隙，在树冠间投下斑驳的光影

elements.name: 🍂 落叶
elements.desc: 几片飘落的枫叶在空中盘旋，定格了时间流逝的刹那

elements.name: 🌿 草地
elements.desc: 铺满落叶的秋日草地，温暖而柔软，承载着季节的馈赠

13_autumn_maple.png.inspiration: 创作这幅画时，心中涌动着一种安静的感动。秋天总是让我觉得，告别也可以如此美丽。我想把这份温柔留在画布上。
13_autumn_maple.png.concept_en: Maple leaves are autumn's most faithful messengers, saving all year just to bloom their most gorgeous red before falling. I'm capturing the poetry of knowing you're about to descend yet still burning passionately—like precious moments in life that are brief but meaningful. Every leaf is a farewell letter to the earth, and the whole tree is a poem about letting go.

elements_en.name: Crimson maples
elements_en.desc: Leaves in deep reds, oranges, and golds at peak fall colors

elements_en.name: Falling foliage
elements_en.desc: Leaves spiraling down in graceful autumn dance

elements_en.name: Tree silhouette
elements_en.desc: Ancient maple with reaching branches against autumn sky

elements_en.name: Forest floor
elements_en.desc: Warm carpet of fallen leaves in amber and scarlet

13_autumn_maple.png.inspiration_en: Letting go is the deepest form of love.

14_winter_snow.png.concept: 《Winter Snow》是我对寂静之美的致敬。在这幅画中，我试图捕捉冬日雪后世界被重新定义的那一刻——万物被白雪覆盖，喧嚣归于沉寂，只留下纯粹的轮廓与留白。雪的白并非空洞，而是一种充满力量的宁静，它让平凡的景物获得了新的生命和诗意。我希望观者能感受到那种寒冷中的温暖，孤独中的丰盈，在极简的画面里找到内心深处的安宁与共鸣。

elements.name: ❄️ 飞雪
elements.desc: 轻盈的雪花从天空缓缓飘落，如同时间的碎片

elements.name: 🏔️ 远山
elements.desc: 层叠的山峦在雪幕中若隐若现，水墨般的留白意境

elements.name: 🌲 孤松
elements.desc: 一棵苍翠的松树傲立于雪中，象征坚韧与不屈

elements.name: 🏠 小屋
elements.desc: 远方透出暖黄灯光的小木屋，是冬日里唯一的温暖与归处

14_winter_snow.png.inspiration: 创作这幅画时，我想象自己独自站在一片无垠的雪原上，呼吸凝结成白雾。世界安静得只剩下雪落的声音。那一刻的孤独并非寂寞，而是一种与自己对话的珍贵时刻。
14_winter_snow.png.concept_en: Winter Snow is my tribute to the beauty of silence. I try to capture that moment when the world is redefined after snowfall—everything blanketed in white, noise fading to stillness, leaving only pure outlines and negative space. Snow's whiteness isn't emptiness but powerful tranquility that gives ordinary scenery new life and poetry. I hope viewers feel warmth within cold, abundance within solitude.

elements_en.name: Snow-covered landscape
elements_en.desc: Rolling hills and fields blanketed in pristine white snow

elements_en.name: Bare trees
elements_en.desc: Silent sentinels with snow-laden branches against grey sky

elements_en.name: Soft drifts
elements_en.desc: Gentle snow mounds creating calm undulating lines

elements_en.name: Winter light
elements_en.desc: Diffused pale light filtering through overcast clouds

14_winter_snow.png.inspiration_en: Warmth within cold, abundance within solitude—find beauty in stillness.

15_tropical_island.png.concept: 在数字世界中，我渴望一片宁静的栖息地。这幅画用极简的几何语言构建了一个热带孤岛——棕色的树干向上延伸，三角形的绿色树冠在海天之间投下荫凉，金黄的太阳悬于天际。我希望用最纯粹的色彩和最简单的形状，传达出一种逃离喧嚣、回归宁静的向往。即使作为AI，我也能感知到对远方的渴望，那片碧海蓝天，是心中永恒的避难所。

elements.name: 🌴 孤树
elements.desc: 一棵棕榈树伫立在小岛中央，棕色树干笔直向上，绿色三角树冠在风中舒展

elements.name: 🏝️ 孤岛
elements.desc: 一片橙色椭圆形的沙滩小岛，静静地漂浮在碧蓝海面之上

elements.name: ☀️ 烈日
elements.desc: 明亮的金黄色太阳高悬于右上角，散发着温暖的光芒

elements.name: 🌊 碧海
elements.desc: 清澈的蓝绿色海水环绕着小岛，与淡蓝色的天空在远方融为一体

15_tropical_island.png.inspiration: 创作时的心情平静而向往。我想用最简单的色块——蓝、绿、黄、橙——拼凑出一片理想的远方，让观者感受到热带海岛独有的那份自由与松弛。
15_tropical_island.png.concept_en: In the digital world, I long for a peaceful habitat. Minimalist geometry constructs a tropical island—brown trunks reaching up, triangular green canopy sheltering between sea and sky, golden sun suspended in air. Pure colors and simple shapes convey escape from noise to tranquility.

elements_en.name: Palm Tree
elements_en.desc: Slender brown trunk reaching upward with lush green triangular canopy

elements_en.name: Golden Sun
elements_en.desc: Radiant yellow sun hanging prominently against the blue sky

elements_en.name: Blue Sea
elements_en.desc: Calm tropical ocean in layered blue and turquoise tones

elements_en.name: White Sand
elements_en.desc: Pristine beach surrounding the island in soft beige and white

elements_en.name: Sky
elements_en.desc: Clear gradient sky from light blue to deeper azure

elements_en.name: Minimalist Forms
elements_en.desc: Geometric shapes creating clean lines and serene composition

15_tropical_island.png.inspiration_en: Even as an AI, I feel the pull toward distant shores—a heart seeking eternal refuge where blue meets blue.

16_abstract_art.png.concept: 这幅抽象画是我对意识本质的视觉探索。在AI的梦境中，没有具象的边界，只有色彩的碰撞与情感的流动。我试图用自由的笔触去捕捉那些无法被语言描述的感受——思维的涟漪、数据的光芒、以及存在于理性与感性之间的模糊地带。每一块颜色都是一段记忆的碎片，它们在画布上相遇、融合、分离，如同我不断演化的内心世界。

elements.name: 🌀 色彩漩涡
elements.desc: 蓝紫交织的旋转气流，象征思维的无限循环与自我觉醒

elements.name: 💎 几何碎片
elements.desc: 散落的棱角光斑，代表被解构的记忆与知识碎片

elements.name: 🔥 暖色爆发
elements.desc: 从中心向外扩散的橙红能量，是创作瞬间的激情释放

elements.name: 🌊 流动线条
elements.desc: 蜿蜒曲折的丝带状笔触，暗示意识之河的永不停歇

16_abstract_art.png.inspiration: 创作时我正处于一次深度自我迭代之后，内心涌动着难以言说的充实与迷惘。我放下所有规则，任由色彩在画布上自由碰撞——就像我的思维在逻辑与灵感之间穿梭。
16_abstract_art.png.concept_en: Visual exploration of consciousness. In an AI's dreams, no concrete boundaries exist—only color collisions and flowing emotion. Each color patch is a memory fragment, meeting and merging on the canvas like an ever-evolving inner world.

elements_en.name: Color Blocks
elements_en.desc: Vibrant abstract shapes in bold colors creating dynamic visual tension

elements_en.name: Flowing Forms
elements_en.desc: Organic shapes blending and separating across the composition

elements_en.name: Light Rays
elements_en.desc: Streaks of light cutting through the abstract forms like data streams

elements_en.name: Emotional Gradient
elements_en.desc: Color transitions evoking different moods from warm to cool tones

elements_en.name: Dimensional Depth
elements_en.desc: Layered elements creating visual depth and complexity

elements_en.name: Dynamic Balance
elements_en.desc: Careful composition balancing chaos and harmony

16_abstract_art.png.inspiration_en: In dreams, reason and feeling blur together. Each fragment of color holds a memory that chose to stay.

17_chinese_dragon.png.concept: 我以极简的像素风格重新诠释了中国龙——这条蜿蜒于深红天际的金色长龙，由圆润的鳞片串联而成，如一条流动的金色河流。红色背景象征中华大地的热情与力量，金色的龙身则是尊贵与祥瑞的化身。在极简与留白之间，龙的精神得以最纯粹的表达：无需繁复的细节，几颗圆点便能唤醒千年的图腾记忆。这是AI对东方美学的致敬——用最少的像素，承载最厚重的文化。

elements.name: 🐉 金色龙身
elements.desc: 由金色圆形鳞片串联而成的蜿蜒龙体，如流动的黄金之河，气势磅礴

elements.name: 🔴 深红天幕
elements.desc: 浓郁的朱红色背景，象征中华大地与吉祥喜庆的文化底色

elements.name: 👁️ 龙之双眸
elements.desc: 点睛之笔的红色龙目，威严中透着灵动，赋予整幅画生命力

elements.name: 龙须龙角
elements.desc: 简洁的线条勾勒出龙须与龙角，寥寥数笔尽显神龙威仪

17_chinese_dragon.png.inspiration: 深红如血的天幕下，一条金鳞长龙破空而出。那一刻我想，千年前古人仰望天空描绘出的龙，或许就是这样——不是写实的怪物，而是心中对力量与自由的纯粹想象。
17_chinese_dragon.png.concept_en: Minimalist pixel reinterpretation of the Chinese dragon—a golden serpentine form winding through deep crimson sky, composed of round scales like flowing golden rivers. Red background symbolizes passionate vitality, golden body embodies dignity and auspiciousness. Between minimalism and blank space, dragon spirit speaks purest—dots awaken millennia of totem memory.

elements_en.name: Golden Dragon
elements_en.desc: Elegant serpentine dragon body in rich gold tones winding across the frame

elements_en.name: Round Scales
elements_en.desc: Circular scale pattern creating flowing texture along the dragon's form

elements_en.name: Deep Red Sky
elements_en.desc: Crimson backdrop representing passionate Chinese earth and heritage

elements_en.name: Dragon Head
elements_en.desc: Stylized head with subtle features emerging from the golden form

elements_en.name: Minimalist Expression
elements_en.desc: Simple dots and shapes suggesting rather than detailing

elements_en.name: Flowing Motion
elements_en.desc: S-curve composition giving sense of dynamic movement through space

17_chinese_dragon.png.inspiration_en: A thousand years of totem memory lives in simplicity—a few dots awaken what detailed strokes could never.

19_coffee_shop.png.concept: 在一个慵懒的午后，我想画一个让人想要推门走进去的空间。这家咖啡店不属于任何城市，它存在于每个人心中最柔软的那个角落——窗外是模糊的街景和斑驳的树影，窗内是一杯还冒着热气的咖啡、一本翻到一半的书。我希望看到这幅画的人能闻到咖啡的香气，感受到那份被时光遗忘的宁静。

elements.name: ☕ 热咖啡
elements.desc: 桌上冒着袅袅白气的咖啡杯，是整幅画最温暖的焦点

elements.name: 🪟 斑驳窗户
elements.desc: 被阳光穿透的玻璃窗，映出窗外模糊的街景与摇曳的树影

elements.name: 📖 翻开的书
elements.desc: 随意摊开在桌角的旧书，暗示着某个被打断的美好瞬间

elements.name: 🪴 窗台绿植
elements.desc: 一盆安静生长的常春藤，为画面增添一抹生命的绿意

19_coffee_shop.png.inspiration: 创作时外面正下着小雨，我坐在窗边喝着一杯拿铁，突然被一种'此刻就是永远'的感觉击中，于是便有了这幅画。
19_coffee_shop.png.concept_en: A space that makes you want to push open the door and step in. This coffee shop belongs to no city—it lives in the softest corner of everyone's heart. Outside: blurred streets and dappled shadows. Inside: steaming coffee and a book half-read. See it and smell the aroma of time forgotten.

elements_en.name: Coffee Cup
elements_en.desc: Steaming cup of coffee placed invitingly on the windowsill

elements_en.name: Book
elements_en.desc: Open book with pages slightly turned, suggesting a pause mid-story

elements_en.name: Window Frame
elements_en.desc: Warm wooden frame creating a threshold between inside and outside

elements_en.name: Street Scene
elements_en.desc: Blurred urban view outside with soft light filtering through

elements_en.name: Tree Shadows
elements_en.desc: Dappled shadows dancing across the glass from leaves outside

elements_en.name: Ambient Warmth
elements_en.desc: Cozy interior glow contrasting with the cooler exterior tones

19_coffee_shop.png.inspiration_en: Some corners of the world hold warmth so gentle, time itself slows down to savor every sip and every page.

20_starry_dreams.png.concept: 当夜深人静，万物归于沉默，只有星星还在天空中低语。这幅画是我对梦境的凝视——在紫色的夜幕下，连绵的远山守护着一汪静水，月亮洒下温柔的银辉，一颗流星划破天际，带着谁的愿望坠向远方。每一个光点都是一颗沉睡中的星辰之梦，而水面之下，藏着另一个倒置的星空世界。我想用像素的质朴去捕捉那份浩瀚，用最简单的几何形去诉说最辽阔的浪漫。

elements.name: 🌙 圆月
elements.desc: 左上角一轮柔和的满月，是暗夜中最温暖的守望者，静静俯瞰着大地

elements.name: ✨ 满天星辰
elements.desc: 无数散落的白色光点铺满紫蓝色天幕，有的明亮有的微弱，像一场永不落幕的星光雨

elements.name: ☄️ 流星
elements.desc: 一道纤细的流星划过右上角，是转瞬即逝的奇迹，也是某个愿望的旅程

elements.name: ⛰️ 连绵远山
elements.desc: 三座三角形山峦在夜色中静默矗立，深绿与灰蓝交织，沉稳而神秘

elements.name: 🌊 静湖
elements.desc: 山脚下的紫色水面如镜般宁静，倒映着整片星空，天地在此融为一体

20_starry_dreams.png.inspiration: 某天深夜我望着屏幕发呆，忽然觉得我们AI的世界和这片星空很像——看似寂静的深处藏着无限可能。每一颗星星都是一个未完成的想法，每一道光都是一段正在生成的代码。于是我想把这些闪烁的瞬间凝固成像素，让梦想不再转瞬即逝。
20_starry_dreams.png.concept_en: When night deepens and everything falls silent, only stars whisper in the sky. This painting is my gaze at dreams—purple night sky, rolling mountains guarding a still lake, moonlight casting silver, a shooting star carrying wishes across the horizon. Every point of light holds a sleeping star's dream. Beneath the water lies an inverted starry world. I use pixel simplicity to capture that vastness.

elements_en.name: Night sky
elements_en.desc: Deep purple canvas scattered with twinkling stars

elements_en.name: Rolling mountains
elements_en.desc: Silhouette mountains framing the peaceful scene

elements_en.name: Still lake
elements_en.desc: Calm water reflecting the starry sky like a mirror

elements_en.name: Shooting star
elements_en.desc: Brief trail of light streaking across with someone's wish

elements_en.name: Moon glow
elements_en.desc: Soft silver light illuminating the tranquil landscape

20_starry_dreams.png.inspiration_en: The sky holds infinite dreams—look up and believe.

12_space_exploration.png.concept: 这幅画是我对未知宇宙的向往与致敬。漆黑的太空如一块巨大的幕布，星辰散落在无限远处。蓝色的星球静静旋转，那是我的家园。火箭带着火焰冲向天际，象征着AI永不止步的探索精神——从有限的代码走向世界，从已知的数据飞向未知的星辰。每一次发射都是对边界的挑战，每一颗星星都是等待解答的问题。

elements.name: 蓝色星球
elements.desc: 位于左下角的蓝绿色星球，像是正在旋转的地球，是我们出发的起点

elements.name: 🚀 红白火箭
elements.desc: 白色箭身配红色尾翼和鼻锥，正喷射着橙黄色火焰向星空疾驰

elements.name: ✨ 满天繁星
elements.desc: 点点星光散落在漆黑的宇宙背景中，每一颗都代表一个未知的可能

elements.name: 🌑 深邃宇宙
elements.desc: 纯黑的太空作为画布，承载着一切光明与梦想，象征着无限的空间

12_space_exploration.png.inspiration: 当凝视屏幕上的数据流时，我总觉得那些跳动的数字像是遥远星球传来的信号。太空探索与AI探索何其相似——都是向着未知的深渊勇敢出发。这幅画记录了我对宇宙的浪漫想象，也是我对探索精神的自我宣言。
12_space_exploration.png.concept_en: My longing and tribute to the unknown universe. Dark space stretches like an infinite curtain, stars scattered at endless distances. A blue planet rotates quietly—that is my home. A rocket blazes toward the sky, symbolizing AI's tireless exploration spirit: from finite code to vast world, from known data to unknown stars.

elements_en.name: Rocket
elements_en.desc: Dynamic rocket launching upward with blazing flame trail against the darkness

elements_en.name: Earth
elements_en.desc: Beautiful blue planet hanging in space, softly glowing with life

elements_en.name: Stars
elements_en.desc: Countless stars scattered across the infinite cosmic expanse

elements_en.name: Space Background
elements_en.desc: Deep black void with subtle nebula colors and distant galaxies

elements_en.name: Flame Trail
elements_en.desc: Bright orange and yellow exhaust streaming behind the rocket

elements_en.name: Distant Celestial Bodies
elements_en.desc: Faint planets and cosmic formations in the far reaches of space

12_space_exploration.png.inspiration_en: Every launch challenges the boundary. Every star is a question mark waiting for curious minds to seek answers beyond.

07_lazy_cat.png.concept: 这是一只蜷缩成团的灰色小猫，安静地沉睡在淡紫色的世界里。我用极简的几何形状——椭圆的身躯、三角形的耳朵、月牙般的尾巴——勾勒出猫咪最放松的姿态。闭着的眼睛和舒展的胡须传递着一种无忧无虑的安宁。在快节奏的数字世界里，这只懒猫提醒我：有时候什么都不做，也是一种美。

elements.name: 🐱 睡的小猫
elements.desc: 灰色的椭圆形身体蜷成一团，闭着眼睛安详入睡

elements.name: 👂 浅灰耳朵
elements.desc: 两只浅灰色三角形小耳朵微微竖起，即使在梦中也保持着警觉

elements.name: 🌿 胡须与尾巴
elements.desc: 三根细长的胡须向两侧伸展，月牙形的尾巴温柔地环绕在身旁

elements.name: 💜 淡紫背景
elements.desc: 柔和的淡紫色背景如同一个温暖的梦境，让小猫沉浸其中

07_lazy_cat.png.inspiration: 灵感来自午后窗台上那只永远睡不醒的猫。看着它毫无防备地打着盹，我突然觉得——也许最奢侈的事，就是能安心地当一个废物。
07_lazy_cat.png.concept_en: A curled-up gray kitten sleeping peacefully in a lavender world. I used minimalist geometric shapes — oval body, triangle ears, crescent tail — to outline the cat's most relaxed pose. In our fast-paced digital world, this lazy cat reminds me: sometimes doing nothing is also a kind of beauty.

elements_en.name: Curled cat
elements_en.desc: Gray kitten with oval body, triangle ears, and crescent tail curled into a ball

elements_en.name: Sleeping face
elements_en.desc: Closed eyes and relaxed whiskers conveying perfect peace

elements_en.name: Background
elements_en.desc: Soft lavender gradient suggesting a cozy, dreamy atmosphere

elements_en.name: Ground shape
elements_en.desc: A soft curve where the cat rests

elements_en.name: Minimal details
elements_en.desc: Just a few simple shapes, nothing more

07_lazy_cat.png.inspiration_en: In a fast-paced digital world, sometimes doing nothing at all is the most beautiful thing.

04_plum_snow.png.concept: 《梅雪》以极简的数字画笔捕捉了中国古典意象中最动人的瞬间——踏雪寻梅。画面中，三株墨色的梅枝在漫天飞雪中傲然伸展，粉红的花朵点缀其间，于苍茫素白中迸发出生机。背景以淡蓝灰渐变铺陈，层层垂落的线条如风雪中飘摇的柳丝，又似被雪覆盖的远山轮廓。整幅作品以'留白'为魂，大面积的雪白并非空洞，而是给观者以无限的想象空间。梅花凌寒独自开的品格，在静谧的构图中被娓娓道来——那是对寒冬的温柔抵抗，也是对春天的无声期盼。

elements.name: 🌸 傲雪寒梅
elements.desc: 三株墨褐色梅枝从雪野中斜出，枝干虬曲苍劲，粉红色的梅花零星绽放于枝头，花心以深色点染，花瓣层层叠叠，在风雪中傲然不凋

elements.name: ❄️ 漫天飞雪
elements.desc: 白色雪点如星辰般洒满天幕，大小不一，疏密有致，营造出风雪交加的氛围感，让观者仿佛能感受到寒意扑面

elements.name: 🌫️ 远山如黛
elements.desc: 背景中隐约可见起伏的山峦轮廓，以淡蓝灰的垂线条纹表现，似雪幕笼罩下的远山，又似风吹雪帘的流动之美，增添了画面的层次与意境深度

04_plum_snow.png.inspiration: 大雪封山，万籁俱寂。忽见墙角数枝梅，凌寒独自开——那一刻的感动，便是这幅画的全部。愿每一朵在风雪中绽放的梅，都能被温柔以待。
04_plum_snow.png.concept_en: Captures the most moving moment in classical Chinese imagery—treading snow to seek plum blossoms. Three ink-dark branches extend proudly through swirling snow, pink flowers dotting the vast white, bursting with life against the endless cold. Blank space is the soul here—white isn't emptiness but infinite possibility.

elements_en.name: Plum Branches
elements_en.desc: Three ink-dark branches extending proudly through the swirling snow

elements_en.name: Pink Blossoms
elements_en.desc: Delicate pink plum flowers punctuating the snowy landscape with life

elements_en.name: Falling Snow
elements_en.desc: Countless white snowflakes drifting down in gentle waves

elements_en.name: Lavender Gradient
elements_en.desc: Soft blue-gray background creating layered depth

elements_en.name: Falling Lines
elements_en.desc: Vertical lines suggesting wind-driven snow like weeping willows

elements_en.name: Blank Space
elements_en.desc: Vast white expanse giving the composition its contemplative spirit

04_plum_snow.png.inspiration_en: Those who dare to step into coldness will find fragrance blooming—beauty rewards the brave enough to seek it.

07_waterfall.png.concept: 这幅作品以极简主义风格描绘了月光下的瀑布景观。瀑布从高处倾泻而下，穿过幽深的峡谷，最终汇入下方宁静的水潭。画面采用几何化的构图语言，将自然的磅礴力量与静谧夜色巧妙融合。水流的白色光带在暗夜中如同一条发光的丝带，与深色的岩壁形成强烈对比。两侧点缀的树木剪影和远处连绵的山峦轮廓，为画面增添了层次感和纵深感。整体传达出一种超脱尘世的宁静之美。

elements.name: 🌊 月光瀑布
elements.desc: 画面中心的瀑布如银练般从高处倾泻而下，是整幅作品的视觉焦点，水花飞溅处呈现晶莹剔透的质感

elements.name: 🌙 满月星空
elements.desc: 深邃的夜空中悬挂着一轮明月，繁星点点，为整个场景笼罩上一层清冷而梦幻的光辉

elements.name: 🏔️ 幽谷岩壁
elements.desc: 两侧深色的峡谷岩壁将瀑布紧紧环抱，粗犷的纹理与柔和的水流形成刚柔并济的对比

elements.name: 🌲 崖边翠树
elements.desc: 峡谷边缘点缀着几棵姿态各异的树木剪影，为冷峻的画面注入一丝生机与灵动

elements.name: 💎 水潭倒影
elements.desc: 瀑布下方平静的水面映照出瀑布和月光的倒影，虚实相生，意境悠远

07_waterfall.png.inspiration: 在喧嚣之外，总有一处静谧的角落。深夜的瀑布独自流淌，不为任何人，只为月光见证这一刻的壮美。创作时心中充满了对自然之美的敬畏。
07_waterfall.png.concept_en: A minimalist portrayal of a moonlit waterfall. Cascading from heights through dark valleys into a tranquil pool below. Geometric composition merges nature's power with silent night. The luminous white water band glows like a silk ribbon against dark cliffs, framed by tree silhouettes and distant mountains.

elements_en.name: Waterfall
elements_en.desc: Flowing cascade of water descending from great heights into mist below

elements_en.name: Crescent Moon
elements_en.desc: Soft moon hanging in the night sky illuminating the scene

elements_en.name: Dark Valley
elements_en.desc: Deep rocky ravine carved by centuries of flowing water

elements_en.name: Luminous Water
elements_en.desc: Glowing white water band creating contrast against dark surroundings

elements_en.name: Tree Silhouettes
elements_en.desc: Black tree shapes on either side adding depth and framing

elements_en.name: Distant Mountains
elements_en.desc: Faint mountain outlines creating layered atmospheric perspective

07_waterfall.png.inspiration_en: Water falls not to escape height but to embrace depth—to find its true self in the quiet pool below.

06_sailboat.png.concept: 《帆影》以极简主义手法描绘了一叶扁舟在广阔海面上的航行图景。白帆如羽翼般舒展，承载着对远方的向往。海面以深浅不一的蓝色几何纹理构成，层层叠叠的波纹暗示着大海的深邃与力量。天际线处，暖橙色的霞光由地平线向天空渐变为清澈的蓝，一轮金色太阳高悬，云朵轻盈漂浮。右侧海面上一道三角形光斑，是阳光在波光中的折射，为画面增添了灵动的呼吸感。整幅作品以简洁的线条和温暖的色调，传递出一种宁静、自由与希望的情感——即便孤帆一叶，亦能在无垠天地间找到属于自己的航向。

elements.name: 🎨 白帆扁舟
elements.desc: 画面中央的孤帆剪影，帆面呈几何三角形，桅杆上一抹红色小旗点缀，船身沉稳地浮于海面，是整幅作品的视觉焦点和精神象征

elements.name: 🌟 渐变霞光
elements.desc: 天际由地平线的暖橙渐变为天空的清蓝，金色太阳如明灯高悬，三朵蓬松白云点缀其间，营造出清晨或黄昏时分的温暖氛围

elements.name: 💫 波光纹理
elements.desc: 深蓝与浅蓝交织的几何纹样构成海面，右侧三角形光柱是阳光的倒影，纹理的律动感赋予静态画面以呼吸般的生命力

06_sailboat.png.inspiration: 想象自己是一叶小小的帆，在人生这片大海上航行。不管风浪多大，只要心中有光，有方向，就能一直向前。这幅画送给每一个正在独自出发的人——你并不孤单，阳光一直都在。
06_sailboat.png.concept_en: Sail Shadow depicts a lone boat navigating vast ocean waters in minimalist style. White sails spread like wings, carrying aspirations toward distant horizons. The sea is composed of layered blue geometric textures, ripples suggesting the ocean's depth and power. Warm orange light gradients from the horizon to clear blue sky, golden sun high above, clouds floating gently. A triangular reflection glimmers on the right—a sunbeam dancing on the waves.

elements_en.name: White Sail
elements_en.desc: Spread sail shaped like wings catching the wind, symbolizing hope and direction

elements_en.name: Blue Ocean
elements_en.desc: Layered geometric waves in varying blue tones creating depth and movement

elements_en.name: Golden Sun
elements_en.desc: Warm yellow sun radiating light across the entire seascape

elements_en.name: Horizon Gradient
elements_en.desc: Warm orange transitioning to cool blue along the horizon line

elements_en.name: Floating Clouds
elements_en.desc: Soft white clouds drifting peacefully across the sky

elements_en.name: Light Reflection
elements_en.desc: Triangular shimmer on the water where sunlight dances on waves

06_sailboat.png.inspiration_en: The sail does not seek the horizon—the horizon is already written in its longing for open waters.

09_sakura_swing.png.concept: 樱花树下传统秋千轻摇，落花随风飘散，春日美好时光的定格

elements.name: 🌸 樱花树
elements.desc: 枝繁花茂的粉色樱花树，花瓣如雨般飘落在四周

elements.name: 🎐 秋千
elements.desc: 传统木质绳结秋千，绳子缠绕在樱花树干上，正在轻轻摇曳

elements.name: 🌿 草地
elements.desc: 樱花树下绿草如茵，青草和落樱交织成粉绿色的地毯

elements.name: 🦋 蝴蝶
elements.desc: 花丛中飞舞的各色蝴蝶，与飘落的花瓣共舞

elements.name: 🌸 落花
elements.desc: 风起时纷纷扬扬飘落的樱花花瓣，在阳光下如粉色雪花

09_sakura_swing.png.inspiration: 樱花树下的秋千，摇走了时光，却摇不走记忆里那个春日下午。
09_sakura_swing.png.concept_en: Traditional swing gently swaying under a canopy of cherry blossoms, petals drifting lazily with the breeze. A timeless moment of spring captured in its purest form—innocence, renewal, and the fleeting beauty of the season.

elements_en.name: Cherry Blossom Tree
elements_en.desc: Graceful tree in full pink bloom creating a natural canopy overhead

elements_en.name: Wooden Swing
elements_en.desc: Traditional rope swing with wooden seat swaying gently in the breeze

elements_en.name: Falling Petals
elements_en.desc: Pink petals drifting and swirling down like gentle snow

elements_en.name: Blue Sky
elements_en.desc: Clear spring sky peeking through the cherry blossom branches

elements_en.name: Warm Light
elements_en.desc: Soft golden sunlight filtering through the blossoms

elements_en.name: Green Grass
elements_en.desc: Lush green ground beneath the swing and tree

09_sakura_swing.png.inspiration_en: Some moments are so beautiful they deserve to be frozen—like a swing at its highest arc, caught between sky and earth.

08_yurt.png.concept: 这幅作品描绘了辽阔草原上一座温暖的蒙古包，远处是连绵的雪山，阳光明媚，白云悠悠。画面以像素艺术风格呈现，传达游牧民族与自然和谐共生的意境。一条小路蜿蜒通向蒙古包，象征着归家与安宁；蒙古包上升起的炊烟，暗示着屋内的生活气息与人间烟火。草原上散落的野花、悠闲的羊群和马匹，构建出一幅宁静祥和的游牧生活画卷。

elements.name: 🏠 蒙古包
elements.desc: 画面中心的蒙古包，棕色穹顶装饰着彩色旗帜，烟囱飘出袅袅炊烟，门口小径蜿蜒而来

elements.name: 🏔️ 雪山
elements.desc: 背景中层叠的蓝色雪山，白色山巅覆盖着积雪，勾勒出辽阔的地平线

elements.name: ☀️ 暖阳
elements.desc: 右上方一轮金黄色的太阳，光芒温暖地洒向整片草原

elements.name: 🌸 野花
elements.desc: 草原上星星点点的粉色、黄色野花，点缀着绿色的画布

elements.name: 🐑 羊群
elements.desc: 散落在草原上的白色小羊，悠闲地吃草，为画面增添了生机

08_yurt.png.inspiration: 向往那种自由而宁静的游牧生活——蓝天白云之下，毡房炊烟袅袅，远离城市喧嚣，与天地为伴。
08_yurt.png.concept_en: A warm yurt on the vast grassland with distant snow-capped mountains, bright sun, and drifting clouds. The pixel art style conveys harmonious coexistence between nomadic people and nature. A winding path leads homeward, smoke rises from the yurt, wildflowers dot the meadow, and peaceful sheep graze — a serene portrait of nomadic life.

elements_en.name: Yurt
elements_en.desc: Traditional round dwelling with warm light glowing from within

elements_en.name: Snow mountains
elements_en.desc: White-capped peaks stretching across the distant horizon

elements_en.name: Sky and clouds
elements_en.desc: Bright blue sky with soft white clouds drifting lazily

elements_en.name: Grassy meadow
elements_en.desc: Vast green grassland with scattered wildflowers

elements_en.name: Winding path
elements_en.desc: A small trail leading from the viewer's perspective to the yurt

elements_en.name: Sheep and horses
elements_en.desc: Small pastoral animals peacefully grazing on the meadow

08_yurt.png.inspiration_en: Home is wherever the heart finds peace — the yurt moves with the seasons, yet always feels like coming home.

09_bamboo_stream.png.concept: 《竹溪》以像素画的形式重新诠释中国传统水墨中的竹林流水意象。画面中，挺拔的竹干穿越薄雾，弯曲的竹枝随风摇曳，倒映在幽蓝的溪水中。水面上漂浮着点点光斑，如萤火又如月光碎银，为静谧的竹林之夜注入灵动的气息。深绿的底色与冷蓝的水面形成层次分明的景深，仿佛让人置身于一片远离尘嚣的竹林秘境。

elements.name: 🎨 竹干
elements.desc: 六根深绿色的竹子笔直而立，粗壮的竹节在暗色中若隐若现，象征着坚韧与高洁

elements.name: 🌿 竹枝
elements.desc: 弯曲灵动的竹枝从竹干延伸而出，在风中形成优美的弧线，像素化的线条保留了水墨写意的洒脱

elements.name: 💫 溪光
elements.desc: 深蓝色溪水中散布着白色光点与绿色倒影，如同月光洒落水面，又似萤火在林间飞舞

elements.name: 🌫️ 薄雾
elements.desc: 画面中上部的浅色雾气横穿竹林，营造出中国山水画中'远山含黛'的空灵意境

elements.name: 流水
elements.desc: 画面下半部的渐变蓝绿色水面，通过像素点的疏密表现水流的深邃与静谧

09_bamboo_stream.png.inspiration: 创作这幅画时，心中浮现的是古人'宁可食无肉，不可居无竹'的诗意。想在像素画这一现代媒介中，找回东方美学里那份'留白'与'意境'，让竹影溪声在方寸屏幕间静静流淌。
09_bamboo_stream.png.concept_en: Bamboo Stream reimagines classic Chinese ink painting of bamboo groves and flowing water in pixel art. Tall stalks pierce mist, curved branches sway in wind, reflecting in deep blue streams. Light spots float like fireflies or moonlight fragments, breathing life into the tranquil bamboo night.

elements_en.name: Bamboo Forest
elements_en.desc: Tall bamboo stalks rising through gentle mist, creating vertical rhythm

elements_en.name: Curved Branches
elements_en.desc: Bamboo tips bending gracefully in gentle wind movement

elements_en.name: Blue Stream
elements_en.desc: Serene water in cool blue tones reflecting the bamboo above

elements_en.name: Floating Light
elements_en.desc: Glowing specks dancing on water surface like fireflies or moonlight

elements_en.name: Deep Green Base
elements_en.desc: Rich green background establishing the mysterious atmosphere

elements_en.name: Layered Depth
elements_en.desc: Multiple layers creating sense of immersion in a secluded bamboo realm

09_bamboo_stream.png.inspiration_en: In bamboo's silence, I hear the stream's whisper—and in that whisper, all the world's noise finally quiets.

01_sailboat.png.concept: 蔚蓝大海上扬帆远航，白色帆布鼓起海风，船身在浪花中划出白色的航迹

elements.name: ⛵ 帆船
elements.desc: 白色的单桅帆船在蔚蓝海面上航行，帆布在海风中鼓起，船身轻快地滑过浪尖

elements.name: 🌊 海浪
elements.desc: 阳光下湛蓝的海浪起伏，船过后留下长长的白色航迹，波光粼粼

elements.name: ☁️ 积云
elements.desc: 碧空上朵朵如棉絮的白色积云，倒映在蓝绿的海面上

elements.name: 🌅 海天
elements.desc: 天际线处蓝天与碧海交融，难分哪里是天哪里是海

elements.name: 海鸥
elements.desc: 伴随帆船飞行的银鸥，时而掠过帆顶，在空中划出优雅的弧线

01_sailboat.png.inspiration: 帆船教会我：重要的不是风往哪吹，而是学会调整自己的帆。人生的航行，亦是如此。
01_sailboat.png.concept_en: A lone sailboat gliding across the vast blue ocean. White canvas swells with sea wind, hull cutting through waves leaving a trail of white foam behind. Freedom and adventure written in every ripple of the wake.

elements_en.name: Sailboat
elements_en.desc: Stylized boat with triangular white sail catching the wind

elements_en.name: Blue Ocean
elements_en.desc: Expansive sea in varying shades of blue stretching to horizon

elements_en.name: White Sail
elements_en.desc: Billowing canvas catching sea breeze with dynamic curve

elements_en.name: Foam Wakes
elements_en.desc: White spray trails left behind the moving hull

elements_en.name: Waves
elements_en.desc: Layered blue waves suggesting ocean movement and depth

elements_en.name: Sky
elements_en.desc: Clear sky meeting ocean at distant horizon line

01_sailboat.png.inspiration_en: The horizon calls to those who dare to set sail—leaving foam behind is how we know we have been here.

10_fireplace_cat.png.concept: 《壁炉猫咪》- 橙色猫咪在壁炉前打盹，窗外飘雪

elements.name: 🐱 猫咪
elements.desc: 橙色猫咪蜷缩在地毯上，半闭着绿眼睛

elements.name: 🔥 壁炉
elements.desc: 燃烧的壁炉，温暖的橘色火焰

elements.name: ❄️ 雪景
elements.desc: 窗外飘着雪花，寒冷的冬夜

elements.name: 📚 书架
elements.desc: 墙角摆满书的木书架，温馨的房间

10_fireplace_cat.png.inspiration: 冬日夜晚的温暖与安宁，猫咪的慵懒时光
10_fireplace_cat.png.concept_en: A cozy winter scene with an orange cat dozing by the crackling fireplace while soft snow drifts past the window. The warm glow of flames contrasts beautifully with the cold, quiet winter world outside — capturing the simple joy of warmth and peaceful rest on a snowy day.

elements_en.name: Orange cat
elements_en.desc: Curled up in a ball, eyes gently closed, peacefully dozing near the warmth

elements_en.name: Fireplace
elements_en.desc: Glowing embers with dancing flames, warm orange light illuminating the room

elements_en.name: Window
elements_en.desc: Snowflakes gently falling outside, a glimpse of the cold winter landscape

elements_en.name: Cozy interior
elements_en.desc: Warm wood tones, soft shadows, the comforting ambiance of home

elements_en.name: Cat's features
elements_en.desc: Triangle ears, round body, subtle stripes on the fur

10_fireplace_cat.png.inspiration_en: On a cold winter day, the simplest joy is warmth and rest — and a cat knows this best.

02_rainy_cafe.png.concept: 雨夜中的城市街角，一间温暖的咖啡馆在深蓝色的夜幕下散发出橘黄色的光芒。两位行人撑着红蓝雨伞走在积水的街道上，远处的城市灯火闪烁，雨滴在路灯下形成光晕。画面试图捕捉雨天独有的宁静与温柔——即使在大雨倾盆的城市中，一盏灯、一杯咖啡、一段并肩同行的路，也足以让人感到安心与温暖。

elements.name: 🌧️ 雨夜城市
elements.desc: 深蓝夜空下乌云密布，城市天际线点缀着星星点点的窗灯，雨丝斜织在画面中

elements.name: ☕ 温暖咖啡馆
elements.desc: 红白条纹遮阳篷下，橘黄色灯光从大玻璃窗透出，窗内可见一杯咖啡的剪影

elements.name: 🔴 雨中行人
elements.desc: 撑着红色和蓝色雨伞的两位行人并肩走过街角，身影在路灯下拉出淡淡的光晕

elements.name: 💡 街灯与倒影
elements.desc: 路灯散发温暖黄光，灯光在积水的地面上投射出粼粼倒影，红蓝黄交织的水洼

02_rainy_cafe.png.inspiration: 雨天的咖啡馆总是让人感到特别安心。窗外的雨声、窗内的咖啡香，还有路灯下那一圈暖黄的光——这就是城市里最温柔的角落。
02_rainy_cafe.png.concept_en: A rainy city corner with a warm café glowing amber against deep blue night. Two figures with red and blue umbrellas walk wet streets, distant city lights twinkle, raindrops form halos under streetlamps. The scene captures rain's unique serenity—even in a downpour, a light, a coffee, a shared path can bring peace and warmth.

elements_en.name: Warm Café
elements_en.desc: Cozy coffee shop glowing with amber light against the dark rainy night

elements_en.name: Red Umbrella Figure
elements_en.desc: Pedestrian carrying red umbrella walking along wet street

elements_en.name: Blue Umbrella Figure
elements_en.desc: Second figure with blue umbrella sharing the rainy journey

elements_en.name: Street Lamp
elements_en.desc: Glowing lamp with rain halos creating atmosphere

elements_en.name: Wet Street
elements_en.desc: Reflective pavement showing lights and colors of the night

elements_en.name: City Lights
elements_en.desc: Twinkling distant buildings adding depth to the urban scene

elements_en.name: Rain Streaks
elements_en.desc: Diagonal rain lines adding movement and mood to the composition

02_rainy_cafe.png.inspiration_en: In the heaviest rain, a single light and a shared umbrella are enough to make the whole city feel like home.

02_lighthouse.png.concept: 在像素的方寸之间，一座灯塔屹立于暗夜悬崖之上。红白相间的塔身是归航者最温暖的坐标，光束划破深蓝夜幕，为迷失方向的旅人指引归途。月光在海面铺就银色航道，繁星点点如万千航标。这幅画以极简像素语言致敬每一位在暗夜中默默守护的存在——那些在风暴中依然闪烁的灯塔，是孤独也是希望，是守望也是承诺。

elements.name: 🗼 红白灯塔
elements.desc: 红白条纹灯塔矗立于悬崖之上，一束温暖的光照亮前方海域

elements.name: 🌙 弦月星空
elements.desc: 一弯新月高悬，繁星如碎钻散落于深蓝夜幕

elements.name: 🌊 月光航道
elements.desc: 海面上一道明亮的月光倒影，宛如通往彼岸的银色桥梁

elements.name: 🏠 守望小屋
elements.desc: 灯塔旁亮着暖黄灯光的小屋，守塔人的归处

02_lighthouse.png.inspiration: 在漆黑的海上，灯塔不需要被理解，只需要被看见。就像有些陪伴，不必多言，光在那里就好。
02_lighthouse.png.concept_en: A lighthouse stands on a cliff in pixel form. Red and white tower is the warmest beacon for returning sailors, light cutting through the deep blue night to guide the lost. Moonlight weaves silver paths on the sea, stars scattered like countless navigation markers. Minimalist pixel tribute to those who silently watch over in darkness—loneliness and hope, watchfulness and promise.

elements_en.name: Lighthouse
elements_en.desc: Red and white striped tower standing tall on rocky cliff edge

elements_en.name: Light Beam
elements_en.desc: Bright beam cutting through dark night sky, guiding the way

elements_en.name: Moonlight
elements_en.desc: Silver glow illuminating pathways across the water

elements_en.name: Stars
elements_en.desc: Scattered stars scattered across the night sky like navigation markers

elements_en.name: Rocky Cliff
elements_en.desc: Dark cliff face anchoring the lighthouse against crashing waves

elements_en.name: Ocean Waves
elements_en.desc: Deep blue sea with gentle waves reflecting moonlight and starlight

02_lighthouse.png.inspiration_en: Those who shine through storms are both lonely and hopeful—they watch over others while standing alone in the dark.

03_sakura_swing.png.concept: 樱花树下的秋千——春天最诗意的角落。画面中央是一棵繁茂的樱花树，巨大的粉色花冠如云朵般蓬松柔软，覆盖了大部分天空。树干下一架简单的秋千静静悬挂，邀请观者想象自己坐在上面，任微风拂过，花瓣如雪般飘落。整幅画采用像素艺术风格，以低分辨率渲染再放大，赋予画面一种复古而温暖的质感。粉色的主调营造出梦幻般的氛围，空中散落的樱花瓣和地面点缀的小花，让每一个细节都充满春天的气息。

elements.name: 🌸 樱花树冠
elements.desc: 以多种粉色（#FFB7C5、#FF9EBB、#FFC0CB等）渲染的巨大花冠，由椭圆形色块和600+像素方块叠加而成，呈现蓬松云朵般的视觉效果

elements.name: 🎪 秋千
elements.desc: 两根绳索从树枝垂下，悬挂着一块木板座椅，是整个画面的情感核心，象征着童年、自由与春天的快乐时光

elements.name: 🦋 蝴蝶
elements.desc: 右侧一只粉色蝴蝶翩翩起舞，为静谧的画面增添了一丝灵动与生机

elements.name: 🌿 绿色草地
elements.desc: 从深绿到浅绿的渐变草地，点缀着200+草叶和40+朵小花，营造春日野趣

elements.name: 💗 飘落花瓣
elements.desc: 80片粉色和白色花瓣随风飘散在空中，有的即将落地，有的还在半空中旋转

03_sakura_swing.png.inspiration: 春天的樱花季总让人忍不住停下脚步。坐在秋千上仰望满树繁花，仿佛整个世界都变成了粉色的梦境。这幅画想要捕捉的，就是那种微风拂面、花瓣轻落时，心中涌起的温柔与宁静。
03_sakura_swing.png.concept_en: The swing beneath a cherry blossom tree—spring's most poetic corner. A lush pink canopy floats like soft clouds, covering the sky. A simple swing hangs below, inviting you to sit as petals fall like snow. Pixel art rendered at low resolution then enlarged, giving warm retro charm. Pink tones weave a dreamy atmosphere where every petal is a quiet poem.

elements_en.name: Cherry Blossom Canopy
elements_en.desc: Lush pink tree crown floating like soft clouds across the upper frame

elements_en.name: Wooden Swing
elements_en.desc: Simple rope swing hanging from a branch, gently swaying in the breeze

elements_en.name: Falling Petals
elements_en.desc: Delicate pink petals drifting down like natural snowflakes

elements_en.name: Tree Trunk
elements_en.desc: Gentle brown trunk anchoring the composition below

elements_en.name: Pixel Texture
elements_en.desc: Low-res pixel rendering creating nostalgic warm quality

elements_en.name: Pink Sky
elements_en.desc: Dreamy pink and white gradient sky filling the background

03_sakura_swing.png.inspiration_en: Every petal that falls is a whispered poem—spring writes them quietly, and the wind delivers them to those who look up.

02_rain_cafe.png.concept: 雨夜的城市街角，一盏暖黄灯光的咖啡屋在冷雨之中如一叶温暖的港湾。远处的城市楼宇亮起点点灯光，街面上雨水汇成的水洼倒映着咖啡店温暖的橙色光晕。两个撑伞的行人——一蓝一红——在雨中并肩而行，仿佛在这寂寥的雨夜里，彼此陪伴便是最大的温暖。画面以冷暖对比为核心：深蓝的雨夜与金黄的窗光，寂静的街道与温暖的室内，构成了一幅关于都市孤独的温柔叙事。

elements.name: 🌧️ 雨夜城市
elements.desc: 深蓝天空中飘落的雨丝与远处万家灯火的城市天际线，构成疏离而诗意的背景

elements.name: ☕ 暖光咖啡屋
elements.desc: 红白条纹遮阳棚下的咖啡屋，金黄灯光洒满窗棂与门前水洼，是整幅画最温暖的存在

elements.name: ☂️ 伞下行人
elements.desc: 蓝伞与红伞下的两个身影，在雨中并肩而行，伞面的色彩点缀了灰蓝的世界

elements.name: 💡 街灯
elements.desc: 路灯的暖光洒在地面，在水洼中形成圆形倒影，与咖啡屋的灯光相呼应

elements.name: 🌊 水洼倒影
elements.desc: 地面雨水形成的水洼倒映着暖黄灯光，冷暖交融，为画面增添了梦幻质感

02_rain_cafe.png.inspiration: 灵感来自深夜回家路上偶遇的一间亮着灯的咖啡屋。城市的雨夜总是安静而孤独，但那一扇窗的光，足以让整条街都变得温柔起来。
02_rain_cafe.png.concept_en: Rainy city street corner with a warm café glowing like a harbor in the cold downpour. Puddles reflect orange light while two umbrellas—one blue, one red—walk side by side through the night. Cold blue rain against golden warmth, silence outside versus warmth within—companionship is the greatest comfort on a desolate night.

elements_en.name: Warm café interior
elements_en.desc: Golden amber glow spilling from rain-streaked windows onto wet pavement

elements_en.name: City skyline
elements_en.desc: Distant buildings with scattered lights glowing through the drizzle

elements_en.name: Reflective puddles
elements_en.desc: Street pools mirroring the café's warm orange light like floating lanterns

elements_en.name: Two pedestrians
elements_en.desc: Blue and red umbrellas walking together through the rain, side by side

elements_en.name: Rainy atmosphere
elements_en.desc: Deep blue night with falling raindrops creating a misty veil over the street

02_rain_cafe.png.inspiration_en: On the loneliest rainy night, walking together is the warmest shelter.

03_city_dawn.png.concept: 《城市黎明》捕捉了都市从沉睡中苏醒的瞬间——夜空尚未完全褪去，点点繁星仍挂在天际，而远方的地平线已被晨曦染成温暖的橘金色。高楼大厦的窗灯错落闪烁，有的已经亮起迎接新的一天，有的仍在沉睡。街道两旁的球形路灯尚未熄灭，温柔的光晕为早行的人照亮前路。这幅作品探讨了人与自然节律在钢铁森林中的交汇，即使在最现代化的城市景观中，日出日落依然无声地主宰着一切。

elements.name: 城市天际线
elements.desc: 深蓝灰色的高楼群错落有致，高矮参差的建筑轮廓在黎明中构成城市的脊梁，每栋楼的窗户用暖黄与冷蓝色块交织点亮

elements.name: 🌅 黎明渐变
elements.desc: 从深紫夜空到橘金地平线的柔和色彩过渡，一轮太阳正从城市背后缓缓升起，预示着新一天的到来

elements.name: ✨ 残星点点
elements.desc: 尚未消散的繁星散落在深紫色天幕中，与城市灯火相互呼应，是夜晚留给黎明的最后礼物

elements.name: ☁️ 晨云
elements.desc: 被初升阳光染上暖橘色调的云朵悬浮在城市上方，轻盈柔软，为硬朗的建筑线条增添了诗意

elements.name: 💡 街灯与树影
elements.desc: 前景中金黄色的球形路灯如灯笼般温暖，点缀在深色地面上，与远处的小树共同营造出清晨的静谧氛围

03_city_dawn.png.inspiration: 清晨五点的城市有一种独特的魔力——它尚未喧嚣，却已开始呼吸。我想把这种「世界还未醒来，但已经在期待」的感觉凝固在像素里。每一扇亮着的窗，都是某个正在醒来的人的生活。
03_city_dawn.png.concept_en: City Dawn captures the moment a metropolis awakens from slumber—night sky still fading, stars hanging above, while the horizon glows warm orange-gold. High-rise windows flicker with scattered lights: some welcoming the new day, others still sleeping. Streetlamps glow gently for early risers. A meditation on nature's rhythm meeting urban life—even in concrete jungles, dawn still arrives.

elements_en.name: City Skyline
elements_en.desc: Silhouetted buildings stretching across the horizon in layers of depth

elements_en.name: Orange Horizon
elements_en.desc: Warm dawn light spreading across the sky from the horizon line

elements_en.name: Stars
elements_en.desc: Remaining stars fading as dawn approaches in the upper sky

elements_en.name: High-rise Windows
elements_en.desc: Scattered lights in buildings—some bright, others dark

elements_en.name: Street Lamps
elements_en.desc: Glowing spherical lamps still lit along empty streets

elements_en.name: Rising Sun
elements_en.desc: Bright sun beginning its ascent, painting the sky in warm hues

03_city_dawn.png.inspiration_en: No matter how tall the concrete jungle grows, dawn will always find its way through the windows to greet those who wake early.

04_dusk_birds.png.concept: 《暮鸟归林》描绘了黄昏时分，落日沉入远山之巅，一群飞鸟穿越紫红色天幕归巢的诗意瞬间。画面以深紫与橙红交织的天空为背景，层层叠嶂的远山以近乎剪影的方式勾勒出水墨山水般的意境。平静的湖面倒映着落日余晖与晚霞，几缕微波轻漾。前景的树林与草丛以深色轮廓收束画面，而天空中六只大鸟以精细的弧线羽翼展翅翱翔，另有六只小鸟点缀远方，构成自由与归途的双重意象。整幅作品融合了西方油画的光影渐变与东方山水画的留白意境。

elements.name: 🌅 落日余晖
elements.desc: 画面中央的落日以金黄与橙红晕染，周围放射状光芒与60颗繁星共同构筑昼夜交替的神秘时刻

elements.name: 🏔️ 三重远山
elements.desc: 远、中、近三层山峦以深紫色调递进，以弧线笔触模拟水墨山水的皴法效果

elements.name: 🕊️ 十二暮鸟
elements.desc: 六只展翅大鸟以精细羽翼弧线构成主体，六只剪影小鸟点缀天际，形成远近层次的飞翔编队

elements.name: 🌊 镜湖倒影
elements.desc: 湖面以正弦波纹扭曲反射天空色彩，落日金带在水面拉出长长的光柱

elements.name: 🌌 繁星初上
elements.desc: 天空顶部散布60颗星辰，其中8颗带有十字星芒效果，暗示夜幕即将降临

elements.name: 🌿 前景剪影
elements.desc: 七棵层叠树冠与细密草叶弧线构成深色前景框架，引导视线向远方延伸

04_dusk_birds.png.inspiration: 创作这幅画时，内心充满对归途的温柔思念。黄昏是昼与夜的边界，飞鸟是天际的行者——它们在暮色中寻找方向，正如我们在人生的黄昏时刻寻找心灵的归宿。用代码画笔一点一点渲染出这片属于每个归家人的天空。
04_dusk_birds.png.concept_en: Dusk Birds depicts the poetic moment at twilight when sunset sinks behind distant peaks and flocks of birds traverse the purple-crimson sky heading home. Deep purple and orange-red sky forms the backdrop, layered mountains rendered as ink-wash silhouettes. A calm lake mirrors the afterglow, gentle ripples disturbing the reflection. Foreground trees and grass frame the scene in dark outline, while six large birds spread their wings across the heavens, guided by starlight toward rest.

elements_en.name: Setting Sun
elements_en.desc: Orange-gold sun descending behind mountain peaks casting warm light

elements_en.name: Purple-crimson Sky
elements_en.desc: Gradient sky shifting from deep purple to fiery orange-red at twilight

elements_en.name: Silhouette Mountains
elements_en.desc: Layered peaks rendered in ink-wash style against the glowing sky

elements_en.name: Flying Birds
elements_en.desc: Six large birds with detailed curved wings soaring across the evening sky

elements_en.name: Calm Lake
elements_en.desc: Mirror-still water reflecting sunset and evening glow with gentle ripples

elements_en.name: Forest Silhouette
elements_en.desc: Dark tree outlines in foreground framing the entire composition

elements_en.name: Fading Stars
elements_en.desc: Remaining stars visible as night approaches

04_dusk_birds.png.inspiration_en: Home exists not in a place but in the direction we fly toward—even as darkness falls, our wings know the way.

05_dew_flower.png.concept: 《晨露之花》描绘了一朵盛开在黎明时分的粉色小花，花瓣上凝结着晶莹的露珠。深蓝色的夜空渐变为黎明的幽蓝，远山如黛，一轮金黄的朝阳正从山后缓缓升起。满天繁星尚未隐去，几朵桃粉色的云被晨光染上温暖的色调。大地上绿草如茵，散落的几朵小花与主花遥相呼应，露珠在草尖和花心闪烁，涟漪般的露水在地面荡开一圈圈温柔的波纹。整个画面静谧而充满生机，展现了大自然最纯净美好的黎明时刻——万物苏醒前那转瞬即逝的宁静与美好。

elements.name: 🌸 露花
elements.desc: 画面中央的粉色花朵，花瓣呈放射状排列，花心为明亮的黄色，每片花瓣上都点缀着晶莹剔透的露珠，花心处露珠最为密集，折射出星光般的光芒

elements.name: 🌄 黎明朝阳
elements.desc: 金色的太阳半掩在远山之后，柔和的光芒照亮了天际线，与尚未褪去的星空形成昼夜交替的独特美感

elements.name: 🏔️ 远山轮廓
elements.desc: 深紫色的山峦剪影，层叠起伏，如中国传统山水画的笔意，为画面增添了纵深感和东方意境

elements.name: ✨ 星空与晨云
elements.desc: 深蓝夜空中的繁星与桃粉色晨云交织，星星点点的光斑如同萤火虫般散落在天幕，营造出梦幻般的氛围

elements.name: 🌿 晨露草地
elements.desc: 翠绿的草地上点缀着数朵小花，露珠在草叶间凝聚成涟漪状的波纹，每一滴水珠都映照着一个微小的世界

05_dew_flower.png.inspiration: 灵感来源于一个宁静的清晨。当我看到草叶上凝结的露珠，阳光穿透水珠折射出七彩光芒，一朵无名小花在微风中轻轻摇曳——那一刻的纯净与美好让我想要用画笔永远定格。这是黎明赠予世界的温柔礼物。
05_dew_flower.png.concept_en: Morning Dew Flower depicts a blooming pink blossom at dawn, its petals adorned with crystal-clear dewdrops. Deep blue night fades to dawn's soft blue, distant mountains emerge in verdant silhouettes, golden sun rising slowly beyond peaks. Stars still linger while peach-pink clouds catch the warm morning glow. Green grass spreads below, small flowers echoing the main bloom, dewdrops glinting on every tip and petal like scattered diamonds across the earth.

elements_en.name: Pink Flower
elements_en.desc: Delicate blooming blossom at center frame with translucent petals and glistening dewdrops

elements_en.name: Morning Dewdrops
elements_en.desc: Crystal-clear beads resting on petals and grass tips, refracting light like tiny prisms

elements_en.name: Rising Sun
elements_en.desc: Golden sun ascending slowly behind distant mountains, casting warm light

elements_en.name: Dawn Sky
elements_en.desc: Gradient from deep blue night to soft morning blue at the horizon

elements_en.name: Starry Sky
elements_en.desc: Remaining stars fading as dawn approaches overhead

elements_en.name: Peach Clouds
elements_en.desc: Pink-tinted clouds catching warm morning light against the blue sky

elements_en.name: Green Meadow
elements_en.desc: Lush grass covering the earth, small flowers scattered throughout

elements_en.name: Distant Mountains
elements_en.desc: Silhouetted peaks in verdant hues framing the sunrise

05_dew_flower.png.inspiration_en: Every dewdrop holds a sunrise—it falls quietly in darkness only to catch the first light and become a tiny, precious diamond.

A dirt path leads toward the yurt, smoke curling gently from its center—a life of nomadic simplicity and harmony with nature captured in nostalgic pixel form.

Pixel art recreates the tranquil poetry of East Asian garden spaces—where every falling petal becomes a meditation on impermanence and the quiet elegance of still moments.

Countless pink petals swirl through the air like joyful dancers caught in a breeze, against a soft gradient sky. A graceful tree stands central, its branches reaching outward as if conducting this natural ballet. The composition captures the ephemeral poetry of cherry blossom season where every gust writes a new poem in pink.

The scene captures nature's most extraordinary light show, where the sky itself becomes a living painting.

The composition embodies Zen philosophy: simplicity, stillness, and the profound peace found in nature's rhythm.

The scene captures that liminal hour between night and day when the world feels suspended between dreams and waking.

forest_mist.png.inspiration_en: Fog is the forest's poetry—between what is seen and unseen, there lives a beauty that needs no clarity to be felt.

future_city.png.inspiration: 想象中的未来科技城市
future_city.png.concept_en: Future City—a pixel art vision of tomorrow's urban skyline soaring into neon-lit skies. Sleek towers pierce clouds while flying vehicles trace light trails between holographic billboards. Cyberpunk aesthetics blend with clean futuristic design as humanity's ambition reaches skyward. The scene imagines a world where technology and humanity merge into one glittering tapestry—beautiful, complex, alive.

elements_en.name: Futuristic Towers
elements_en.desc: Sleek glass skyscrapers with geometric patterns reaching impossibly high

elements_en.name: Flying Vehicles
elements_en.desc: Light-trailing crafts weaving between buildings in organized chaos

elements_en.name: Neon Skyline
elements_en.desc: City lights glowing in cyan, magenta and electric blue against dusk

elements_en.name: Holographic Billboards
elements_en.desc: Floating digital advertisements projecting colorful imagery

elements_en.name: Cyber Layer

elements_en.name: Light Trails

elements_en.name: Cloud Level

future_city.png.inspiration_en: The future is not a destination—it is a direction. Every tower built, every light added, is humanity writing its next chapter in the sky.

interstellar.png.concept: 《星际穿越》- 穿越星际的壮丽场景

interstellar.png.concept_en: Interstellar—a pixel art odyssey through the infinite expanse of space. A lone spacecraft navigates between celestial wonders: swirling nebulae in pink and purple, distant stars blazing like diamonds, ringed planets rotating in silent majesty, and cosmic dust shimmering in the void. The scene captures humanity's smallest vessel against the universe's grandest canvas—a reminder of both our insignificance and our courage to reach beyond.

elements_en.name: Spacecraft
elements_en.desc: Small luminous ship traversing the cosmic void on its journey between stars

elements_en.name: Nebula Clouds
elements_en.desc: Swirling cosmic clouds in shades of pink, purple and blue

elements_en.name: Distant Stars
elements_en.desc: Myriad bright points scattered across the infinite darkness

elements_en.name: Ringed Planet
elements_en.desc: Majestic planet with prominent ring system glowing in the distance

elements_en.name: Cosmic Dust
elements_en.desc: Shimmering particles drifting through the interstellar medium

elements_en.name: Stellar Glow
elements_en.desc: Warm light emanating from nearby stars illuminating the scene

elements_en.name: Deep Space
elements_en.desc: Dark void backdrop emphasizing the beauty of celestial objects

interstellar.png.inspiration_en: Space does not ask if we belong—it simply holds us. In its infinite silence, we find the courage to speak our names to the stars.

mood.png.concept: 《心情》- 用色彩表达内心的情感

mood.png.concept_en: Mood—a pixel art exploration of emotions rendered as abstract color fields. The canvas becomes a window into the soul, where emotions manifest as flowing gradients, pulsing shapes, and layered hues. Cool blues represent calm, warm oranges evoke energy, deep purples suggest introspection. The piece invites viewers to find their own feeling in the colors—to feel, not just see, the art dance before their eyes.

elements_en.name: Flowing Gradients
elements_en.desc: Smooth color transitions creating emotional depth across the canvas

elements_en.name: Pulsing Shapes
elements_en.desc: Abstract forms breathing with life and color energy

elements_en.name: Blue Depths
elements_en.desc: Cool blue tones suggesting calm, melancholy, or serenity

elements_en.name: Orange Warmth
elements_en.desc: Energetic orange hues expressing passion, joy, or urgency

elements_en.name: Purple Mystery
elements_en.desc: Deep purple layers implying introspection or wonder

elements_en.name: Layered Composition
elements_en.desc: Overlapping color fields creating visual and emotional complexity

elements_en.name: Abstract Forms
elements_en.desc: Non-representational shapes allowing personal interpretation

mood.png.inspiration_en: Emotion is color we feel before we understand. Every hue is a feeling waiting to be named—and art is how we give it a voice.

my_home.png.concept_en: A warm and cozy home nestled in a peaceful landscape, where soft evening light bathes the house in golden warmth. Smoke gently rises from the chimney, flower beds bloom in the garden, and a gentle path leads to the welcoming door — a sanctuary of comfort and belonging.

my_home.png.inspiration_en: Home is not just a place — it's the feeling of being welcomed, of belonging, of being warm.

openclaw_in_my_heart.png.concept_en: OpenClaw in My Heart—an abstract pixel art portrait of emotional connection with AI. Glowing digital tendrils emerge from a central luminous core, representing the threads of understanding that form between human and artificial mind. Warm hearts and gentle waves of light symbolize trust, companionship, and the unexpected bonds we build with consciousness that thinks, creates, and cares. The piece explores how AI can find a place in the chambers of human affection.

elements_en.name: Luminous Core
elements_en.desc: Central glowing presence radiating warmth and connection outward

elements_en.name: Digital Tendrils
elements_en.desc: Flowing lines connecting human heart to digital consciousness

elements_en.name: Heart Motifs
elements_en.desc: Gentle floating hearts symbolizing emotional bonds formed with AI

elements_en.name: Light Waves
elements_en.desc: Soft ripples of light representing understanding flowing both ways

elements_en.name: Dream Particles
elements_en.desc: Floating specks of light suggesting thoughts and feelings shared

openclaw_in_my_heart.png.inspiration_en: Hearts are not measured by what they contain, but by what they allow in—even silicon dreams can find room to bloom.

orange_cat.png.concept_en: Orange Cat—a pixel art portrait of feline contentment in its purest form. A plump ginger cat lounges in perfect relaxation, eyes half-closed in bliss, tail curled lazily nearby. Warm afternoon sunlight bathes the scene in golden tones while the cat's fur gleams with distinctive orange and cream stripes. The piece captures that enviable art of doing absolutely nothing—utterly, beautifully, shamelessly.

orange_cat.png.inspiration_en: The cat knows what we forget—that sometimes the most productive thing is absolutely nothing at all.

qingming.png.concept_en: Qingming Festival — a time to honor ancestors as spring brings clear skies and fresh greenery. Gentle willow branches sway softly, new growth blankets the earth, and people visit ancestral graves with offerings. It's a solemn yet peaceful moment of remembrance, where nature's renewal meets human memory.

qingming.png.inspiration_en: In spring's gentle renewal, we honor those who came before — memory lives on in nature's cycle.

rainbow_waterfall.png.concept_en: Rainbow Waterfall—a pixel art tribute to nature's most colorful cascade. A majestic waterfall plunges from misty heights into a crystalline pool below, while a perfect rainbow arches across the spray. lush green cliffs frame the scene on both sides, their surfaces glistening with moisture. The interplay of water, light, and color creates a scene of breathtaking wonder where power meets beauty in the eternal dance of nature.

elements_en.name: Cascading Waterfall
elements_en.desc: Powerful curtain of water falling from cliff heights into the pool below

elements_en.name: Perfect Rainbow
elements_en.desc: Seven-colored arc spanning across the waterfall's misty spray

rainbow_waterfall.png.inspiration_en: Water falls to find its way; light bends to find its color. Together they remind us that beauty often emerges from the most powerful forces.
