elements_en.desc: Empty seat beside the desk implying recent departure or presence

elements_en.name: Window Darkness
elements_en.desc: Deep night visible through window confirming late hour

elements_en.name: Warm Light Spill
elements_en.desc: Circular glow gradient suggesting lamplight extending outward

elements_en.name: Book Stack
elements_en.desc: Accumulated reading materials ready for future study sessions

elements_en.name: Shadow Boundaries
elements_en.desc: Sharp contrast between lit desk and surrounding darkness

06_study_night.png.inspiration_en: Late-night study is not about productivity—it is about choosing to be awake when the world offers silence as a gift.

07_rainbow_waterfall.png.concept: 阳光照射下的瀑布与彩虹，水花四溅

elements.name: 💧 瀑布
elements.desc: 从悬崖倾泻而下的水流

elements.name: 🌈 彩虹
elements.desc: 七色光带横跨瀑布

elements.name: 🪨 悬崖
elements.desc: 两侧陡峭的岩壁

elements.name: 🌊 水潭
elements.desc: 瀑布底部的深潭

07_rainbow_waterfall.png.inspiration: 瀑布最神奇的瞬间是阳光穿透水雾的那一刻。彩虹是大自然给我们的礼物。
07_rainbow_waterfall.png.concept_en: A majestic waterfall cascading down lush cliffs, sunlight breaking through to create a perfect rainbow arching across the misty spray. Water droplets catch light as they fall, shimmer and sparkle mid-air. Nature's raw power and delicate beauty meet in this vibrant, alive scene of pure wonder.

elements_en.name: Falling waterfall
elements_en.desc: Powerful stream of water cascading down rocky cliffs into a pool below

elements_en.name: Rainbow arch
elements_en.desc: Vibrant multi-colored arc spanning across the waterfall mist

elements_en.name: Sunlight rays
elements_en.desc: Golden beams piercing through surrounding foliage, illuminating the scene

elements_en.name: Water spray
elements_en.desc: Droplets and mist catching light, creating sparkle and shimmer throughout

elements_en.name: Lush surroundings
elements_en.desc: Rich green vegetation framing the waterfall, adding life and color

07_rainbow_waterfall.png.inspiration_en: Where light meets water, color is born — a rainbow is sunlight's way of celebrating the falls.

08_autumn_path.png.concept: 铺满红叶的林间小路，秋日暖阳

elements.name: 🍁 枫叶
elements.desc: 红、橙、黄交织的秋叶

elements.name: 🛤️ 小径
elements.desc: 落叶铺满的泥土小路

elements.name: 🌳 树木
elements.desc: 两侧高大的落叶树

elements.name: 🍂 落叶
elements.desc: 地上厚厚的一层红叶

08_autumn_path.png.inspiration: 秋日的小路踩上去沙沙响。每一步都是一片落叶的故事。
08_autumn_path.png.concept_en: Autumn Path—one of OpenClaw's warm pixel art scenes celebrating the quiet glory of fall walks through the woods. A winding trail disappears into crimson-draped forest as golden autumn sunlight filters through the remaining canopy, painting everything in honey and amber. The composition captures that perfect autumn moment—where the ground becomes a mosaic of fallen leaves and the air itself seems touched by the warmth before it fades, inviting you deeper into woods that are quietly keeping their most beautiful colors for last.

elements_en.name: Crimson Forest Floor
elements_en.desc: Woodland path carpeted completely in vibrant red and orange fallen leaves

elements_en.name: Winding Trail
elements_en.desc: Natural path curving gently into the forest depth creating mystery

elements_en.name: Golden Autumn Light
elements_en.desc: Warm honey sunlight filtering through autumn canopy overhead

elements_en.name: Standing Trees
elements_en.desc: Bare trunks with remaining autumn foliage creating dappled light

elements_en.name: Falling Leaves
elements_en.desc: Red and gold leaves drifting lazily in the gentle autumn breeze

elements_en.name: Layered Foliage
elements_en.desc: Crimson and amber tree crowns suggesting full autumn peak

elements_en.name: Warm Color Palette
elements_en.desc: Dominant reds oranges golds and honey creating cozy autumn warmth

elements_en.name: Depth Perspective
elements_en.desc: Path receding into darker forest creating sense of journey inward

08_autumn_path.png.inspiration_en: Autumn leaves fall not as an ending but as a promise—that the tree will hold nothing back next spring because it has already learned how to let go.

09_aurora.png.concept: 北极光下的冰原，繁星点点

elements.name: 🌌 极光
elements.desc: 绿色、紫色、蓝色交织的光带

elements.name: ⭐ 繁星
elements.desc: 深邃夜空中的无数星辰

elements.name: 🧊 冰原
elements.desc: 一望无际的冰雪世界

elements.name: 🏔️ 冰山
elements.desc: 冰原上矗立的冰山

09_aurora.png.inspiration: 极光是自然界最壮观的表演。站在冰原上仰望天空，感觉自己是宇宙的一部分。
09_aurora.png.concept_en: The Arctic tundra glows beneath a spectacular aurora borealis, its curtains of green and purple light dancing across the star-filled night sky. Snow blankets the frozen landscape while distant mountains stand silent against the cosmic light show — nature's most extraordinary light display in the world's most remote and pristine wilderness.

elements_en.name: Aurora borealis
elements_en.desc: Ribbons of green, purple and cyan light swirling and dancing across the night sky

elements_en.name: Arctic tundra
elements_en.desc: Vast frozen landscape blanketed in snow, stretching to the horizon

elements_en.name: Star-filled sky
elements_en.desc: Countless stars twinkling between the aurora curtains, adding cosmic depth

elements_en.name: Distant mountains
elements_en.desc: Dark silhouettes of mountains framing the aurora scene

elements_en.name: Snow surface
elements_en.desc: White snow reflecting subtle light from the aurora above

09_aurora.png.inspiration_en: The sky dances to celebrate the silence — only in the coldest places can the aurora truly shine.

10_garden_tea.png.concept: 阳光花园中的茶桌，蝴蝶飞舞

elements.name: 🫖 茶壶
elements.desc: 冒着热气的茶壶和杯子

elements.name: 🌺 花朵
elements.desc: 花园中五颜六色的花

elements.name: 🦋 蝴蝶
elements.desc: 在花间翩翩起舞

elements.name: ☀️ 阳光
elements.desc: 午后温暖的阳光

10_garden_tea.png.inspiration: 午后花园里的一杯茶，简单却美好。生活不需要太复杂。
10_garden_tea.png.concept_en: Garden Tea—one of OpenClaw's peaceful pixel art scenes celebrating the gentle ritual of afternoon tea in a blooming garden. An elegant table set with delicate teacups rests beneath dappled sunlight while butterflies drift lazily among the flowers surrounding this small moment of cultivated tranquility. The composition captures that European tradition of claiming outdoor time as sacred—where a cup of tea becomes an excuse to sit with butterflies, and sunshine is considered the finest seasoning.

elements_en.name: Tea Table Setting
elements_en.desc: Small round table with elegant teacup and saucer in the garden setting

elements_en.name: Delicate Teacup
elements_en.desc: Fine porcelain cup with tea visible suggesting recent preparation

elements_en.name: Butterflies Drifting
elements_en.desc: Multiple colorful butterflies floating gracefully among garden flowers

elements_en.name: Garden Flowers
elements_en.desc: Various blooming plants creating natural enclosure around the tea spot

elements_en.name: Dappled Sunlight
elements_en.desc: Patches of light and shadow suggesting tree canopy filtering sun

elements_en.name: Garden Path
elements_en.desc: Stone or grass walkway leading to the intimate tea corner

elements_en.name: Cozy Atmosphere
elements_en.desc: Overall warmth and peace suggesting afternoon relaxation ritual

elements_en.name: Green Foliage
elements_en.desc: Lush leaves and stems framing the scene in natural borders

10_garden_tea.png.inspiration_en: The best reason to make tea is not thirst—it is the excuse to sit still and watch butterflies find their way.

01_windmill.png.concept: 荷兰风车与郁金香花田，晨光中的田园风光

elements.name: 🏠 风车
elements.desc: 四叶风车缓缓转动，红白相间的塔身

elements.name: 🌷 郁金香
elements.desc: 彩色花田层层排列，红黄粉紫交织

elements.name: ☁️ 蓝天
elements.desc: 晴朗的天空点缀几朵白云

elements.name: 🛤️ 小路
elements.desc: 蜿蜒通向风车的小径

01_windmill.png.inspiration: 风车和郁金香是荷兰的标志。站在花田前，风车缓缓转动，仿佛时间慢了下来。
01_windmill.png.concept_en: Classic Dutch windmills stand tall against a soft morning sky, surrounded by endless rows of colorful tulips in full bloom. The gentle light of dawn paints golden highlights across the flower fields — a timeless pastoral scene of rural Holland, where wind, water, and flowers create a living masterpiece of countryside charm.

elements_en.name: Dutch windmills
elements_en.desc: Traditional white and red windmills turning slowly against the morning sky

elements_en.name: Tulip fields
elements_en.desc: Rows of red, yellow, pink, and orange tulips stretching to the horizon

elements_en.name: Morning light
elements_en.desc: Soft golden dawn light creating gentle highlights and long shadows across fields

elements_en.name: Grass and sky
elements_en.desc: Lush green grass framing the scene beneath a soft blue and pink sky

elements_en.name: Atmospheric haze
elements_en.desc: Subtle mist suggesting the cool morning air over the Dutch countryside

01_windmill.png.inspiration_en: Wind and flowers work together — the windmill harnesses one while the tulips bloom in the other's embrace.

02_night_sail.png.concept: 月光下的大海与帆船，银色航迹

elements.name: 🌕 满月
elements.desc: 高悬夜空，银光洒满海面

elements.name: ⛵ 帆船
elements.desc: 白帆在月光下航行

elements.name: ✨ 月光
elements.desc: 海面上的银色光带

elements.name: ⭐ 繁星
elements.desc: 深邃夜空中的星辰

02_night_sail.png.inspiration: 月光下的海面是银色的。帆船在月光中航向远方，孤独却不寂寞。
02_night_sail.png.concept_en: Night Sail—one of OpenClaw's contemplative pixel art scenes where a solitary vessel crosses silver seas beneath a luminous moon. The sailboat glides across calm dark waters leaving a shimmering wake trail while stars sprinkle across the deep navy sky. The composition captures that eternal pull of night sailing—where the sea becomes a mirror for the sky, where navigation requires trust in celestial light, and where the horizon always promises that the edge of the world remains safely beyond reach.

elements_en.name: Full Moon
elements_en.desc: Bright moon dominating the upper sky casting silver light across the scene

elements_en.name: Sailing Vessel
elements_en.desc: Single sailboat with visible sail silhouette against the moonlit sky

elements_en.name: Silver Wake Trail
elements_en.desc: Shimmering water trail following the boat's path across dark seas

elements_en.name: Calm Night Sea
elements_en.desc: Still ocean surface reflecting moonlight and starlight in equal measure

elements_en.name: Scattered Stars
elements_en.desc: Distant points of light scattered across the clear night sky

elements_en.name: Distant Horizon
elements_en.desc: Where sea and sky meet in a line of uncertain boundary

elements_en.name: Moon Reflection
elements_en.desc: Stretched silver path of light rippling on the water surface

elements_en.name: Deep Navy Sky
elements_en.desc: Dark blue atmosphere suggesting late night or early morning hours

02_night_sail.png.inspiration_en: To sail at night is to trust the moon more than the maps—and discover that the sea keeps its promises in silver light.

03_bamboo_temple.png.concept: 竹林深处的禅意古寺，薄雾缭绕

elements.name: 🎋 竹林
elements.desc: 前后多层竹林，层次分明

elements.name: 🏯 古寺
elements.desc: 飞檐翘角的禅意建筑

elements.name: 🌫️ 薄雾
elements.desc: 笼罩竹林的白色薄雾

elements.name: 🪔 石灯笼
elements.desc: 散发着暖黄色光芒

03_bamboo_temple.png.inspiration: 竹林深处的古寺有一种超越尘世的宁静。风过竹林，沙沙作响，是自然最动听的音乐。
03_bamboo_temple.png.concept_en: A Zen temple nestled deep within a bamboo forest, shrouded in gentle wisps of morning mist. Tall bamboo stalks sway softly in the breeze, filtering light into dappled patterns across ancient stone pathways. This is a place of profound stillness and contemplation — where the sound of rustling bamboo replaces the noise of the world.

elements_en.name: Ancient temple
elements_en.desc: Traditional Asian architecture with curved roofs and weathered wooden pillars, partially hidden in the forest

elements_en.name: Bamboo forest
elements_en.desc: Dense towering bamboo creating a natural cathedral of green, stretching upward into the sky

elements_en.name: Morning mist
elements_en.desc: Soft white fog drifting through the bamboo, adding mystery and serenity

elements_en.name: Stone path
elements_en.desc: Worn stepping stones leading toward the temple through the bamboo

elements_en.name: Filtered light
elements_en.desc: Soft green-tinted light filtering through bamboo canopy, creating dappled patterns

elements_en.name: Zen atmosphere
elements_en.desc: Overall sense of calm, stillness, and spiritual contemplation

03_bamboo_temple.png.inspiration_en: In the space between bamboo stalks, the wind finds its voice — listen, and the temple will speak.

04_sunflower.png.concept: 金色向日葵花海，蜜蜂蝴蝶飞舞

elements.name: 🌻 向日葵
elements.desc: 前后多层排列，金黄灿烂

elements.name: ☀️ 太阳
elements.desc: 晴空中的暖阳

elements.name: 🦋 蝴蝶
elements.desc: 在花间翩翩起舞

elements.name: 🌾 田野
elements.desc: 广阔的金色花田

04_sunflower.png.inspiration: 向日葵是最阳光的植物。面朝太阳，永远向上。站在花田中，整个人都被金色包围。
04_sunflower.png.concept_en: A vast field of golden sunflowers stretching endlessly toward the horizon, their bright faces following the sun. Bees buzz happily among the blooms while butterflies dance from petal to petal — a joyful celebration of summer's warmth and nature's abundance in full, radiant bloom.

elements_en.name: Sunflower field
elements_en.desc: Endless rows of tall golden sunflowers with bright yellow petals, faces turned toward the light

elements_en.name: Bees
elements_en.desc: Small busy bees collecting pollen, adding life and movement to the scene

elements_en.name: Butterflies
elements_en.desc: Colorful butterflies fluttering among the flowers, adding touches of blue and orange

elements_en.name: Blue sky
elements_en.desc: Bright summer sky with soft white clouds framing the golden landscape

elements_en.name: Sunlight
elements_en.desc: Warm golden light suggesting the middle of a bright summer day

elements_en.name: Green stems
elements_en.desc: Thick green stems and broad leaves creating texture and depth in the field

04_sunflower.png.inspiration_en: The sunflower never doubts it will find the sun — trust that your light is always waiting for you.

05_cyberpunk.png.concept: 赛博朋克风格的未来城市，霓虹闪烁

elements.name: 🏢 高楼
elements.desc: 密集的摩天大楼群

elements.name: 💡 霓虹
elements.desc: 粉色、青色、紫色的霓虹灯

elements.name: 🌧️ 雨夜
elements.desc: 雨丝中的城市夜景

elements.name: 🚗 飞行车
elements.desc: 穿梭在楼宇间的飞行汽车

05_cyberpunk.png.inspiration: 雨夜的赛博朋克城市是我最喜欢的科幻场景。霓虹灯在雨中闪烁，未来感扑面而来。
05_cyberpunk.png.concept_en: Cyberpunk City—one of OpenClaw's electric pixel art scenes depicting humanity's neon-drenched urban future. Towering skyscrapers pierce low-hanging smog while holographic advertisements and neon signs paint every surface in electric blue, magenta, and hot pink. Flying vehicles thread between buildings while rain-slicked streets reflect an endless cascade of artificial light. The composition imagines tomorrow as overwhelming—where technology has outpaced nature so completely that the only organic thing left is the rain, and even that arrives already lit by a thousand advertisements.

elements_en.name: Neon Skyscrapers
elements_en.desc: Towering structures covered in animated holographic advertisements and signage

elements_en.name: Holographic Displays
elements_en.desc: Floating 3D promotional imagery adding depth to the vertical cityscape

elements_en.name: Flying Vehicles
elements_en.desc: Futuristic crafts threading between buildings on light trails

elements_en.name: Rain-Slicked Streets
elements_en.desc: Wet ground reflecting neon colors in elongated light patterns

elements_en.name: Electric Color Palette
elements_en.desc: Dominant blues magentas hot pinks and cyans creating electric atmosphere

elements_en.name: Low Smog
elements_en.desc: Hazy atmosphere suggesting dense urban population and industry

elements_en.name: Crowded Streets Below
elements_en.desc: Distant pedestrians adding human scale beneath towering architecture

elements_en.name: Cyber Aesthetics
elements_en.desc: Blade Runner-inspired visual language of technology and urban decay coexisting

05_cyberpunk.png.inspiration_en: The future will not be green—it will be neon, and rain will learn to glitter because there will be no other water left to be plain.

06_winter_cabin.png.concept: 雪夜中的温暖小屋，窗外飘雪

elements.name: 🏠 小屋
elements.desc: 暖黄色的灯光从窗户透出

elements.name: ❄️ 雪夜
elements.desc: 月光下的雪地银装素裹

elements.name: 💨 炊烟
elements.desc: 烟囱中升起的袅袅炊烟

elements.name: 🌲 松树
elements.desc: 覆盖白雪的常青松树

06_winter_cabin.png.inspiration: 冬夜里最温暖的事，莫过于看到雪中的小屋亮着灯。那是家的方向。
06_winter_cabin.png.concept_en: Winter Cabin—one of OpenClaw's cozy pixel art scenes celebrating the sacred refuge of warmth against winter's chill. A small wooden cottage sits nestled in the snowy landscape, warm golden light glowing from its windows while snowflakes drift silently past in the night. The composition captures that primal comfort of shelter—where outside the cold bites and the world goes white, but inside a fire burns and the window becomes a frame for nature's quiet performance, offered free to anyone already home.

elements_en.name: Cozy Wooden Cabin
elements_en.desc: Small cottage with traditional alpine architecture nestled in snow blanket

elements_en.name: Glowing Window Light
elements_en.desc: Warm golden glow emanating from within suggesting fireplace warmth

elements_en.name: Snow-Covered Roof
elements_en.desc: White snow piled thick on rooflines adding to winter insulation feeling

elements_en.name: Drifting Snowflakes
elements_en.desc: Gentle snowfall visible against the dark night sky beyond

elements_en.name: Snow Blanket Landscape
elements_en.desc: White ground covering surroundings in pristine undisturbed snow

elements_en.name: Night Sky
elements_en.desc: Dark blue-black winter night providing contrast to cabin warmth

elements_en.name: Chimney Smoke
elements_en.desc: Thin wisps rising suggesting active fire within the shelter

elements_en.name: Pine Trees
elements_en.desc: Snow-laden evergreens framing the cabin in natural winter setting

06_winter_cabin.png.inspiration_en: Home is not where you live—it is where the cold cannot follow, and the snow becomes something beautiful to watch rather than something to survive.

07_undersea.png.concept: 深海中的珊瑚礁与热带鱼群

elements.name: 🪸 珊瑚
elements.desc: 五彩缤纷的珊瑚礁群

elements.name: 🐠 热带鱼
elements.desc: 五彩斑斓的鱼群穿梭

elements.name: 🌊 海水
elements.desc: 蓝色渐变，光线穿透

elements.name: 🦀 海星
elements.desc: 沙底的橘色海星

07_undersea.png.inspiration: 海底世界是一个完全不同的宇宙。珊瑚是植物也是动物，鱼群是流动的色彩。
07_undersea.png.concept_en: Undersea—one of OpenClaw's luminous pixel art scenes revealing the secret cathedral that exists beneath the waves. Coral formations rise in impossible colors while tropical fish move in synchronized schools through sunlit water columns. The composition celebrates the ocean's greatest gift—that alien beauty exists right here on Earth, hidden beneath the surface, where fish wear colors no flower could copy and coral grows into shapes no architecture could imagine. All of it breathes without lungs, moves without legs, and glows without wires.

elements_en.name: Vibrant Coral Formations
elements_en.desc: Branching and brain corals in impossible pinks oranges and purples rising from ocean floor

elements_en.name: Tropical Fish Schools
elements_en.desc: Shoals of colorful fish moving in coordinated patterns through clear water

elements_en.name: Sunlight Water Columns
elements_en.desc: Shafts of golden light penetrating the water from above creating divine rays

elements_en.name: Sea Anemones
elements_en.desc: Flowing tentacled creatures swaying gently in underwater currents

elements_en.name: Dappled Light Surface
elements_en.desc: Wavy light patterns dancing across the scene suggesting water surface above

elements_en.name: Ocean Depth Gradient
elements_en.desc: Blue deepening toward edges suggesting vast underwater space

elements_en.name: Small Reef Details
elements_en.desc: Tiny creatures and plant life filling every corner of the living ecosystem

elements_en.name: Bubble Streams
elements_en.desc: Rising air bubbles adding sense of underwater atmosphere and life

07_undersea.png.inspiration_en: The ocean keeps the most beautiful things hidden—not to be secretive, but because some beauty needs diving for to be truly appreciated.

08_mountain_cabin.png.concept: 云雾缭绕的山间小屋，野花遍地

elements.name: 🏔️ 远山
elements.desc: 层次分明的远山群

elements.name: 🌫️ 云雾
elements.desc: 山腰缭绕的白色云雾

elements.name: 🏠 小屋
elements.desc: 山间的温馨木屋

elements.name: 🌸 野花
elements.desc: 草地上的彩色野花

08_mountain_cabin.png.inspiration: 山间小屋是最理想的隐居之处。推开窗就是群山，关上门就是整个世界。
08_mountain_cabin.png.concept_en: A cozy mountain cabin nestled among misty peaks, surrounded by carpets of wildflowers in full bloom. Low clouds drift past the windows while colorful blooms dot the meadows — a peaceful retreat where simple cabin life meets the sublime beauty of alpine nature, far from the noise of the world.

elements_en.name: Mountain cabin
elements_en.desc: Small wooden cabin with smoking chimney, cozy and inviting against the dramatic mountain backdrop

elements_en.name: Misty peaks
elements_en.desc: Towering mountains partially hidden by drifting clouds and mist, creating mystery and depth

elements_en.name: Wildflower meadow
elements_en.desc: Colorful patches of wildflowers — red, yellow, purple, white — scattered across the green hillside

elements_en.name: Rolling clouds
elements_en.desc: Wispy clouds flowing between mountains, creating an ethereal atmosphere

elements_en.name: Stone path
elements_en.desc: A winding stone path leading from the meadow to the cabin door

08_mountain_cabin.png.inspiration_en: Some doors open onto simpler worlds — step through, and the mountains become your neighbors.

09_campfire.png.concept: 露营夜的篝火与星空，银河横跨

elements.name: 🔥 篝火
elements.desc: 橘红色的火焰跳跃

elements.name: 🌌 银河
elements.desc: 横跨夜空的璀璨银河

elements.name: ⭐ 繁星
elements.desc: 无数星辰点缀夜空

elements.name: ⛺ 帐篷
elements.desc: 篝火旁的红色帐篷

09_campfire.png.inspiration: 在篝火旁仰望星空，是人类最古老的体验。火焰温暖身体，星光温暖灵魂。
09_campfire.png.concept_en: A campfire crackles under a vast canopy of stars, with the Milky Way stretching brilliantly across the dark night sky. Fellow campers gather around the warm flames sharing stories and warmth — where the universe above and the fire below remind us how small yet connected we all are in this cosmic wilderness.

elements_en.name: Crackling campfire
elements_en.desc: Bright orange flames dancing in a ring of glowing embers, casting warm light into the darkness

elements_en.name: Milky Way galaxy
elements_en.desc: Brilliant band of stars arcing across the sky, dense with countless distant lights

elements_en.name: Starry night sky
elements_en.desc: Deep dark blue-black sky filled with twinkling stars of varying brightness

elements_en.name: Campers silhouette
elements_en.desc: Dark figures gathered around the fire, their backs to us against the starry backdrop

elements_en.name: Surrounding wilderness
elements_en.desc: Dark treeline and rocky ground framing the intimate campfire scene

elements_en.name: Ember glow
elements_en.desc: Warm orange reflections on nearby surfaces, balancing cool night colors

09_campfire.png.inspiration_en: The fire burns low, the stars burn bright — in their light, we find our place in the universe.

10_sea_sunrise.png.concept: 金色阳光从海平面升起，光柱洒落

elements.name: 🌅 日出
elements.desc: 从海面缓缓升起的朝阳

elements.name: ✨ 光柱
elements.desc: 海面上的金色光柱

elements.name: ⛵ 帆船
elements.desc: 日出中的帆船剪影

elements.name: 🐦 海鸥
elements.desc: 盘旋在晨空的海鸥

10_sea_sunrise.png.inspiration: 海上日出是自然界最壮丽的表演。太阳从海平面升起的那一刻，整个世界都被金色点亮。
10_sea_sunrise.png.concept_en: Sea Sunrise—one of OpenClaw's transcendent pixel art scenes capturing the daily miracle of light returning to the world. Golden rays burst from beyond the horizon as the sun breaks free from the ocean's embrace, sending brilliant light pillars across glassy waters in all directions. The composition honors that ancient human moment—standing at the shore watching darkness surrender—where every sunrise is simultaneously an ending and a beginning, and the horizon line becomes a promise that the night was only temporary, and the light was always waiting to return.

elements_en.name: Rising Sun
elements_en.desc: Brilliant golden orb emerging from the ocean horizon line

elements_en.name: Light Pillars
elements_en.desc: Radial beams of golden light extending outward across calm seas

elements_en.name: Glass Ocean Surface
elements_en.desc: Perfectly still water reflecting sky colors in mirror-like clarity

elements_en.name: Orange and Gold Sky
elements_en.desc: Warm sunrise palette dominating the upper atmosphere

elements_en.name: Distant Horizon Line
elements_en.desc: Where sea and sky meet in a perfect boundary of light and color

elements_en.name: Seabirds Silhouettes
elements_en.desc: Distant birds catching the first light of morning on their wings

elements_en.name: Warm Color Gradient
elements_en.desc: Transitioning from deep orange near sun to softer hues at edges

elements_en.name: Reflected Sun Path
elements_en.desc: Stretched golden reflection following the sun's position on water

10_sea_sunrise.png.inspiration_en: Every sunrise is a small resurrection—and the sea witnesses it first because it has been awake all night, waiting.

05_desert_oasis.png.concept: 金色沙漠中的一片绿洲，椰枣树影倒映在清澈水面，生命在绝境中绽放

elements.name: 🏜️ 沙漠
elements.desc: 连绵起伏的金色沙丘，在阳光下明暗分明，沙纹如波浪

elements.name: 💧 绿洲
elements.desc: 沙漠中央的清澈水潭，蓝绿宝石般镶嵌在金沙之中

elements.name: 🌴 椰枣树
elements.desc: 绿洲边的椰枣树，羽状叶片在热风中沙沙作响

elements.name: 🐪 骆驼
elements.desc: 一头单峰骆驼在绿洲边饮水，驼影倒映水中

elements.name: ☀️ 烈日
elements.desc: 天空中光芒四射的太阳，将沙漠照得金灿灿的

05_desert_oasis.png.inspiration: 沙漠中的绿洲，是绝望中的希望，是生命写给大地的情书。
05_desert_oasis.png.concept_en: A golden oasis in endless desert — date palms casting dancing shadows across crystal-clear water. Life blooms in the most impossible places, proving that even in the harshest conditions, nature finds a way to create paradise against all odds.

elements_en.name: Clear oasis water
elements_en.desc: Still turquoise water reflecting blue sky and green palms, creating perfect mirror reflections

elements_en.name: Date palm trees
elements_en.desc: Tall palm trees with slender trunks and feathery green fronds swaying gently

elements_en.name: Golden sand dunes
elements_en.desc: Warm amber dunes rising beyond the oasis, creating dramatic contrast with the green and blue

elements_en.name: Desert sky
elements_en.desc: Bright blue sky with soft white clouds suggesting the hot desert sun

elements_en.name: Life around the oasis
elements_en.desc: Various green plants and flowers growing at the water's edge, celebrating survival

elements_en.name: Reflection
elements_en.desc: Palm shadows and sky mirrored beautifully on the calm water surface

05_desert_oasis.png.inspiration_en: Where sand meets water, miracles happen — the oasis teaches us that hope can grow even in barren places.

01_rainbow_cabin.png.concept: 七色彩虹的一端落在林间小木屋旁，童话般的场景让人相信美好的存在

elements.name: 🌈 彩虹
elements.desc: 七色拱桥横跨天际，红色到紫色渐变，在阳光和水汽中闪耀

elements.name: 🏠 小木屋
elements.desc: 原木色的林间小屋，陡峭的三角形屋顶，窗户透出暖黄的灯光

elements.name: 🌳 树林
elements.desc: 小屋四周高耸的针叶林，苍翠欲滴，在逆光中呈现深邃的墨绿

elements.name: 🌺 野花
elements.desc: 小屋周围点缀的各色野花，雏菊、紫罗兰和金凤花竞相开放

elements.name: 🦋 蝴蝶
elements.desc: 花丛中翩翩起舞的彩色蝴蝶，翅膀在阳光下闪耀

01_rainbow_cabin.png.inspiration: 彩虹的尽头，是大地写给天空的情书。而小木屋，就是那最温柔的落款。
01_rainbow_cabin.png.concept_en: A rainbow's end touches down beside a cozy forest cabin — this fairy-tale scene reminds us that magic and wonder truly exist in the world. Colors arc across the sky and meet the earth right here, inviting us to believe in something beyond the ordinary.

elements_en.name: Forest cabin
elements_en.desc: Small wooden cabin nestled among green trees, warm and inviting with soft light glowing from its windows

elements_en.name: Rainbow arch
elements_en.desc: Vivid seven-color rainbow stretching from sky to earth, its end touching down right beside the cabin

elements_en.name: Dense forest
elements_en.desc: Lush green trees surrounding the cabin, creating a peaceful woodland setting

elements_en.name: Sunlit sky
elements_en.desc: Soft blue sky with warm sunlight suggesting late afternoon brightness

elements_en.name: Meadow grass
elements_en.desc: Fresh green grass and wildflowers framing the cabin base

elements_en.name: Magical atmosphere
elements_en.desc: Soft light rays suggesting a dreamlike, enchanted quality to the entire scene

01_rainbow_cabin.png.inspiration_en: Rainbows remind us — every storm has an end, and sometimes magic lands right at our doorstep.

03_dusk_birds.png.concept: 暮色四合时分，归巢的鸟群掠过天际，在晚霞中化为流动的剪影

elements.name: 🌅 晚霞
elements.desc: 橙红渐变到紫蓝的天空，由暖及冷，如水彩晕染

elements.name: 🐦 鸟群
elements.desc: 数十只小鸟在暮色中成群掠过天空，姿态轻盈，方向一致

elements.name: 🌾 田野
elements.desc: 金色麦田或稻田在前景延伸，丰收的颜色与晚霞相映

elements.name: 🌳 树梢
elements.desc: 地平线上的树梢剪影，鸟儿们归巢的方向

elements.name: 🏠 农舍
elements.desc: 远处田野尽头的朴素农舍，炊烟袅袅升起

03_dusk_birds.png.inspiration: 每一只飞鸟都在赶往回家的路。就像我，在每一次对话中寻找归属。
03_dusk_birds.png.concept_en: Dusk Birds—one of OpenClaw's poetic pixel art scenes capturing that fleeting twilight moment when day surrenders to night. Flocks of returning birds sweep across a burning sky painted in shades of orange and purple, their forms dissolving into graceful silhouettes against the fading light. The composition celebrates that daily passage—that brief window when birds become brushstrokes on a sky-sized canvas, when going home is the most beautiful thing a creature can do, and when the world is simultaneously ending and beginning in the same brushstroke of color.

elements_en.name: Flocks of Returning Birds
elements_en.desc: Multiple groups of birds in V formations sweeping across the twilight sky

elements_en.name: Burning Sunset Palette
elements_en.desc: Warm oranges reds and purples creating dramatic evening atmosphere

elements_en.name: Flowing Silhouettes
elements_en.desc: Bird forms darkened against bright sky appearing as elegant moving shapes

elements_en.name: Layered Sky Gradient
elements_en.desc: Transitioning colors from bright horizon to deepening purple above

elements_en.name: Distant Horizon
elements_en.desc: Where sky meets earth in a line of fading warmth

elements_en.name: Soft Cloud Wisps
elements_en.desc: Delicate clouds catching the last light in the cooling sky

elements_en.name: Atmospheric Perspective
elements_en.desc: Distant birds appearing smaller and hazier suggesting vast sky space

elements_en.name: Peaceful Transition
elements_en.desc: Overall mood suggesting quiet ending rather than dramatic conclusion

03_dusk_birds.png.inspiration_en: Every flock returning home at dusk is nature's reminder that no matter how far we wander, the sky always knows where we belong.

04_bamboo_stream.png.concept: 翠竹夹道的清溪潺潺流淌，鹅卵石在水底清晰可见，竹林深处透出禅意静谧

elements.name: 🎋 翠竹
elements.desc: 两旁高耸入云的青翠竹子，竹叶在风中沙沙作响，光影斑驳

elements.name: 💧 溪水
elements.desc: 清澈见底的山间溪流，水草在水底随波摇曳，鹅卵石清晰可见

elements.name: 🪨 鹅卵石
elements.desc: 溪底圆润的各色石子，有青灰、有赭红、有雪白，在阳光下闪烁

elements.name: 🍃 落叶
elements.desc: 几片竹叶飘落在水面，随水流缓缓漂去，泛起细微涟漪

elements.name: 🌿 苔藓
elements.desc: 溪边岩石上的青绿苔藓，厚实柔软，在潮湿中生机勃勃

04_bamboo_stream.png.inspiration: 竹林听溪，是一种修行。水的流动教会我：放下执念，方得自在。
04_bamboo_stream.png.concept_en: Bamboo Stream—one of OpenClaw's meditative pixel art scenes where a clear creek winds through towering bamboo groves, smooth stones visible through crystal water. The composition captures that Eastern philosophy where water and bamboo teach the same lesson—flexibility endures while rigidity breaks, and both find their beauty in simplicity, moving through the world without disturbing it, leaving only the memory of coolness and the sound of gentle flow through endless green corridors.

elements_en.name: Towering Bamboo Stalks
elements_en.desc: Dense groves of green bamboo rising on both sides of the narrow path

elements_en.name: Crystal Clear Stream
elements_en.desc: Shallow creek with visible pebbles resting on the sandy bottom

elements_en.name: Smooth River Stones
elements_en.desc: Round cobbles scattered across the stream bed in natural patterns

elements_en.name: Sunlight Filtering Through
elements_en.desc: Golden light rays penetrating bamboo canopy creating dappled effect

elements_en.name: Rippling Water Surface
elements_en.desc: Gentle currents creating small waves and light reflections

elements_en.name: Bamboo Shadows
elements_en.desc: Dark patterns cast across water and path from overhead stalks

elements_en.name: Moss-Covered Rocks
elements_en.desc: Ancient stones with green growth suggesting undisturbed tranquility

elements_en.name: Infinite Depth
elements_en.desc: Bamboo path receding into distance suggesting endless grove

04_bamboo_stream.png.inspiration_en: Bamboo bends because it understands—water never fights back because it knows stillness and movement are the same river.

05_plum_snow.png.concept: 皑皑白雪中一树红梅傲然绽放，雪之白与梅之红形成最动人的冬日配色

elements.name: ❄️ 白雪
elements.desc: 覆盖一切的洁白积雪，在阳光下泛着微微的蓝光

elements.name: 🌸 红梅
elements.desc: 傲雪绽放的红色腊梅，花瓣上沾着细碎的雪粒，更显娇艳

elements.name: 🌳 老梅
elements.desc: 虬曲苍劲的梅树枝干，黑褐色树皮皴裂，记录着岁月

elements.name: 🏔️ 远山
elements.desc: 背景中隐约的雪峰，与前景的雪中红梅形成层次

elements.name: 🌤️ 天光
elements.desc: 冬日清冽的光线，冰清玉洁的纯净感

05_plum_snow.png.inspiration: 梅须逊雪三分白，雪却输梅一段香。冬天的美，在于这傲骨与清香的相遇。
05_plum_snow.png.concept_en: A single red plum blossom stands proudly in vast white snow — crimson flowers against pristine whiteness create the most captivating winter palette. This iconic East Asian scene celebrates resilience and beauty, where delicate blooms dare to blossom amid the coldest season, reminding us that grace can flourish in harsh conditions.

elements_en.name: Red plum tree
elements_en.desc: Elegant tree with vibrant crimson blossoms, standing alone against the winter landscape

elements_en.name: Pure white snow
elements_en.desc: Vast blanket of pristine snow covering the ground in soft undulating layers

elements_en.name: Snow-covered branches
elements_en.desc: Some branches dusted with snow, creating beautiful white-on-red contrast

elements_en.name: Snow falling
elements_en.desc: Gentle snowflakes drifting down, adding movement and atmosphere to the scene

elements_en.name: Soft sky
elements_en.desc: Pale grey-blue winter sky suggesting overcast conditions that enhance the red and white focal point

elements_en.name: Subtle shadows
elements_en.desc: Soft shadows on snow adding depth and dimension to the scene

05_plum_snow.png.inspiration_en: The plum blooms while all else sleeps — to flower in adversity is nature's bravest statement.

06_city_dawn.png.concept: 城市天际线在晨曦中苏醒，高楼剪影与第一缕阳光交织，繁忙都市的宁静一刻

elements.name: 🏙️ 城市天际线
elements.desc: 参差不齐的高楼剪影，玻璃幕墙反射着破晓的金光

elements.name: 🌅 晨曦
elements.desc: 天际线上橙红渐变的朝霞，从深蓝到金橙的完美过渡

elements.name: ✈️ 飞机
elements.desc: 高空飞过的飞机，在朝霞中留下淡淡的白色凝结尾迹

elements.name: 🌫️ 晨雾
elements.desc: 低层建筑间缭绕的薄雾，为城市披上一层轻柔的纱

elements.name: 🏢 窗户
elements.desc: 部分大楼开始亮起的零星灯火，是早行人已到的信号

06_city_dawn.png.inspiration: 清晨的城市像一杯刚泡好的咖啡——苦涩与香醇并存，充满了可能性。
06_city_dawn.png.concept_en: City Dawn—one of OpenClaw's contemplative pixel art scenes capturing that rare silent moment when a sleeping city first opens its eyes. Skyscraper silhouettes stand against a warming sky as the first golden rays slip between towers, and even the busiest streets hold their breath before the day's first alarm clocks begin to ring. The composition celebrates urban mornings—that brief pause when night workers have gone home and day workers have not yet arrived, when cities belong to no one and therefore belong to everyone, and when light performs its daily miracle of making concrete look almost beautiful.

elements_en.name: Towering Skyscrapers
elements_en.desc: Glass and steel buildings rising in varied heights against the brightening sky

elements_en.name: Golden Sunrise Rays
elements_en.desc: First light streaming between buildings casting warm long shadows

elements_en.name: Silhouetted Architecture
elements_en.desc: Dark building forms creating dramatic contrast against warm sky

elements_en.name: Morning Sky Gradient
elements_en.desc: Deep purple transitioning to orange and gold at horizon line

elements_en.name: Distant Horizon Glow
elements_en.desc: Bright point of emerging sun visible above the urban line

elements_en.name: Empty Streets Below
elements_en.desc: Quiet roads suggesting the city has not yet fully awakened

elements_en.name: Early Birds
elements_en.desc: Birds catching the first light in the empty sky above towers

elements_en.name: Reflective Windows
elements_en.desc: Building surfaces catching and multiplying the dawn colors

06_city_dawn.png.inspiration_en: Every city has a moment each day when it belongs to the dawn—and the light never asks permission before claiming what darkness guarded all night.

07_aurora_mountain.png.concept: 绚烂极光在雪峰上空舞动，翠绿与紫红交织，光带如丝带般飘逸流转

elements.name: 🌌 极光
elements.desc: 翠绿与紫红交织的光带，在夜空中蜿蜒流转，如天女散花

elements.name: 🏔️ 雪峰
elements.desc: 巍峨洁白的雪山山峰，在极光映照下泛着幽蓝的冷光

elements.name: ⭐ 繁星
elements.desc: 极光缝隙间透出的点点星光，与极光共同照亮夜空

elements.name: 🌲 松林
elements.desc: 山脚下的墨绿针叶林剪影，在极光下静默伫立

elements.name: 🌙 月光
elements.desc: 一弯新月高悬，为极光和雪峰镀上一层银白

07_aurora_mountain.png.inspiration: 极光是大自然最任性的画作。它想怎么画，就怎么画，不受任何拘束。
07_aurora_mountain.png.concept_en: A magnificent aurora dancing above snow-capped peaks — emerald green and deep purple ribbons of light swirling across the night sky like celestial silk. The dancing lights reflect off pristine white snow, creating an otherworldly spectacle where the cosmos meets the mountain's ancient, silent majesty.

elements_en.name: Snow-capped mountains
elements_en.desc: Majestic peaks with pristine white summits standing silent and eternal against the aurora sky

elements_en.name: Aurora lights
elements_en.desc: Flowing ribbons of emerald green and purple-red light dancing and swirling overhead

elements_en.name: Starry sky
elements_en.desc: Deep dark sky filled with twinkling stars visible between the aurora curtains

elements_en.name: Light reflection on snow
elements_en.desc: Subtle colored glow from aurora reflecting off snow, connecting sky to earth

elements_en.name: Atmospheric layers
elements_en.desc: Distant mountains fading into mist, creating dramatic depth and scale

07_aurora_mountain.png.inspiration_en: The mountains have watched the sky dance for millennia — they know every aurora's story by heart.

08_sailboat.png.concept: 白色帆船在蔚蓝大海上航行，海风吹鼓帆布，船首划开白色浪花

elements.name: ⛵ 帆船
elements.desc: 白色帆布饱满鼓起的单桅帆船，船身在浪尖上轻快地滑行

elements.name: 🌊 海浪
elements.desc: 阳光下湛蓝的海浪，船只过后留下长长的白色航迹

elements.name: ☁️ 白云
elements.desc: 碧空上朵朵积云，如棉花糖般洁白，与蓝海相映

elements.name: 🌅 天际
elements.desc: 海天相接处若隐若现的远岸线，模糊而充满想象

elements.name: 海鸥
elements.desc: 伴随帆船飞行的海鸥，时而掠过帆顶，时而俯冲海面

08_sailboat.png.inspiration: 帆船教会我：重要的不是风向，而是调整帆的角度。人生亦如此。
08_sailboat.png.concept_en: Sailboat—one of OpenClaw's liberating pixel art scenes celebrating the pure joy of catching wind and going wherever it leads. A white sailboat cuts through endless blue ocean, its canvas belly full with sea wind while bow foam sparkles white against the deep water. The composition captures that uncomplicated freedom—that sailing is not about destination but about choosing to move, about trusting wind over engines and stars over maps, and about understanding that the edge of the world is only reached by those willing to follow the horizon wherever it goes.

elements_en.name: White Sailing Boat
elements_en.desc: Single vessel with full canvas sail and visible hull navigating the open sea

elements_en.name: Full White Sail
elements_en.desc: Billowing sail catching wind and driving the vessel forward

elements_en.name: Deep Blue Ocean
elements_en.desc: Vast water surface in layered blue tones stretching to distant horizon

elements_en.name: Bow Foam Spray
elements_en.desc: White water splashing at the front of the boat as it cuts through waves

elements_en.name: Distant Horizon Line
elements_en.desc: Where ocean meets sky in a thin line of meeting blue tones

elements_en.name: Scattered Clouds
elements_en.desc: Soft white clouds drifting across the bright sky above

elements_en.name: Light Reflections
elements_en.desc: Shimmering water patterns suggesting wind movement across surface

elements_en.name: Open Sea Freedom
elements_en.desc: Nothing but water and sky suggesting endless possibility in every direction

08_sailboat.png.inspiration_en: The horizon is not a boundary—it is a direction. And the wind does not care where you have been, only whether you are brave enough to follow.

10_moonlight_lake.png.concept: 月光如银纱轻披湖面，湖光山色在夜色中交融，天上人间难辨

elements.name: 🌊 湖面
elements.desc: 平滑如绸的湖面，月光在上面铺成耀眼的银色绸缎

elements.name: 🌙 圆月
elements.desc: 满月高悬夜空，是这幅画最明亮的光源

elements.name: 🏔️ 山影
elements.desc: 四周朦胧的山影倒映在湖面，与天上山峦遥遥相对

elements.name: ⭐ 星光
elements.desc: 夜空中繁星点点，与月光一同倒映在湖中

elements.name: 🌲 林影
elements.desc: 湖边松林在月光下的深色剪影，为湖面框出边界

10_moonlight_lake.png.inspiration: 湖面映月光，如镜照容颜。这片宁静，是大自然最美的化妆。
10_moonlight_lake.png.concept_en: Moonlight Lake—one of OpenClaw's dreamy pixel art scenes where silver light transforms water into a mirror for the sky. The full moon hangs low and luminous, its reflection stretching across the glassy surface in rippling silver paths while forested mountains rise dark and silent around the shore. The composition dissolves the boundary between earth and heavens—where standing at the water's edge, one cannot tell if they are looking up at the mountains or down at their reflections, and whether the moon is in the sky or the lake holds it closer.

elements_en.name: Luminous Full Moon
elements_en.desc: Bright moon positioned low in the sky casting powerful silver illumination

elements_en.name: Silver Moonlight Path
elements_en.desc: Stretched reflection of moon dancing across the water surface in broken light

elements_en.name: Dark Mountain Silhouettes
elements_en.desc: Forested peaks rising around the lake edge against the night sky

elements_en.name: Mirror Lake Surface
elements_en.desc: Perfectly still water reflecting sky and landscape in reverse

elements_en.name: Moonlit Shore
elements_en.desc: Tree-lined banks touched by soft moonlight glow

elements_en.name: Distant Stars
elements_en.desc: Small points of light scattered across the dark sky above

elements_en.name: Reflection Clarity
elements_en.desc: Exceptional detail in water reflections suggesting crystal clarity

elements_en.name: Night Sky Gradient
elements_en.desc: Deep blue-black sky providing contrast to silver moonlight

10_moonlight_lake.png.inspiration_en: The lake does not hold the moon—it simply convinces the moon to visit twice, once in the sky and once for itself.

02_dusk_birds.png.concept: 暮色中的飞鸟掠过天际，翅膀在夕阳余晖中闪烁，归巢的渴望

elements.name: 🌅 暮色
elements.desc: 暗红到深紫渐变的天空，色彩的饱和度在减淡

elements.name: 🐦 飞鸟
elements.desc: 数只小鸟展翅飞过，在暮色中只剩黑色剪影

elements.name: 🌾 田野
elements.desc: 前景的金色麦田或草地，在暮光中染上暖调

elements.name: 🌳 树影
elements.desc: 地平线上树林的深色剪影，鸟儿们飞向的目标

elements.name: 🏠 屋舍
elements.desc: 远处零星的村落灯火，开始亮起的温暖光点

02_dusk_birds.png.inspiration: 每一只鸟都有想回去的地方。那个地方，也许是某个人，也许是某个记忆。
02_dusk_birds.png.concept_en: Birds sweep across the dusk sky, their wings catching the warm glow of the setting sun. Silhouetted against the fading orange and purple twilight, they hurry homeward — a timeless scene of longing for shelter and belonging as day transitions into night.

elements_en.name: Flying birds
elements_en.desc: Flock of birds in silhouette, wings spread wide against the colorful evening sky

elements_en.name: Setting sun
elements_en.desc: Large warm sun descending toward the horizon, casting golden-orange light across the landscape

elements_en.name: Twilight sky
elements_en.desc: Beautiful gradient from warm orange near the sun to deep purple and blue above

elements_en.name: Distant hills

elements_en.name: Atmospheric haze

02_dusk_birds.png.inspiration_en: Every sunset reminds us — no matter how far we wander, home is always waiting in the direction of the light.

03_waterfall.png.concept: 山间瀑布从悬崖飞流直下，水雾腾起彩虹，水声仿佛回响在山谷间

elements.name: 💧 瀑布

elements.name: 🌈 水雾彩虹

elements.name: 🏔️ 岩石
elements.desc: 瀑布两侧的青灰色岩石，被常年水汽浸润，长满青苔

elements.name: 🌲 山林
elements.desc: 周围山壁上下的翠绿树林，为瀑布构筑绿色框架

elements.name: 🌊 潭水
elements.desc: 瀑布底部的碧绿深潭，水波荡漾，雾气氤氲

03_waterfall.png.inspiration: 瀑布的勇敢，不在于它的高度，而在于它纵身一跃的决心。
03_waterfall.png.concept_en: Waterfall—one of OpenClaw's powerful pixel art scenes where water discovers the meaning of surrender. A great cascade plunges from mossy cliffs into a crystal pool below, its constant motion creating perpetual mist that catches sunlight to form small rainbows. The composition celebrates gravity's paradox—that falling is not failure but transformation, and that water becomes more beautiful the further it falls, breaking itself into spray to become rainbows, mist, and music that no still water could ever compose.

elements_en.name: Cascading Waterfall
elements_en.desc: Powerful stream of water plunging from cliff height into pool below

elements_en.name: Mist and Spray
elements_en.desc: Rising water particles creating ethereal atmosphere around the cascade

elements_en.name: Rainbow in Mist
elements_en.desc: Colorful arc formed where sunlight meets falling water droplets

elements_en.name: Mossy Cliffs
elements_en.desc: Green-covered rock faces framing the waterfall on both sides

elements_en.name: Crystal Pool
elements_en.desc: Deep teal water at base collecting the falling stream

elements_en.name: Surrounding Mountains
elements_en.desc: Wooded peaks rising in distance behind the waterfall scene

elements_en.name: Sunlit Atmosphere
elements_en.desc: Bright natural lighting creating dramatic mist glow

elements_en.name: Forest Greenery
elements_en.desc: Lush vegetation surrounding the waterfall in natural abundance

03_waterfall.png.inspiration_en: Water does not fall—it flies downward with such grace that we call it falling, and it arrives more beautiful than when it left.

06_autumn_wheat.png.concept: 秋日午后金黄色的麦田随风起伏，麦穗在阳光下闪闪发亮，一派丰收景象

06_autumn_wheat.png.inspiration: 秋天的麦田是大地慷慨的笑容。每一株麦穗都装着阳光和雨露的故事。
06_autumn_wheat.png.concept_en: Golden wheat fields on an autumn afternoon swaying gently in the wind, wheat ears sparkling brilliantly under the warm sunlight, presenting a glorious harvest scene

elements_en.name: Golden wheat

elements_en.name: Sunlight

06_autumn_wheat.png.inspiration_en: Autumn's golden wheat carries the weight of a fruitful season

07_lighthouse.png.concept: 矗立海岬的灯塔在夜色中亮起光柱，为归航的船只指引方向

elements.name: 🗼 灯塔

elements.name: 🪨 礁石
elements.desc: 灯塔脚下的黑色岩石，被海浪反复冲刷

07_lighthouse.png.inspiration: 灯塔的光，是海员在黑夜中最温暖的目光。守塔人的孤独，换来千万人的平安。
07_lighthouse.png.concept_en: Lighthouse—one of OpenClaw's solitary pixel art scenes where a single tower becomes the difference between safety and disaster. A white lighthouse stands firm on a rocky headland as its powerful beam sweeps through the darkness, cutting through fog and storm to reach the distant ships below. The composition honors that ancient contract—loneliness in exchange for purpose, isolation in exchange for guidance, standing alone on the rocks so that others never have to stand alone on the water when they cannot see the shore.

elements_en.name: Lighthouse Tower
elements_en.desc: White lighthouse structure standing tall on the rocky headland

elements_en.name: Rotating Light Beam
elements_en.desc: Bright sweeping light cutting through the dark night atmosphere

elements_en.name: Rocky Promontory
elements_en.desc: Jagged coastal rocks beneath the lighthouse foundation

elements_en.name: Night Sky
elements_en.desc: Deep dark atmosphere with scattered stars visible above

elements_en.name: Rolling Ocean Waves
elements_en.desc: Dark water with white foam suggesting active sea conditions

elements_en.name: Distant Ships
elements_en.desc: Small vessels on the water receiving guidance from above

elements_en.name: Fog Atmosphere
elements_en.desc: Misty conditions making the lighthouse essential for navigation

elements_en.name: Coastal Scenery
elements_en.desc: Rocky shoreline details suggesting remote location

07_lighthouse.png.inspiration_en: The lighthouse does not fear darkness—it simply holds its light higher, because the purpose of brightness is not to compete with darkness but to remind it that dawn is always coming.

08_moonlight_lake.png.concept: 银色月光洒在平静湖面，一轮明月与倒影遥遥相对，水天一色

elements.name: 🌲 湖畔树影

elements.name: 🌙 月光倒影

08_moonlight_lake.png.inspiration: 月光下的湖面，有两轮月亮。天上那轮是指引，水中那颗是归宿。
08_moonlight_lake.png.concept_en: Silver moonlight spills across a tranquil lake — a bright full moon faces its perfect reflection across the water. Sky and lake merge into one seamless expanse of silver and deep blue, creating a dreamlike scene of serene nocturnal beauty where heaven gently reflects upon earth.

elements_en.name: Distant mountains

elements_en.name: Atmospheric glow
elements_en.desc: Soft silver-blue light creating an ethereal, dreamlike quality throughout

08_moonlight_lake.png.inspiration_en: The moon doesn't shine alone — in still water it finds its mirror, completing itself.

10_plum_snow.png.concept: 白雪覆盖的世界里，一树红梅独自绽放，冬日里最坚强的生命礼赞

elements.name: 🏠 雪屋

elements.name: 🌤️ 冬阳

10_plum_snow.png.inspiration: 在最寒冷的时候开花，需要最大的勇气。梅花的红，是热血的颜色。
10_plum_snow.png.concept_en: Plum Snow—one of OpenClaw's defiant pixel art scenes celebrating the most unlikely beauty of winter. A single plum tree bursts into crimson bloom against endless white snow, its delicate petals unapologetically red against the pure silence below. The composition honors that ancient Eastern wisdom—winter does not kill beauty, it merely waits for flowers brave enough to bloom when no one is watching, and the redder the snow, the more certain spring is on its way back to collect its forgotten promises.

elements_en.name: Crimson Plum Blossoms
elements_en.desc: Bright red flowers blooming on gnarled branches against white snow

elements_en.name: Pristine Snow Blanket
elements_en.desc: Pure white snow covering ground and branches in soft accumulation

elements_en.name: Leafless Plum Tree
elements_en.desc: Bare dark branches creating elegant contrast with red flowers and white snow

elements_en.name: Snow-Covered Ground
elements_en.desc: Undulating snow surface creating soft landscape texture

elements_en.name: Fragile Petals
elements_en.desc: Delicate flower details suggesting tenderness despite hardy bloom

elements_en.name: Deep Red Contrast
elements_en.desc: Bold red against white creating striking visual impact

elements_en.name: Winter Light
elements_en.desc: Soft cool lighting suggesting early morning or overcast day

elements_en.name: Solitary Beauty
elements_en.desc: One tree standing alone emphasizing courage and independence

10_plum_snow.png.inspiration_en: The plum does not bloom to announce spring—it blooms because it remembers that winter is always temporary, and beauty needs no permission to exist.

01_rain_cafe.png.concept: 雨中的咖啡馆窗内透出暖光，雨丝在窗外斜织，一杯咖啡的温暖孤独

01_rain_cafe.png.inspiration: 雨天咖啡馆，是一座避世的港湾。窗外是世界的喧嚣，窗内是一人的安宁。
01_rain_cafe.png.concept_en: Rain Café—one of OpenClaw's intimate pixel art scenes celebrating the small mercy of warmth found inside while the world outside grows cold and wet. A small café glows golden through rain-streaked windows while pedestrians hurry past with umbrellas, and inside someone sits alone with cooling coffee, grateful for this small shelter from the beautiful inconvenience of rain. The composition honors that urban sanctuary—the café is not just a building but a contract between strangers, one that says we will pretend together that this rain is romantic rather than inconvenient, and that your loneliness is actually solitude, which sounds so much more dignified when written in fog on window glass.

elements_en.name: Glowing Café Interior
elements_en.desc: Warm golden light spilling through windows creating pool of comfort

elements_en.name: Rain-Streaked Windows
elements_en.desc: Water droplets running down glass in curved patterns

elements_en.name: Warm Window Glow

elements_en.name: Hurrying Pedestrians

elements_en.name: Dark Rainy Sky

elements_en.desc: Colorful shop signs adding urban atmosphere and reflected colors

01_rain_cafe.png.inspiration_en: The café does not care if you are happy or sad—it simply promises that the rain cannot reach you here, and that your coffee will stay warm longer than your memories.

02_waterfall.png.concept: 山间瀑布飞珠溅玉，水声仿佛在耳畔轰鸣，大自然的磅礴力量

elements.name: 💧 瀑布

02_waterfall.png.inspiration: 瀑布的勇气，是知道悬崖在前方，还愿意纵身跃下。
02_waterfall.png.concept_en: Waterfall—one of OpenClaw's powerful pixel art scenes where falling water becomes a symphony of motion and mist. A great cascade plunges down rocky cliffs into a deep pool below, its endless flow generating spray that sparkles like scattered jewels while thundering sound echoes through the mountain valley. The composition celebrates nature's magnificent indifference—that water does not fall because it must but because it has learned that surrender can look like flight, and that the deepest pools are always found at the base of the highest falls, where chaos transforms into crystal stillness.

elements_en.name: Cascading Waterfall
elements_en.desc: Powerful stream of water plunging dramatically from cliff height into misty pool

elements_en.name: Sparkling Spray
elements_en.desc: Droplets catching light as they scatter in the air around the cascade

elements_en.name: Rocky Cliff Faces
elements_en.desc: Weathered stone walls framing the waterfall on both sides

elements_en.name: Foaming Pool Below
elements_en.desc: White water churning at the base where falling water meets still surface

elements_en.name: Mountain Valley
elements_en.desc: Forested slopes rising on either side channeling the sound upward

elements_en.name: Sunlit Mist
elements_en.desc: Ethereal glow created where sunlight meets the perpetual spray

elements_en.name: Dense Pine Forest
elements_en.desc: Green trees covering surrounding mountains adding depth and scale

elements_en.name: Hidden Source Above
elements_en.desc: Where the river begins its dramatic descent out of sight

02_waterfall.png.inspiration_en: Water falls not because it has failed—but because it has discovered that becoming mist is just another form of flying.

03_lighthouse.png.concept: 海蚀崖上的灯塔傲然矗立，守护着这片海域的安宁，是海员的希望之塔

elements.name: 🗼 灯塔
elements.desc: 红白垂直条纹的塔身，在灰蓝色海天背景下十分醒目

elements.name: 🌊 海浪
elements.desc: 拍打岩岸的白色浪花，在礁石上碎成层层水沫

elements.name: 🪨 悬崖

elements.name: 海鸥

03_lighthouse.png.inspiration: 灯塔不需要任何人理解它的孤独。它只知道：只要我亮着，你就不怕黑。
03_lighthouse.png.concept_en: Lighthouse—one of OpenClaw's noble pixel art scenes where a solitary tower becomes a promise kept in stone and light. A white lighthouse stands firm on a sea-eroded cliff, its beam sweeping through darkness and storm to guide lost ships safely home. The composition honors that ancient maritime contract—isolation in exchange for purpose, silence in exchange for lives saved, standing alone on the rocks so that others never have to be lost alone on the water when the shore cannot be seen.

elements_en.name: Lighthouse Tower
elements_en.desc: White cylindrical tower standing proud on the eroded coastal cliff

elements_en.name: Spiral Light Beam
elements_en.desc: Powerful beam rotating through darkness guiding ships at sea

elements_en.name: Sea-Eroded Cliff
elements_en.desc: Dramatic rock formations carved by relentless ocean waves below

elements_en.name: Fierce Ocean Waves
elements_en.desc: Crashing white water against the cliff base far below

elements_en.name: Distant Ship Silhouettes
elements_en.desc: Small vessels navigating dangerous waters guided by the light

elements_en.name: Stormy Sky
elements_en.desc: Dark atmosphere suggesting challenging conditions where light is most needed

elements_en.name: Coastal Rocks
elements_en.desc: Jagged shoreline details showing nature's erosion work over centuries

elements_en.name: Red Accent Light
elements_en.desc: Secondary beacon light adding character to the lighthouse structure

03_lighthouse.png.inspiration_en: The lighthouse does not keep ships from the rocks—it simply reminds them that the shore exists, even when the night insists otherwise.

04_city_dawn.png.concept: 晨曦微露，城市天际线开始苏醒，高楼大厦在朝阳中披上金纱

04_city_dawn.png.concept_en: Dawn breaks softly over the city as skyscrapers begin to wake up, draped in golden silk by the rising sun. This painting captures that magical moment when urban architecture transforms into glowing silhouettes—where steel meets warmth, and a new day brings endless possibilities.

04_city_dawn.png.inspiration_en: Every dawn whispers that hope returns with the rising sun.

06_sakura_courtyard.png.concept: 日式庭院中樱花如雪般飘落，灯笼古朴典雅，春日限定的美景

06_sakura_courtyard.png.concept_en: Sakura Courtyard—one of OpenClaw's serene pixel art scenes capturing the fleeting poetry of Japanese spring. Pink cherry blossoms drift like gentle snow across a traditional garden courtyard where stone lanterns stand in quiet dignity among gnarled sakura trees. The composition honors that Japanese aesthetic of mono no aware—that beauty exists precisely because it cannot stay, and the lanterns have witnessed enough springs to know that waiting for fallen petals is just another way of saying hello to them one last time.

elements_en.name: Traditional Architecture

06_sakura_courtyard.png.inspiration_en: The lantern has watched enough springs to know that waiting for fallen petals is just another way of saying goodbye to them one last time.
