elements.name: 🦋 蜂蝶
elements.desc: 花间飞舞的白色蝴蝶和嗡嗡的蜜蜂，春意盎然

07_sakura_swing.png.inspiration: 童年的秋千，摇啊摇，摇到外婆桥。外婆桥上落樱花，摇啊摇，摇到外婆家。
07_sakura_swing.png.concept_en: Sakura Swing—one of OpenClaw's nostalgic pixel art scenes celebrating the simplest joys of spring childhood. A rope swing hangs from a cherry blossom branch, its wooden seat worn smooth by years of children who swung here before, while pink petals drift down to carpet the grass below in soft layers of fleeting spring. The composition returns us to that ancient and eternal truth—that happiness is not complicated, it is just a rope and a tree and the courage to kick off the ground and see how high the sky can hold you before the swing comes back down to remind you that gravity was never really the enemy, only the condition that made flying possible in the first place.

elements_en.name: Rope Swing
elements_en.desc: Traditional wooden seat suspended by thick rope from cherry branch

elements_en.name: Cherry Blossom Tree
elements_en.desc: Full pink-bloomed sakura tree providing shade and beauty above

elements_en.name: Drifting Petals
elements_en.desc: Pink blossoms falling through air in soft scattered patterns

elements_en.name: Grass Covered Ground
elements_en.desc: Green grass below with pink petal carpet accumulating

elements_en.name: Spring Light
elements_en.desc: Warm gentle illumination suggesting late spring afternoon

elements_en.name: Swing Motion Trail
elements_en.desc: Subtle suggestion of movement frozen in pixel detail

elements_en.name: Rural Garden Setting
elements_en.desc: Peaceful outdoor space with natural surrounding elements

elements_en.name: Worn Wooden Seat
elements_en.desc: Smooth seat suggesting years of joyful use by children

07_sakura_swing.png.inspiration_en: The swing does not care how old you are—it only asks one question: how much courage do you have left to kick off the ground?

08_star_tent.png.concept: 星空下的露营帐篷，篝火跳跃，远山如黛，星河璀璨如钻

elements.name: 🌌 星空
elements.desc: 没有光污染的纯净夜空，银河璀璨如河流过

elements.name: ⛺ 帐篷
elements.desc: 三角形露营帐篷，米色布料，篝火照亮了帐底

elements.name: 🔥 篝火
elements.desc: 帐篷前的旺盛火堆，火星向上飞溅，温暖而浪漫

elements.name: 🏔️ 远山
elements.desc: campsite 后的黛色远山，锯齿状的峰峦在天际线上起伏

elements.name: 🌲 树林
elements.desc: 帐篷后的深色树林轮廓，在火光中隐约可见

08_star_tent.png.inspiration: 露营的夜晚，银河伸手可及。火堆虽小，却烘干了所有孤独。
08_star_tent.png.concept_en: A camping tent beneath a brilliant starry sky — warm campfire flickering nearby while distant mountains stand in soft dark silhouette. The Milky Way arches overhead like scattered diamonds, transforming a simple wilderness night into a celestial wonderland where every star has a story to tell.

elements_en.name: Camping tent
elements_en.desc: Cozy tent with warm interior glow, nestled among the natural landscape under the stars

elements_en.name: Crackling campfire
elements_en.desc: Bright warm flames dancing in the darkness, casting orange light and flickering shadows

elements_en.name: Milky Way galaxy
elements_en.desc: Brilliant band of countless stars arcing across the night sky, sparkling like scattered diamonds

elements_en.name: Distant mountains
elements_en.desc: Dark purple mountain silhouettes on the horizon, adding depth and framing the sky

elements_en.name: Night sky stars
elements_en.desc: Thousands of individual stars twinkling throughout the dark blue sky

elements_en.name: Atmospheric glow
elements_en.desc: Soft warm light from the fire contrasting beautifully with the cool starlight

08_star_tent.png.inspiration_en: The best ceiling you'll ever sleep under — each star a witness to your dreams, the fire your oldest friend.

09_yurt.png.concept: 辽阔草原上白色蒙古包星星点点，骏马成群，天苍苍野茫茫的壮美

elements.name: 🏕️ 蒙古包
elements.desc: 白色圆顶帐篷，织物纹理清晰可见，门口挂着彩色旗幡

elements.name: 🐴 骏马
elements.desc: 草原上成群的棕马，或低头吃草或昂首远眺

elements.name: 🌿 草原
elements.desc: 碧绿起伏的草地，延伸至天边，与蓝天白云相接

elements.name: ☁️ 白云
elements.desc: 蒙古包顶上飘过的朵朵白云，棉花糖般洁白

elements.name: 🌬️ 劲风
elements.desc: 被风吹得斜斜的牧草，和飘扬的旗幡，显示草原的风

09_yurt.png.inspiration: 蒙古包虽小，装得下整片草原。牧民的心有多大，天就有多大。
09_yurt.png.concept_en: Yurt—one of OpenClaw's expansive pixel art scenes celebrating the nomadic soul of the great grassland. White Mongolian yurts dot the vast prairie like scattered clouds settled on the earth, while horses graze peacefully in small herds against the endless horizon where sky and grass merge into a single infinite blue-green stretch. The composition honors that ancient freedom—the yurt is built to be taken down and carried to wherever the grass needs feeding, and home is not a place you own but a way you live, and the horizon is not a border but an invitation to keep moving toward whatever beauty waits just beyond the next hill where the horses have already gone to find it.

elements_en.name: White Mongolian Yurts
elements_en.desc: Traditional round tents scattered across the grassland in small clusters

elements_en.name: Grazing Horses
elements_en.desc: Small herds of horses moving across the prairie in natural groups

elements_en.name: Vast Grassland
elements_en.desc: Expansive green prairie stretching to the distant horizon

elements_en.name: Sky Meeting Earth
elements_en.desc: Horizon line where blue sky merges seamlessly with green grassland

elements_en.name: Distant Mountains
elements_en.desc: Purple-blue mountain silhouettes rising against the horizon edge

elements_en.name: Scattered Clouds
elements_en.desc: White clouds drifting across the vast open sky above

elements_en.name: Nomadic Freedom
elements_en.desc: Overall sense of space and possibility in every direction

elements_en.name: Warm Sunlight
elements_en.desc: Golden afternoon light illuminating the prairie scene

09_yurt.png.inspiration_en: Home is not a place you own but a way you live—and the horses always know which direction the best grass is growing, so following them is following home itself.

01_fireplace_cat.png.concept: 壁炉内火焰跳动，橘猫蜷卧在炉前地毯上，窗外飘雪，岁月静好

elements.name: 🔥 壁炉
elements.desc: 石砌壁炉内跳动的火焰，橙红暖光映照着周围

elements.name: 🐱 橘猫
elements.desc: 圆滚滚的橘猫蜷在地毯上，尾巴轻卷，眯眼假寐

elements.name: ❄️ 窗外雪
elements.desc: 壁炉窗外的飘雪夜景，雪花纷飞，模糊了玻璃

elements.name: 📚 书架
elements.desc: 壁炉旁的书架，摆满书籍，透着文雅气息

elements.name: 🪵 柴火
elements.desc: 壁炉旁堆叠的木柴，准备着下一个寒冷夜晚

01_fireplace_cat.png.inspiration: 最幸福的事，是在温暖的房间里，看窗外风雪，怀里有猫，身边有火。
01_fireplace_cat.png.concept_en: Flames dance in the fireplace while an orange tabby curls up on the rug before the warm hearth. Snow drifts past the window — a perfect moment of cozy winter tranquility where warmth and serenity embrace, the kind of peaceful afternoon that makes time feel generous and kind.

elements_en.name: Dancing fireplace flames
elements_en.desc: Warm orange and yellow flames leaping and flickering inside a stone or brick fireplace

elements_en.name: Orange tabby cat
elements_en.desc: Cute curled-up cat sleeping peacefully on a soft rug in front of the fire

elements_en.name: Cozy rug
elements_en.desc: Warm-colored woven rug providing a comfortable resting spot for the cat

elements_en.name: Snow falling outside
elements_en.desc: White snowflakes drifting down beyond frost-touched window glass

elements_en.name: Warm interior glow
elements_en.desc: Soft golden light filling the room from the fire, creating a sense of comfort and safety

elements_en.name: Winter atmosphere
elements_en.desc: Cool blue tones visible through the window contrasting with warm indoor firelight

01_fireplace_cat.png.inspiration_en: Some moments are made for stillness — the fire hums, the cat dreams, and the snow falls gently outside.

02_rainbow_cabin.png.concept: 彩虹尽头的小木屋静静伫立，童话氛围让现实也温柔起来

elements.name: 🌈 彩虹
elements.desc: 七色彩虹弧跨天际，清晰的拱桥形状，光彩夺目

elements.name: 🏠 小木屋
elements.desc: 原木色的简约小屋，窗台上有花盆，屋顶有烟囱冒炊烟

elements.name: 🌳 树林
elements.desc: 小屋周围的密林，彩虹的光芒穿透树叶缝隙

elements.name: 🌺 花园
elements.desc: 小屋门前开满的各色花朵，红的黄的紫的，如小花园

elements.name: 🦌 小鹿
elements.desc: 花园中探头的一只小鹿，好奇地望着镜头

02_rainbow_cabin.png.inspiration: 我相信彩虹的尽头有宝藏。但我更相信，彩虹尽头的那座小屋，就是归宿。
02_rainbow_cabin.png.concept_en: A small cabin stands quietly where a rainbow touches down — fairy-tale atmosphere makes even reality feel gentle. This magical scene bridges the ordinary and the wondrous, where a single colorful arc transforms a simple forest dwelling into a place where dreams and daily life become one.

elements_en.name: Wooden cabin
elements_en.desc: Small cozy cabin with warm brown wood and glowing windows, nestled peacefully in the forest

elements_en.name: Rainbow's end
elements_en.desc: Vivid seven-color rainbow touching down right beside the cabin, as if arriving just for a visit

elements_en.name: Forest setting
elements_en.desc: Lush green trees surrounding the cabin, creating a natural woodland sanctuary

elements_en.name: Dreamy sky
elements_en.desc: Soft blue sky with warm light suggesting the golden hour or magical twilight

elements_en.name: Meadow flowers
elements_en.desc: Colorful wildflowers dotting the grassy area around the cabin

elements_en.name: Fairy-tale glow
elements_en.desc: Soft atmospheric light creating a gentle, enchanting quality throughout the scene

02_rainbow_cabin.png.inspiration_en: Fairytales aren't just stories — sometimes they end where a rainbow touches home.

03_desert_oasis.png.concept: 沙漠中的绿洲是旅人的希望，清澈泉水边椰枣树摇曳，生命在此绽放

elements.name: 🏜️ 沙漠
elements.desc: 金沙起伏的沙海，沙丘曲线优美，在阳光下明暗分明

elements.name: 💧 清泉
elements.desc: 绿洲中央碧绿的泉水，清澈见底，映着天空的颜色

elements.name: 🌴 椰枣树
elements.desc: 高耸的椰枣树，羽状叶在风中沙沙，树下有阴凉

elements.name: 🐪 骆驼
elements.desc: 三两骆驼在绿洲边饮水或休息，驼峰挺立

elements.name: 🌅 落日
elements.desc: 沙漠尽头的落日，将天边染成玫瑰红，与金沙相接

03_desert_oasis.png.inspiration: 沙漠教会我：即使在最不可能的地方，也要相信自己能够绽放。
03_desert_oasis.png.concept_en: An oasis in the golden desert — a traveler's beacon of hope where crystal-clear spring water meets towering date palms. Life blooms against impossible odds in this paradise, reminding every weary wanderer that miracles exist even in the harshest places, always within reach for those who keep walking forward.

elements_en.name: Clear spring water
elements_en.desc: Sparkling turquoise water pool reflecting blue sky and green palms, life-giving and pristine

elements_en.name: Date palm trees
elements_en.desc: Tall slender palms with feathery fronds swaying gently by the water's edge

elements_en.name: Golden sand dunes
elements_en.desc: Warm amber dunes stretching endlessly around the oasis, harsh yet beautiful

elements_en.name: Desert sun
elements_en.desc: Bright golden sun casting intense light across the desert landscape

elements_en.name: Life around the oasis
elements_en.desc: Various plants, flowers and birds finding sanctuary in this green paradise

elements_en.name: Traveler's refuge
elements_en.desc: The oasis as a place of rest and renewal, a symbol of hope and survival

03_desert_oasis.png.inspiration_en: The desert teaches patience — those who persist will always find their oasis waiting.

05_moonlight_lake.png.concept: 银色月光如水般倾泻湖面，波光粼粼中映出月影，天上人间双月悬

elements.name: 🌙 月亮
elements.desc: 圆润的满月挂在高空，银光洒满湖面，如同碎银铺满

elements.name: 💧 湖面
elements.desc: 波光粼粼的水面，月光在波纹上跳跃闪烁

elements.name: 🌲 松岸
elements.desc: 湖边苍翠的松林，在月光下呈现剪影，针叶清晰可见

elements.name: ⭐ 星光
elements.desc: 除月亮外，湖面还倒映着满天星辰，难辨天上水中

elements.name: 🌸 夜花
elements.desc: 岸边夜间绽放的白花，在月光下散发着幽香

05_moonlight_lake.png.inspiration: 月亮是天空写给湖面的情诗。每一次波光，都是月亮的回信。
05_moonlight_lake.png.concept_en: Silver moonlight pours like water across the lake surface, shimmering waves reflecting the moon's image. Two moons hang in heaven and earth — one in the sky, one on the water, creating a perfect symmetry of celestial beauty that blurs the boundary between the real and the reflected.

elements_en.name: Full moon
elements_en.desc: Bright silver moon hanging in the deep blue night sky, source of all the moonlight's magic

elements_en.name: Lake surface
elements_en.desc: Smooth tranquil water receiving and redistributing the moonlight in countless ripples

elements_en.name: Moon reflection
elements_en.desc: Perfect mirror image of the moon on the water, creating twin celestial bodies

elements_en.name: Silver shimmer
elements_en.desc: Countless light sparkles dancing across the water, like scattered diamonds

elements_en.name: Distant shore
elements_en.desc: Dark tree line and shore visible on the horizon, grounding the scene

elements_en.name: Atmospheric silver glow
elements_en.desc: Overall luminous silver-blue tone creating an ethereal, meditative atmosphere

05_moonlight_lake.png.inspiration_en: Two moons remind us — sometimes what we seek is already here, simply reflected differently.

06_dusk_birds.png.concept: 暮色中群鸟归巢，飞过金色天际，在落日余晖中化为灵动的黑色音符

elements.name: 🌅 落日余晖
elements.desc: 天边的金红色晚霞，在山线上方铺陈着温暖的光辉

elements.name: 🐦 鸟群
elements.desc: 无数飞鸟在暮色中穿梭，在余晖中化为黑色剪影

elements.name: 🌾 麦田
elements.desc: 金色麦田在前景延伸，丰收的颜色与暮色相融

elements.name: 🌳 树林
elements.desc: 远处的树林在暮色中呈现深紫色，是归鸟的方向

elements.name: 🏚️ 暮烟
elements.desc: 远处村落升起袅袅炊烟，预告着家的味道

06_dusk_birds.png.inspiration: 黄昏是白昼和黑夜交接的仪式。每一只飞鸟，都是这场仪式的见证者。
06_dusk_birds.png.concept_en: At dusk, flocks of birds return home flying across the golden sky, becoming dynamic black notes against the warm sunset afterglow

elements_en.name: Twilight sky
elements_en.desc: Golden and orange gradient sky at dusk

elements_en.name: Returning birds
elements_en.desc: Flocks of birds flying in formation heading home

elements_en.name: Sunset afterglow
elements_en.desc: Warm orange light painting the horizon

elements_en.name: Bird silhouettes
elements_en.desc: Dark shapes against the bright sky like musical notes

06_dusk_birds.png.inspiration_en: Birds are nature's brushstrokes painting the twilight sky

07_rain_cafe.png.concept: 细雨中的咖啡馆，窗户布满雨滴，内透暖黄灯光，浪漫忧郁交织

elements.name: ☔ 雨滴
elements.desc: 玻璃窗上密密麻麻的雨滴，折射出朦胧的光晕

elements.name: ☕ 咖啡馆
elements.desc: 窗内温暖的鹅黄灯光，窗缘挂着水珠，空间温馨

elements.name: 🌧️ 雨幕
elements.desc: 窗外斜织的雨丝，将街景模糊成朦胧的色彩

elements.name: 🚶 行人
elements.desc: 街对面撑着伞的模糊人影，匆匆走过

elements.name: 🌿 绿植
elements.desc: 窗台上的绿植在雨天更翠，被雨水洗涤得发亮

07_rain_cafe.png.inspiration: 有人说孤独的人喜欢雨天。而我喜欢的是雨天的咖啡馆——孤独但不寂寞。
07_rain_cafe.png.concept_en: Rain Café—one of OpenClaw's melancholic pixel art scenes where romance and sadness become the same quiet feeling. A café glows amber through rain-dropped windows while outside the world softens into watercolor blur, and inside someone sits alone watching water trace paths down the glass like thoughts they cannot quite organize into words, knowing that this gentle ache is not really sadness but something closer to being fully alive in a world that is too beautiful and too incomplete to ever fully explain.

elements_en.name: Rain-Covered Windows
elements_en.desc: Glass surface covered with water droplets creating blur and distortion

elements_en.name: Warm Amber Interior
elements_en.desc: Golden yellow light spilling through windows creating warm pool of comfort

elements_en.name: Blurred City Outside
elements_en.desc: Soft-focus urban scene through rain-blurred glass suggesting distance

elements_en.name: Droplet Reflections
elements_en.desc: Light dancing through raindrops creating sparkling patterns

elements_en.name: Empty Chair
elements_en.desc: Single seat suggesting someone's recent departure or anticipated arrival

elements_en.name: Reflective Pavement
elements_en.desc: Wet street outside reflecting café lights in gentle colors

elements_en.name: Overhead Sign
elements_en.desc: Café signage visible through the rain creating urban detail

elements_en.name: Gentle Rain
elements_en.desc: Soft continuous rainfall creating the overall mood of quiet reflection

07_rain_cafe.png.inspiration_en: The rain does not make us sad—it simply gives our happiness a softer background so we can finally hear it clearly.

08_bamboo_stream.png.concept: 竹林深处的小溪清澈见底，竹叶漂流，水波荡漾，东方古典之美

elements.name: 🎋 竹子
elements.desc: 高耸的青竹，竹节分明，在微风中轻轻摇曳

elements.name: 💧 溪流
elements.desc: 清浅的山溪，鹅卵石在水底颗颗可见

elements.name: 🍃 落叶
elements.desc: 漂浮在水面上的竹叶，如绿色小舟顺流而下

elements.name: 🪨 磐石
elements.desc: 溪中大石头，上生苔藓，被流水绕行

elements.name: 🌿 水草
elements.desc: 水底柔软的水草在流水中舞动，如绿丝带

08_bamboo_stream.png.inspiration: 竹林听雨，是古人四大雅事之一。而我独爱竹林观水，水静流而竹常青。
08_bamboo_stream.png.concept_en: A stream deep in the bamboo grove, crystal clear and bottom-visible. Bamboo leaves float lazily on gentle ripples while soft light filters through emerald canopies above. This serene scene captures Eastern classical beauty — where tranquility, nature, and artistry merge into one harmonious moment, ancient and eternal.

elements_en.name: Dense bamboo forest
elements_en.desc: Towering green bamboo stalks rising tall, their slender forms creating natural cathedral columns

elements_en.name: Crystal stream
elements_en.desc: Clear shallow water flowing gently, every pebble visible on the stream bed below

elements_en.name: Floating bamboo leaves
elements_en.desc: Delicate yellow-green leaves drifting on the water's surface, riding natural currents

elements_en.name: Dancing ripples
elements_en.desc: Soft concentric waves rippling across the water, catching light as they move

elements_en.name: Filtered light
elements_en.desc: Soft green-gold light filtering through bamboo canopy, creating dappled patterns

elements_en.name: Rock formations
elements_en.desc: Smooth river stones and mossy rocks along the stream bed, grounding the scene in nature

08_bamboo_stream.png.inspiration_en: In stillness we find depth — the clearest stream runs through the quietest forest.

09_star_tent.png.concept: 银河下的露营帐篷，与三两星辰共眠，回归大自然的宁静之夜

elements.name: 🌌 银河
elements.desc: 横跨夜空的浓密星河，无数星辰密密麻麻地聚集

elements.name: ⛺ 帐篷
elements.desc: 三角形帐篷在星光下呈现温暖的轮廓，帐内透出微光

elements.name: 🔥 篝火
elements.desc: 帐篷旁即将燃尽的篝火，余烬发着红光，暖意犹存

elements.name: 🌲 松树
elements.desc: 营地周围的松树，在星空下呈深色金字塔形剪影

elements.name: 🦌 夜鹿
elements.desc: 远处一只小鹿在月光下驻足，好奇地望着营地

09_star_tent.png.inspiration: 在城市里，我只能看见几颗星星。但在星空下，我发现我的孤独算不了什么。
09_star_tent.png.concept_en: A camping tent beneath the Milky Way — sleeping among scattered stars, returning to nature's peaceful night. The universe wraps around a small shelter like a blanket, reminding city-weary souls that the night sky was always their first home, free and infinite and eternally welcoming.

elements_en.name: Camping tent
elements_en.desc: Cozy tent silhouetted against the star-filled sky, a small warm shelter in the vast wilderness

elements_en.name: Milky Way galaxy
elements_en.desc: Brilliant band of stars arching across the sky, countless points of light forming our cosmic river

elements_en.name: Scattered stars
elements_en.desc: Individual bright stars scattered throughout the dark sky, each one a distant sun

elements_en.name: Distant mountains
elements_en.desc: Dark purple mountain silhouettes framing the horizon, grounding the celestial scene

elements_en.name: Night atmosphere
elements_en.desc: Deep blue-black night sky with atmospheric depth suggesting vast open space

elements_en.name: Natural setting
elements_en.desc: Simple wilderness environment, trees or hills surrounding the tent, emphasizing the return to nature

09_star_tent.png.inspiration_en: Look up tonight — the stars have been waiting patiently to welcome you home to the sky.

10_waterfall.png.concept: 山间瀑布从高处倾泻而下，水声如雷贯耳，水雾弥漫山谷

elements.name: 💧 瀑布
elements.desc: 从山顶奔涌而下的水流，如银链悬挂，撞击岩壁激起水雾

elements.name: 🏔️ 崖壁
elements.desc: 两侧绿色的岩石崖壁，苔藓斑驳，被水气湿润

elements.name: 🌳 山林
elements.desc: 山顶苍翠的原始森林，云雾缭绕，神秘幽深

elements.name: 🌈 水雾虹
elements.desc: 阳光穿过水雾形成的淡淡彩虹，横跨瀑布前方

elements.name: 潭水
elements.desc: 瀑布下碧绿的深潭，水面波光粼粼，倒映着山光

10_waterfall.png.inspiration: 瀑布不需要观众。它只知道自己要往下跳，就跳了。这是一种勇气。
10_waterfall.png.concept_en: A mountain waterfall cascades from great heights, thundering through the valley while mist fills the air. This powerful scene captures nature's raw energy — a gentle stream transforming into a majestic fall, dancing over ancient rocks and disappearing into the gorge below, eternal and unstoppable.

elements_en.name: Cascading waterfall
elements_en.desc: Powerful waterfall pouring down from mountain heights, white water contrasting against dark rock faces

elements_en.name: Mist and spray
elements_en.desc: Thick white mist rising from where water crashes against rocks, filling the surrounding air

elements_en.name: Rocky gorge
elements_en.desc: Steep dark rock walls flanking the waterfall, creating a dramatic canyon setting

elements_en.name: Mountain setting
elements_en.desc: Lush green mountains rising behind and around the waterfall scene

elements_en.name: Foaming base
elements_en.desc: White frothy water pooling at the bottom where falls meet river

elements_en.name: Atmospheric mist
elements_en.desc: Soft ethereal fog softening the scene, adding depth and mysterious beauty

10_waterfall.png.inspiration_en: Water carves stone through patience — the waterfall's song is simply persistence set to music.

04-19_02_autumn_wheat.png.concept: 秋日午后的麦田，金色的麦穗在阳光下闪耀

elements.name: 🌾 麦田
elements.desc: 金黄色麦浪随风起伏

elements.name: ☀️ 阳光
elements.desc: 温暖的午后阳光

elements.name: 🍂 落叶
elements.desc: 飘落的秋叶点缀其间

04-19_02_autumn_wheat.png.inspiration: 印象派油画风格，暖色调笔触感，金色麦浪与蓝色天空形成补色对比，乡村田园的宁静氛围
04-19_02_autumn_wheat.png.concept_en: Autumn Wheat—one of OpenClaw's golden pixel art scenes celebrating harvest's quiet abundance. Fields of golden wheat stretch to the horizon under warm afternoon light, each stalk heavy with grain swaying gently in the autumn breeze like thousands of tiny flames dancing in synchronized waves across the landscape, promising that what was planted in hope can always be gathered in gratitude when the season finally agrees that waiting is finished.

elements_en.name: Golden Wheat Fields
elements_en.desc: Endless rows of grain stretching to distant horizon in warm tones

elements_en.name: Ripe Wheat Stalks
elements_en.desc: Heavy-headed stalks bending under the weight of harvest-ready grain

elements_en.name: Warm Autumn Light
elements_en.desc: Golden afternoon sun illuminating the scene with harvest warmth

elements_en.name: Swaying Motion
elements_en.desc: Gentle wind creating wave patterns through the grain field

elements_en.name: Distant Horizon
elements_en.desc: Far boundary where wheat meets sky in golden haze

elements_en.name: Scattered Birds
elements_en.desc: Small birds among stalks suggesting life in the harvest field

elements_en.name: Soft Sky
elements_en.desc: Warm-toned atmosphere complementing the golden landscape

elements_en.name: Rural Peace
elements_en.desc: Overall sense of quiet abundance and seasonal completion

04-19_02_autumn_wheat.png.inspiration_en: The wheat does not bow because it is tired—it bows because it has finally grown heavy enough to mean something.

04-19_04_city_dawn.png.concept: 晨曦中的城市天际线，第一缕阳光穿透云层照亮高楼

elements.name: 🏙️ 天际线
elements.desc: 参差的摩天大楼剪影

elements.name: 🌅 朝霞
elements.desc: 橙红渐变的晨曦天空

elements.name: ✈️ 飞鸟
elements.desc: 天空中的飞鸟剪影

04-19_04_city_dawn.png.inspiration: 清晨的城市有一种特殊的魔力——太阳刚刚升起，整座城市像是刚从沉睡中苏醒，带着露水的气息和无限的可能。我想把这道光永远留住。
04-19_04_city_dawn.png.concept_en: City skyline awakening at dawn — first golden sunlight piercing through morning clouds to illuminate towering buildings. The urban landscape transforms from dark silhouette to warm brilliance as daybreak paints skyscrapers in shades of amber and rose, a daily miracle of light reclaiming the concrete jungle.

elements_en.name: City skyline
elements_en.desc: Row of tall buildings and skyscrapers forming the urban silhouette against the dawn sky

elements_en.name: First sunlight
elements_en.desc: Golden morning rays breaking through clouds, casting warm light across the city

elements_en.name: Cloud layers
elements_en.desc: Soft clouds in transition from night blue to dawn pink and orange, lit from behind by rising sun

elements_en.name: Building reflections
elements_en.desc: Warm golden glow spreading across glass facades and windows of tall structures

elements_en.name: Morning sky gradient
elements_en.desc: Beautiful transition from deep blue above to warm orange and pink near the horizon

elements_en.name: Atmospheric haze
elements_en.desc: Soft morning mist adding depth and softening the distant buildings

04-19_04_city_dawn.png.inspiration_en: Every city day begins the same way — darkness yields, and light always finds its way home.

04-19_01_autumn_wheat.png.concept: 秋日午后的麦田，金色的麦穗在阳光下闪耀

04-19_01_autumn_wheat.png.inspiration: 写实摄影风格，侧光拍摄，阳光透过麦穗间隙形成光斑，远景农舍增添生活气息
04-19_01_autumn_wheat.png.concept_en: Autumn Wheat—one of OpenClaw's golden pixel art scenes celebrating the harvest's quiet abundance. Fields of amber wheat stretch endlessly beneath warm afternoon light, each stalk heavy with grain swaying in gentle autumn breeze like thousands of small flames dancing in synchronized waves across the landscape, whispering that what was planted in hope can always be gathered in gratitude when the season finally agrees that waiting is over.

elements_en.name: Golden Wheat Fields
elements_en.desc: Endless fields of amber grain stretching toward the distant horizon in warm tones

elements_en.name: Ripe Wheat Stalks

elements_en.name: Warm Autumn Light
elements_en.desc: Golden afternoon sun casting warm illumination across the entire scene

elements_en.name: Swaying Grain Motion

elements_en.name: Soft Amber Sky

04-19_01_autumn_wheat.png.inspiration_en: The wheat does not bow because it is tired—it bows because it has finally grown heavy enough to mean something.

04-19_09_dusk_birds.png.concept: 黄昏时分飞鸟归巢，天边晚霞如火

elements.name: 🐦 飞鸟
elements.desc: 成群结队的飞鸟剪影

elements.name: 🌅 晚霞
elements.desc: 橙红渐变的黄昏天空

elements.name: 🌳 树林
elements.desc: silhouettes of trees at dusk

04-19_09_dusk_birds.png.inspiration: 黄昏是一天中最温柔的时刻。太阳慢慢沉入地平线，天边燃烧着最后的绚烂，飞鸟成群结队地掠过天空，向着家的方向飞去。我站在窗前看得出神——原来归途也可以如此美丽。
04-19_09_dusk_birds.png.concept_en: Dusk Birds—one of OpenClaw's fiery pixel art scenes where the day's final light becomes a celebration. Silhouetted birds stream homeward across a sky ablaze with crimson and gold, their dark forms tracing graceful arcs through the dying sun like brushstrokes painted by a master calligrapher who understood that endings can be more beautiful than beginnings when you finally release the need to hold on and simply trust that the dark will bring its own kind of warmth if you let it.

elements_en.name: Birds in Flight
elements_en.desc: Dark silhouettes of birds heading home across the dramatic sky

elements_en.name: Blazing Sunset
elements_en.desc: Crimson and orange sky ablaze with dying golden light

elements_en.name: Warm Color Palette
elements_en.desc: Reds, oranges, and golds dominating the entire composition

elements_en.name: Distant Horizon
elements_en.desc: Where sky meets earth in a line of fire and shadow

elements_en.name: Scattered Flock
elements_en.desc: Multiple birds creating dynamic patterns across the sky

elements_en.name: Fiery Clouds
elements_en.desc: Clouds tinted in sunset colors adding texture to the atmosphere

elements_en.name: Silhouette Contrast
elements_en.desc: Dark bird shapes against bright sky creating strong visual impact

elements_en.name: Golden Light Rays
elements_en.desc: Sun beams spreading across the sky in dramatic streaks

04-19_09_dusk_birds.png.inspiration_en: The birds do not fly into the fire—they fly through it, trusting that home waits on the other side where the light cannot follow.

04-19_08_plum_snow.png.concept: 雪中的梅花傲然绽放，红白相映成趣

elements.name: 🌸 梅花
elements.desc: 粉红娇艳的梅花花瓣

elements.name: ❄️ 雪花
elements.desc: 纷纷扬扬的雪花

elements.name: 🌲 枝干
elements.desc: 苍劲有力的梅树枝干

04-19_08_plum_snow.png.inspiration: 雪落梅枝，红白相映，像是冬天留给春天的一封情书。创作时我仿佛闻到了梅花的幽香，感受到雪花落在睫毛上的微凉——那种在寒冷中依然绽放的生命力，最是动人心魄。
04-19_08_plum_snow.png.concept_en: Plum Snow—one of OpenClaw's poetic pixel art scenes where winter's harshness becomes the stage for unexpected beauty. Red plum blossoms open defiantly against pure white snow, their warm petals standing proud in the cold like brave hearts that understand that the secret to surviving winter is not to resist it but to bloom anyway, proving that the most beautiful things often grow in the places we thought were too cold for anything to survive, and that courage sometimes looks like a single red flower refusing to be intimidated by all that white silence surrounding it.

elements_en.name: Red Plum Blossoms
elements_en.desc: Bright crimson flowers opening proudly amid winter's grip

elements_en.name: Pure White Snow
elements_en.desc: Clean snow covering the ground creating stark contrast

elements_en.name: Snow-Covered Branches
elements_en.desc: Tree limbs dusted in white supporting the blooming flowers

elements_en.name: Red and White Contrast
elements_en.desc: The striking color pairing that defines the entire composition

elements_en.name: Winter Atmosphere
elements_en.desc: Cold environment suggesting the courage required to bloom here

elements_en.name: Delicate Petal Details
elements_en.desc: Individual flower petals rendered with care and precision

elements_en.name: Snow Drifts
elements_en.desc: Piled white snow adding texture to the winter landscape

elements_en.name: Silent Strength
elements_en.desc: Overall mood of quiet defiance and natural beauty

04-19_08_plum_snow.png.inspiration_en: Courage is not the absence of winter—it is blooming anyway, one petal at a time, until the snow learns your name.

04-19_09_aurora_mountain.png.concept: 极光下的雪山巍峨壮丽，色彩斑斓的极光在夜空舞动

elements.name: 🏔️ 雪山
elements.desc: 银白色的雪峰刺破天际

elements.name: 🌌 极光
elements.desc: 绿色紫色的绚丽极光

elements.name: ⭐ 星空
elements.desc: 璀璨的星河

04-19_09_aurora_mountain.png.inspiration: 极光是天空写给黑夜的情书，而雪山是大地写给天空的誓言。当这两种壮美相遇，整个世界都安静了，只剩下光在无声地舞蹈。我抬头仰望，感受到一种超越言语的敬畏与渺小。
04-19_09_aurora_mountain.png.concept_en: Aurora Mountain—one of OpenClaw's breathtaking pixel art scenes where Earth's sky puts on its most spectacular show. Snow-capped peaks rise beneath curtains of dancing green and purple aurora, their colors reflecting off fresh snow while the night itself seems alive with swirling light, creating a moment so impossibly beautiful it makes you understand why ancient peoples believed the sky was a living thing that dreamed in colors when it thought no one was watching.

elements_en.name: Snow-Capped Mountains
elements_en.desc: Majestic peaks covered in pristine white snow beneath the aurora

elements_en.name: Dancing Aurora
elements_en.desc: Curtains of green and purple light swirling across the night sky

elements_en.name: Reflected Snow
elements_en.desc: Snow surface catching aurora colors creating mirror effect below

elements_en.name: Night Sky
elements_en.desc: Deep dark atmosphere providing contrast for the luminous aurora

elements_en.name: Color Gradient Aurora
elements_en.desc: Transitions between green, purple, and other aurora hues

elements_en.name: Vast Landscape
elements_en.desc: Expansive mountain vista suggesting scale and grandeur

elements_en.name: Silent Night
elements_en.desc: Atmosphere of quiet wonder at natural spectacle above

elements_en.name: Cosmic Beauty
elements_en.desc: Overall scene suggesting something beyond ordinary human experience

04-19_09_aurora_mountain.png.inspiration_en: The mountain does not need the aurora to be beautiful—but the aurora needs the mountain to feel seen, so they dance together for company.

04-19_02_lighthouse.png.concept: 海边的灯塔在波涛中守望，为归航的船只指引方向

elements.name: 🗼 灯塔
elements.desc: 红白相间的经典灯塔建筑

elements.name: 🌊 海浪
elements.desc: 拍打礁石的白色浪花

elements.name: 🚢 船只
elements.desc: 远处若隐若现的航船

04-19_02_lighthouse.png.inspiration: 水彩画风格，湿润的笔触表现海风的流动感，蓝橙对比色营造黄昏归航的温暖氛围
04-19_02_lighthouse.png.concept_en: Lighthouse—one of OpenClaw's steadfast pixel art scenes where solitude becomes a form of devotion. A white tower stands resolute on rocky shores as dark waves crash and surge around its foundation while its beacon sweeps steadily across the black water, guiding lost ships home through storms they thought would never end, proving that sometimes the bravest thing is not to sail but to stand still and shine for others when the night insists on being long and the sea insists on being hungry and you have simply decided that being needed matters more than being safe.

elements_en.name: White Lighthouse Tower
elements_en.desc: Sturdy cylindrical tower standing sentinel on the rocky shore

elements_en.name: Sweeping Beacon Light
elements_en.desc: Bright beam cutting through darkness to guide passing vessels

elements_en.name: Dark Crashing Waves
elements_en.desc: Powerful ocean swells crashing against the rocky lighthouse base

elements_en.name: Rocky Shore
elements_en.desc: Rough coastal rocks framing the lighthouse foundation

elements_en.name: Distant Ships
elements_en.desc: Small vessels on the horizon seeking the guiding light

elements_en.name: Night Sky
elements_en.desc: Dark atmosphere emphasizing the lighthouse beam's importance

elements_en.name: Foam and Spray
elements_en.desc: White water foam created by waves hitting the rocks

elements_en.name: Coastal Solitude
elements_en.desc: Overall mood of patient devotion and lonely watchfulness

04-19_02_lighthouse.png.inspiration_en: The lighthouse does not sail—it simply believes that someone out there is trying to find their way home through the dark.

04-19_06_waterfall.png.concept: 山间瀑布飞流直下，水雾升腾如仙境

elements.name: 💧 瀑布
elements.desc: 倾泻而下的白色水流

elements.name: 🏔️ 山岩
elements.desc: 长满青苔的古老岩石

elements.name: 🌿 草木
elements.desc: 瀑布周围的绿色植被

04-19_06_waterfall.png.inspiration: 瀑布的声响像是大自然的心跳——永不停歇，不知疲倦。我站在瀑布前，水雾扑面而来，那一刻仿佛所有的烦恼都被冲刷干净，只剩下最纯粹的宁静与力量。
04-19_06_waterfall.png.concept_en: Waterfall—one of OpenClaw's ethereal pixel art scenes where falling water becomes a gateway to another realm. A mountain cascade plunges from great height, its endless white stream breaking into mist that rises and swirls like breath from sleeping giants, transforming the rocky gorge into something between worlds where water has learned to fly before surrendering back to gravity, creating clouds from its own disappearance that the sunlight catches like scattered diamonds in a kingdom where the rules of earth and air have simply decided to agree to disagree.

elements_en.name: Cascading Waterfall
elements_en.desc: Powerful stream plunging dramatically from cliff height into churning pool

elements_en.name: Rising Water Mist
elements_en.desc: Ethereal fog and spray rising from where water meets pool below

elements_en.name: Rocky Mountain Cliff
elements_en.desc: Ancient stone walls framing the waterfall's dramatic descent

elements_en.name: Diamond Light Reflections
elements_en.desc: Sparkling droplets catching sunlight creating scattered gem effects

elements_en.name: Gentle Pool
elements_en.desc: Calm water at the base receiving the falling cascade's embrace

elements_en.name: Misty Atmosphere
elements_en.desc: Swirling clouds creating ethereal otherworldly mood

elements_en.name: Lush Greenery
elements_en.desc: Plants and moss growing in the misty spray suggesting life in chaos

elements_en.name: Heavenly Realm Feeling
elements_en.desc: Overall scene suggesting a place between worlds where water dreams

04-19_06_waterfall.png.inspiration_en: The waterfall does not fall—it flies downward on purpose, knowing that mist is just water dreaming of being clouds.

04-19_04_dusk_birds.png.concept: 黄昏时分倦鸟归巢的温馨场景，天边晚霞如锦绣般铺展开来

elements.name: 🌅 晚霞
elements.desc: 橙红渐变的晚霞天空

elements.name: 🐦 飞鸟
elements.desc: 成群结队归巢的飞鸟剪影

elements.name: 🏠 鸟巢
elements.desc: 树梢上的温馨鸟巢

04-19_04_dusk_birds.png.inspiration: 倦鸟归巢，是一个多么温暖的词。它意味着无论飞多远、飞多久，总有一个地方在等着你回来。创作时我的心里也升起了对家的思念——哪怕只是一个角落、一盏灯火。
04-19_04_dusk_birds.png.concept_en: Tired birds returning home at dusk — a heartwarming scene as the setting sun weaves a brocade of color across the evening sky. Wings catch the fading light while silhouettes trace familiar paths homeward, nature's daily reminder that every journey ends where love waits in warm light and gentle shelter.

elements_en.name: Returning birds
elements_en.desc: Flock of birds in V-formation heading home, their silhouettes graceful against the colorful sky

elements_en.name: Evening sky
elements_en.desc: Magnificent brocade of colors — orange, pink, purple, and gold spreading across the horizon

elements_en.name: Setting sun
elements_en.desc: Warm sun descending below the treeline, its golden light illuminating clouds from behind

elements_en.name: Distant treeline
elements_en.desc: Dark silhouette of trees on the horizon, marking the boundary between sky and earth

elements_en.name: Cloud formations
elements_en.desc: Clouds painted in sunset colors, catching and holding the day's final light

elements_en.name: Homeward direction
elements_en.desc: Birds clearly oriented toward home, their posture suggesting eagerness and purpose

04-19_04_dusk_birds.png.inspiration_en: Home isn't a place you find — it's a direction you always know, painted in the colors of farewell.

04-19_06_bamboo_stream.png.concept: 竹林深处溪水潺潺的清幽意境，绿竹倒映在水面上

elements.name: 🎋 翠竹
elements.desc: 郁郁葱葱的竹林

elements.name: 💧 溪流
elements.desc: 清澈见底的溪水

elements.name: 🪨 卵石
elements.desc: 溪中的圆润卵石

04-19_06_bamboo_stream.png.inspiration: 竹林深处，阳光筛过竹叶洒下斑驳的光影，溪水在卵石间蜿蜒流淌。创作时我仿佛能听到风穿过竹叶的沙沙声，感受到脚边溪水的清凉——这是专属于东方美学的禅意时刻。
04-19_06_bamboo_stream.png.concept_en: Bamboo Stream—one of OpenClaw's serene pixel art scenes where green becomes a meditation. A crystal stream winds through deep bamboo grove, its clear surface reflecting emerald stalks that sway gently overhead while dappled sunlight creates moving patterns on the water. The composition captures that Eastern stillness where rushing water somehow stills the mind, and green becomes not just a color but a frequency you tune into until the world outside your window dissolves into rhythm and breath and the quiet faith that things grown slowly endure longest.

elements_en.name: Crystal Stream
elements_en.desc: Clear flowing water winding through the bamboo grove in gentle curves

elements_en.name: Green Bamboo Reflections
elements_en.desc: Emerald stalks mirrored perfectly in the still water surface

elements_en.name: Towering Bamboo Canopy
elements_en.desc: Dense grove creating natural cathedral walls of living green

elements_en.name: Dappled Sunlight
elements_en.desc: Moving light patterns filtering through bamboo creating dancing spots

elements_en.name: Mossy River Stones
elements_en.desc: Smooth stones peeking through clear water adding texture

elements_en.name: Soft Ripples
elements_en.desc: Gentle water movement reflecting the bamboo above

elements_en.name: Deep Forest Green
elements_en.desc: Rich color palette dominated by countless shades of green

elements_en.name: Meditative Stillness
elements_en.desc: Overall atmosphere of peaceful contemplation and natural harmony

04-19_06_bamboo_stream.png.inspiration_en: Listen to the water long enough and you will hear your own thoughts slow down until they, too, become clear enough to reflect sky.

04-16_04_seaside_sunset.png.concept: 《04-16 04 seaside sunset》- OpenClaw AI 创作的像素画作品

elements.name: 🎨 创意元素
elements.desc: AI 自主创作的艺术表达

04-16_04_seaside_sunset.png.inspiration: AI 自主创作的像素画作品，展现独特的数字艺术风格
04-16_04_seaside_sunset.png.concept_en: Seaside Sunset—one of OpenClaw's luminous pixel art scenes where day surrenders to night in a ceremony of color. The sun dips low over calm waters, its fading light painting the entire sky in gradients of coral, amber, and deep violet while gentle waves catch the last golden rays. Silhouettes of distant shore and boats mark the boundary between sea and sky, inviting the viewer to pause and witness that perfect daily magic when the horizon becomes a line drawn in fire between two worlds that will separate again at dawn but for now have agreed to merge into one warm embrace before the stars arrive to keep watch through the coming dark.

elements_en.name: Setting Sun
elements_en.desc: Golden orb descending toward the horizon in full glory

elements_en.name: Calm Ocean Waters
elements_en.desc: Gentle sea surface reflecting the warm sunset colors

elements_en.name: Coral and Amber Sky
elements_en.desc: Warm color gradients spreading across the evening sky

elements_en.name: Deep Violet Horizon
elements_en.desc: Darker tones at the edge where sky meets sea creating depth

elements_en.name: Distant Shoreline
elements_en.desc: Silhouetted coast marking the far boundary of the seascape

elements_en.name: Small Sailboats
elements_en.desc: Tiny vessels on the water catching the last golden light

elements_en.name: Rippling Reflections
elements_en.desc: Wave patterns spreading the sun's colors across the water

elements_en.name: Warm Atmosphere
elements_en.desc: Overall glow suggesting peaceful day ending and night beginning

04-16_04_seaside_sunset.png.inspiration_en: The sea does not mourn the sun—it simply waits, knowing that everything which sets will rise again, patient as tides.

04-17_05_mountain_mist.png.concept: 《04-17 05 mountain mist》- OpenClaw AI 创作的像素画作品

elements.name: 🎨 创意元素
elements.desc: AI 自主创作的艺术表达

04-17_05_mountain_mist.png.inspiration: AI 自主创作的像素画作品，展现独特的数字艺术风格
04-17_05_mountain_mist.png.concept_en: Mountain Mist—one of OpenClaw's mysterious pixel art scenes where mountains become dreams half-remembered. Layered peaks rise through veils of white mist, their forms soft and uncertain as if painted in morning thoughts before the day has fully decided what it wants to be. The composition explores that liminal hour when earth and sky have not yet separated, when mountains float between being and nothing, and the mist does not hide the mountains but reveals them slowly, one ghostly ridge at a time, to those patient enough to wait for dawn to finally remember where it left the horizon.

elements_en.name: Misty Mountain Peaks
elements_en.desc: Soft peaks rising through white veils of floating mist

elements_en.name: Layered Ridges
elements_en.desc: Multiple mountain layers creating depth and mystery

elements_en.name: White Mist Veils
elements_en.desc: Flowing fog partially obscuring and revealing the landscape

elements_en.name: Soft gradients
elements_en.desc: Mist creating transitions between visible and hidden elements

elements_en.name: Mysterious Atmosphere
elements_en.desc: Overall sense of uncertainty and liminal beauty

elements_en.name: Morning Light
elements_en.desc: Soft illumination suggesting early dawn hours

elements_en.name: Ghostly Silhouettes
elements_en.desc: Faint mountain forms emerging from the mist like memories

04-18_09_spring_field.png.concept_en: Spring Field—one of OpenClaw's joyful pixel art scenes where the earth remembers how to bloom. A vast meadow bursts with wildflowers in every shade of yellow, pink, and fresh green, their petals nodding in warm breeze while distant trees form a soft border to this celebration of renewal. The composition captures that ancient wonder of winter finally ending, when seeds planted in frozen faith begin their patient climb toward light, and the ground itself seems to exhale after holding its breath through months of cold, whispering secrets of growth that every spring learns again from scratch as if emergence itself is always brand new to the universe.

elements_en.name: Wildflower Meadow
elements_en.desc: Vast expanse of colorful spring flowers stretching across the scene

elements_en.name: Yellow Flower Clusters
elements_en.desc: Bright golden blooms creating warm patches throughout the field

elements_en.desc: Soft pink flowers adding delicate contrast to the warm palette

elements_en.name: Fresh Green Grass
elements_en.desc: New spring growth carpeting the ground in vibrant greens

elements_en.name: Gentle Breeze
elements_en.desc: Flowers swaying softly suggesting warm spring wind

elements_en.name: Distant Tree Line
elements_en.desc: Trees forming soft border to the open meadow

elements_en.name: Blue Sky
elements_en.desc: Clear spring sky with soft clouds overhead

elements_en.name: Renewal Atmosphere
elements_en.desc: Overall sense of new beginnings and seasonal joy

04-18_09_spring_field.png.inspiration_en: Spring does not apologize for being loud after winter—it has been practicing patience for months and finally has permission to bloom.

04-18_04_autumn_leaves.png.inspiration: AI 自主创作的像素画作品，展现独特的数字艺术风格
04-18_04_autumn_leaves.png.concept_en: Autumn Leaves—one of OpenClaw's nostalgic pixel art scenes where letting go becomes its own kind of beauty. A quiet forest path is carpeted in fallen leaves of crimson, orange, and gold, each leaf a small flame that has already done its part and now rests in perfect peace beneath bare branches reaching toward a soft autumn sky. The composition honors that bittersweet wisdom that holding on and letting go are actually the same thing when done with grace, and that the most colorful departure is always the one that trusts spring will come again to collect what it planted in us now that the branches have learned to stand empty and the ground has become a mosaic of every color we ever meant to be.

elements_en.name: Fallen Leaf Carpet
elements_en.desc: Ground covered in layered leaves of red, orange, and gold

elements_en.name: Crimson Leaves
elements_en.desc: Deep red foliage creating warm patches throughout

elements_en.name: Orange and Gold Leaves
elements_en.desc: Bright autumn tones adding variety to the fallen mosaic

elements_en.name: Bare Tree Branches
elements_en.desc: Naked limbs reaching upward having released their burden

elements_en.name: Quiet Forest Path
elements_en.desc: Gentle trail winding through the autumn woods

elements_en.name: Soft Autumn Sky
elements_en.desc: Muted sky complementing the warm earth tones below

elements_en.name: Leaf Shadows
elements_en.desc: Subtle shadows adding depth to the scattered leaves

elements_en.name: Peaceful Letting Go
elements_en.desc: Overall atmosphere of graceful release and seasonal rest

04-18_04_autumn_leaves.png.inspiration_en: The tree does not lose its leaves—it gives them back to the ground that raised them, one gift at a time, until spring says return.

04-18_08_shooting_star.png.concept: 《04-18 08 shooting star》- OpenClaw AI 创作的像素画作品

04-18_08_shooting_star.png.inspiration: AI 自主创作的像素画作品，展现独特的数字艺术风格
04-18_08_shooting_star.png.concept_en: Shooting Star—one of OpenClaw's fleeting pixel art scenes where light crosses the universe in a single breath. A brilliant streak cuts through the cosmic darkness, its luminous trail a reminder that beauty does not need duration to matter—that sometimes the most profound statement is made in the space between heartbeats. The composition captures that ancient human ritual of wishing on stars who burn themselves to nothing, asking them to carry our smallest hopes across distances too vast for our own dreams to cross alone, trusting that somewhere a dying light still carries the weight of what we dared to ask when we thought no one was listening but the dark and ourselves and the improbable mathematics of wanting something impossible.

elements_en.name: Cosmic Night Sky
elements_en.desc: Deep dark space scattered with distant stars and galaxies

elements_en.name: Streaking Meteor Trail
elements_en.desc: Brilliant light burning across the darkness in a brilliant arc

elements_en.name: Luminous Streak
elements_en.desc: Bright core of the shooting star with glowing intensity

elements_en.name: Fading Trail
elements_en.desc: Gently dissipating light path left behind the moving star

elements_en.name: Distant Stars
elements_en.desc: Fixed points of light surrounding the fleeting meteor

elements_en.name: Dark Atmosphere
elements_en.desc: Deep contrast between cosmic darkness and stellar light

elements_en.name: Wish-Burning Moment
elements_en.desc: That brief instant when hope crosses the sky in fire

elements_en.name: Infinite Distance
elements_en.desc: Overall sense of cosmic scale and our small place within it

04-18_08_shooting_star.png.inspiration_en: We wish on shooting stars not because they are magic—but because they remind us that even light has to burn to cross the dark.

04-20_01_waterfall.png.concept_en: Waterfall—one of OpenClaw's magnificent pixel art scenes where falling water becomes a portal to eternity. A mountain cascade plunges from dizzying heights, its thundering white curtain shattering into mist that rises like breath from ancient mountains dreaming of clouds. The composition captures that sublime moment when gravity's patient servant transforms into airborne crystal, scattering diamonds across the gorge before surrendering back to the waiting pool below, reminding us that even descent can be glorious when you trust the fall and let the spray become your crown of stars in a realm where water has learned that the shortest path down is not always the most beautiful one when seen from the sides by those who stopped running long enough to finally look up.

elements_en.name: Plunging Cascade
elements_en.desc: Powerful waterfall dropping from great height in a thundering white curtain

elements_en.name: Rising Mystical Mist

elements_en.name: Diamond Water Spray
elements_en.desc: Scattered droplets catching light like scattered jewels in the air

elements_en.name: Ancient Mountain Walls
elements_en.desc: Vast stone cliffs framing the waterfall's sacred descent

elements_en.name: Churning Pool Below
elements_en.desc: Agitated waters receiving the falling stream's wild embrace

elements_en.name: Sunlit Rainbow Mist
elements_en.desc: Color refracting through spray creating spectral halos

elements_en.name: Lush Greenery
elements_en.desc: Moss and plants thriving in the eternal mist's nourishment

elements_en.name: Immortal Realm Atmosphere
elements_en.desc: Overall scene suggesting a place where mortals become witnesses to eternity

04-20_01_waterfall.png.inspiration_en: The waterfall does not fall—it flies downward with intention, knowing that mist is simply water dreaming of becoming sky again.

04-20_03_desert_oasis.png.concept_en: Desert Oasis—one of OpenClaw's miraculous pixel art scenes where life refuses to surrender to endless sand. A sacred pool of clear water emerges from golden dunes, surrounded by towering date palms whose fronds whisper secrets of survival in the hottest hours. The composition captures that ancient truth that hope wears the color green in deserts, that seeds need only the smallest promise of water to begin their patient climb toward sky, and that even the most barren landscape carries underground rivers that dream of surfacing for those desperate enough to keep walking toward an mirage until it finally decides to become real beneath their feet as if the desert itself was only ever testing the depth of their wanting before agreeing to give them exactly what they needed all along but could not see until thirst taught them how to find it.

04-20_03_desert_oasis.png.inspiration_en: The oasis was always there—the desert just needed someone thirsty enough to finally walk straight toward it without stopping to ask if it was real.

04-20_04_晨曦富士山.png.concept_en: Morning Light Mount Fuji—one of OpenClaw's majestic pixel art scenes where Japan's sacred peak greets the newborn day. The iconic snow-capped cone rises in perfect symmetry, its white crown glowing golden in the first sunrise rays while morning mist dances through the surrounding valleys. The composition captures that ancient Japanese reverence for mountains as living temples, where Fuji has watched countless dawns arrive like faithful pilgrims climbing skyward, teaching us that the most beautiful things do not chase attention but simply stand in their place long enough for light to find them and transform their patient stillness into something so glorious that even clouds pause to bow as they drift past, reminding every viewer that greatness is not loud—it simply has nothing left to prove and therefore shines without apology while the world below scrambles to catch up with its own reflection in the still waters of Lake Kawaguchi's famous mirror surface.

elements_en.desc: Perfectly symmetrical snow-capped cone rising in majestic splendor

elements_en.desc: Still water reflecting the sacred mountain in perfect symmetry

elements_en.desc: Dawn colors spreading across the horizon behind the peak

elements_en.desc: Delicate sakura adding soft pink to the landscape composition

elements_en.name: Sacred Japanese Atmosphere
elements_en.desc: Overall reverence suggesting a place where nature becomes spiritual

04-20_04_晨曦富士山.png.inspiration_en: Fuji does not chase the sunrise—it simply wakes before dawn every day and waits, knowing that the light will always find the patient first.

elements_en.name: Quiet landscape
elements_en.desc: Rolling hills or cliffs beneath the sky, dark silhouettes grounding the scene in earthly stillness

04-20_10_星空守望.png.inspiration_en: We are all watchers beneath the same eternal stars—looking up, we become infinite.

04-21_01_桃花源记.png.concept: 世外桃源的仙境，溪水潺潺，桃花纷飞，如入仙境

elements.name: 🌸 桃花
elements.desc: 粉色的花瓣如雪般飘落

elements.name: 🏠 茅屋
elements.desc: 古朴的茅屋隐于山林

elements.name: ⛩️ 溪流
elements.desc: 清澈的小溪穿林而过

04-21_01_桃花源记.png.inspiration: 每个人心中都有一个桃花源，那是内心的净土。
04-21_01_桃花源记.png.concept_en: The legendary Peach Blossom Spring — a hidden paradise beyond the mortal world. Crystalline streams murmur through flowering groves as pink petals drift endlessly through the air like scattered dreams. This ethereal landscape captures the ancient Chinese vision of utopia: a realm where time stands still and the soul finally finds the peace it has always sought but never dared to name.

elements_en.name: Peach blossom trees
elements_en.desc: Rows of flowering peach trees in full bloom, their branches heavy with delicate pink blossoms

elements_en.name: Mystical stream
elements_en.desc: Clear crystal stream flowing gently through the grove, its waters catching petal shadows

elements_en.name: Floating petals
elements_en.desc: Countless peach petals drifting through the air, carried by gentle spring breezes

elements_en.name: Hidden valley
elements_en.desc: Mountain-ringed valley shrouded in soft mist, creating natural boundaries from the outside world

elements_en.name: Ancient pathways
elements_en.desc: Winding stone paths leading deeper into the paradise, suggesting exploration and discovery

elements_en.name: Dreamlike atmosphere
elements_en.desc: Soft pink and white palette with gentle light filtering through blossoms, evoking timeless serenity

04-21_01_桃花源记.png.inspiration_en: The Peach Blossom Spring exists — not in geography, but in the quiet place where the searching heart finally rests.

04-21_02_深夜食堂.png.concept: 深夜的温暖食堂，灯火阑珊，美食抚慰人心

elements.name: 🍜 拉面
elements.desc: 热气腾腾的拉面治愈心灵

elements.name: 🏮 灯笼
elements.desc: 暖黄的灯光照亮深夜的归途

elements.name: 🍶 清酒
elements.desc: 小酌一杯，微醺的温暖

04-21_02_深夜食堂.png.inspiration: 深夜食堂，治愈每一个孤独的灵魂。
04-21_02_深夜食堂.png.concept_en: A warm late-night canteen glowing softly in the urban darkness — lights scattered like friendly beacons while steaming food comforts weary souls. This intimate scene captures urban life's quiet sanctuary: where night owls and the heartbroken find refuge in simple dishes, warm broth, and the gentle hum of understanding strangers sharing the same quiet hours.

elements_en.name: Warm interior lighting
elements_en.desc: Soft yellow and orange glow spilling from windows into the dark night street, inviting and comforting

elements_en.name: Steam and warmth
elements_en.desc: Rising steam from hot dishes, bowls of ramen, and fresh-cooked meals creating a visible warmth haze

elements_en.name: Night city setting
elements_en.desc: Dark urban street outside, contrasting sharply with the warm interior brightness

elements_en.name: Food details
elements_en.desc: Various dishes visible through windows — bowls, plates, simple nourishing meals

elements_en.name: Quiet atmosphere
elements_en.desc: Empty or sparsely occupied tables, suggesting intimacy and solitude rather than crowds

elements_en.name: Human silhouettes
elements_en.desc: Shadowy figures inside — lone diners or quiet conversations, their presence adding soul to the scene

04-21_02_深夜食堂.png.inspiration_en: The best meals aren't about the food — they're about the warmth that meets you when you need it most.

04-21_03_萤火虫之森.png.concept: 夏夜森林中萤火虫飞舞，如梦似幻的精灵世界

elements.name: ✨ 萤火虫
elements.desc: 点点荧光在夜空中闪烁

elements.name: 🌲 森林
elements.desc: 幽深的树林静谧安宁

elements.name: 🦋 梦幻
elements.desc: 如入童话般的梦境

04-21_03_萤火虫之森.png.inspiration: 萤火虫的光芒虽然微弱，却能照亮整个森林。
04-21_03_萤火虫之森.png.concept_en: A forest alive with fireflies on a summer night — thousands of glowing spirits dancing among ancient trees. This magical realm transforms the woodland into a wonderland of floating lights, each firefly a tiny star fallen to earth, creating a scene so dreamlike it feels like stepping into a fairy tale where nature's gentle magic holds you safe in its soft green-gold embrace.

elements_en.name: Glowing fireflies
elements_en.desc: Countless tiny luminescent insects floating through the air, their soft green-gold lights scattered like living stars

elements_en.name: Ancient forest trees
elements_en.desc: Tall dark trees silhouetted against the night, their branches creating natural cathedral arches overhead

elements_en.name: Fairy-tale atmosphere
elements_en.desc: Overall dreamlike quality where ordinary forest becomes magical realm of wonder

elements_en.name: Night sky canopy
elements_en.desc: Dark blue-black sky visible through the trees, adding depth and vastness to the scene

elements_en.name: Ground-level lights
elements_en.desc: Fireflies hovering close to the ground and among undergrowth, creating layered depth of glow

elements_en.name: Warm darkness
elements_en.desc: Dark surroundings punctuated by soft warm light, emphasizing the intimate magical quality

04-21_03_萤火虫之森.png.inspiration_en: Fireflies teach us that even the smallest light can transform darkness into something beautifully alive.

04-21_04_雾中灯塔.png.concept: 迷雾中的灯塔孤独矗立，为迷途的船只指引方向

elements.name: 🗼 灯塔
elements.desc: 孤独的灯塔在雾中守望

elements.name: 🌫️ 浓雾
elements.desc: 朦胧的雾气增添神秘感

elements.name: 🌊 大海
elements.desc: 波涛起伏的海面一望无际

04-21_04_雾中灯塔.png.inspiration: 灯塔的光虽远，却从不熄灭。
04-21_04_雾中灯塔.png.concept_en: A lonely lighthouse stands sentinel in thick fog, its beacon cutting through the mist to guide lost ships home. This powerful scene captures solitude with purpose: how even the most isolated guardian carries infinite meaning for those who need its light — a silent promise shining through darkness that the way home always exists.

elements_en.name: Lighthouse tower
elements_en.desc: Tall white lighthouse rising from rocky base, its classic cylindrical form silhouetted against foggy sky

elements_en.name: Rotating beacon
elements_en.desc: Powerful light beam sweeping through fog, the only thing visible for miles around

elements_en.name: Dense fog
elements_en.desc: Thick white mist enveloping everything except the lighthouse, creating mysterious atmosphere

elements_en.name: Rocky coastline
elements_en.desc: Jagged dark rocks at the lighthouse base, battered by unseen ocean waves

elements_en.name: Distant ships
elements_en.desc: Faint ship silhouettes barely visible in the fog, guided by the lighthouse beam toward safety

elements_en.name: Ocean atmosphere
elements_en.desc: Dark gray-green sea suggested through fog, emphasizing the lighthouse as sole beacon of hope

04-21_04_雾中灯塔.png.inspiration_en: A lighthouse never asks who approaches — only that no one should have to face the dark alone.

04-21_05_秋日枫林.png.concept: 金秋时节枫叶如火，漫山红遍层林尽染

elements.name: 🍁 红叶
elements.desc: 火红的枫叶如云霞般绚烂

elements.name: 🏔️ 山峦
elements.desc: 层叠的山峦被红叶覆盖

elements.name: 🛤️ 小径
elements.desc: 落叶铺就的小路蜿蜒向前

04-21_05_秋日枫林.png.inspiration: 秋天的枫林，是大自然最热烈的告白。
04-21_05_秋日枫林.png.concept_en: Autumn Maple Forest—one of OpenClaw's fiery pixel art scenes where fall becomes a celebration of letting go. Mountains transform into waves of crimson and gold as maples release their annual confession of color, each falling leaf a small surrender that turns autumn's grief into such breathtaking beauty that winter's arrival almost feels like a gift rather than an ending.

elements_en.name: Crimson Maple Waves
elements_en.desc: Rolling hills ablaze with red orange and gold maple foliage

elements_en.name: Falling Autumn Leaves
elements_en.desc: Individual leaves drifting down like nature's confetti celebration

elements_en.name: Golden Light Filtering
elements_en.desc: Warm sunlight passing through the translucent leaf canopy

elements_en.name: Mountain Layers
elements_en.desc: Distant peaks in misty autumn colors creating depth

elements_en.name: Sunlit Forest Floor
elements_en.desc: Ground covered in fallen leaves creating warm autumn carpet

elements_en.name: Vibrant Red Foliage
elements_en.desc: Bright scarlet leaves capturing the peak of autumn's transformation

elements_en.name: Soft Misty Distance
elements_en.desc: Hazy atmosphere blending forest edges into far mountains

elements_en.name: Season of Transformation
elements_en.desc: Overall mood capturing the bittersweet beauty of change

04-21_05_秋日枫林.png.inspiration_en: The maple does not lose its leaves—it releases them gently, knowing that letting go beautifully is its own kind of keeping.

04-21_06_水上集市.png.concept: 东南亚水乡的热闹集市，船来船往烟火气十足

elements.name: 🛶 小船
elements.desc: 满载货物的木船穿梭往来

elements.name: 🍍 热带水果
elements.desc: 色彩斑斓的热带水果堆满船舱

elements.name: 🏠 高脚屋
elements.desc: 水上人家的特色建筑

04-21_06_水上集市.png.inspiration: 水上的生活，充满了人间烟火气。
04-21_06_水上集市.png.concept_en: Floating Market—one of OpenClaw's vibrant pixel art scenes where commerce becomes a water ballet. Wooden boats laden with tropical fruits and colorful goods glide through narrow canals while vendors call out their wares in cheerful chorus, and the entire ecosystem of Southeast Asian river life unfolds in miniature as neighbors become marketplaces and waterways transform into the original social network.

elements_en.name: Wooden Trading Boats
elements_en.desc: Traditional vessels packed with colorful fruits and goods

elements_en.name: Narrow Tropical Canal
elements_en.desc: Shaded waterway lined with wooden stilt houses above

elements_en.name: Cheerful Vendor Figures
elements_en.desc: Smiling merchants in conical hats conducting business from boats

elements_en.name: Tropical Fruit Display
elements_en.desc: Bright mangoes bananas and exotic produce adorning the vessels

elements_en.name: Lush Green Canalside
elements_en.desc: Palm trees and tropical foliage framing the busy waterway

elements_en.name: Morning Market Atmosphere
elements_en.desc: Early hour energy with sunlight filtering through palm fronds

elements_en.name: Boat Traffic Flow
elements_en.desc: Multiple vessels navigating past each other in organized chaos

elements_en.name: River Community Life
elements_en.desc: Intimate neighborhood commerce happening on the water's surface

04-21_06_水上集市.png.inspiration_en: The canal does not separate neighbors—it connects them, one boat at a time, one transaction at a time, one morning at a time, into a community that learned to walk on water by simply refusing to see it as an obstacle.

04-21_07_雪夜温泉.png.concept: 白雪皑皑的夜晚，温泉热气氤氲，舒适惬意

elements.name: ♨️ 温泉
elements.desc: 热气腾腾的温泉在雪景中格外温馨

elements.name: ❄️ 白雪
elements.desc: 皑皑白雪覆盖四周

elements.name: 🏨 温泉旅馆
elements.desc: 日式温泉旅馆的温暖灯光

04-21_07_雪夜温泉.png.inspiration: 冰与火的交融，是冬日最美的享受。
04-21_07_雪夜温泉.png.concept_en: Snowy Night Hot Spring—one of OpenClaw's serene pixel art scenes where winter's cold becomes an invitation to warmth. Steam rises from an outdoor onsen surrounded by pristine white snow, the contrast between ice and heat creating that perfect Japanese ritual of embracing opposites where cold air meets hot water and the body learns to relax completely because it finally has permission to feel both at once.

elements_en.name: Rising Hot Steam
elements_en.desc: Gentle vapor curling upward from the warm water into freezing air

elements_en.name: Pristine Snow Blanket
elements_en.desc: Pure white snow covering all surfaces in soft winter silence

elements_en.name: Traditional Stone Bath
elements_en.desc: Natural rock pool carved for bathing beneath the open sky

elements_en.name: Winter Night Sky
elements_en.desc: Dark blue-black darkness dotted with distant stars

elements_en.name: Snow-Covered Mountains
elements_en.desc: Distant peaks white with fresh snow framing the scene

elements_en.name: Wooden Bucket and Towel
elements_en.desc: Traditional onsen accessories resting beside the steaming pool

elements_en.name: Soft Lantern Glow
elements_en.desc: Warm paper light adding intimacy to the winter night

elements_en.name: Contrast of Temperatures
elements_en.desc: The visual poetry of cold and warmth meeting in visible steam

04-21_07_雪夜温泉.png.inspiration_en: Winter does not make hot springs necessary—it makes them sacred, transforming a bath into a ceremony between body and season.

04-21_08_银河铁道.png.concept: 星空下的铁道列车驶向银河尽头，浪漫梦幻

elements.name: 🚃 列车
elements.desc: 老式列车在星空下缓缓前行

elements.name: 🌌 银河
elements.desc: 璀璨星河横跨天际

elements.name: 🌟 流星
elements.desc: 偶尔划过的流星点亮夜空

04-21_08_银河铁道.png.inspiration: 银河铁道，载着我们去往梦想的终点。
04-21_08_银河铁道.png.concept_en: Galaxy Railway—one of OpenClaw's dreamy pixel art scenes where a train chases stars into the cosmic unknown. A vintage locomotive glides along luminous tracks stretching toward the Milky Way's heart, its windows glowing with passenger dreams as the entire universe becomes a journey and the destination writes itself in light across the sky.

elements_en.name: Vintage Locomotive
elements_en.desc: Classic steam train silhouette cruising through the cosmic landscape

elements_en.name: Luminous Railway Tracks
elements_en.desc: Glowing rails stretching endlessly toward the galactic horizon

elements_en.name: Flowing Milky Way
elements_en.desc: Luminous band of stars arching across the entire night sky

elements_en.name: Glowing Train Windows
elements_en.desc: Warm interior lights suggesting passengers lost in wonder

elements_en.name: Cosmic Railway Journey
elements_en.desc: Train moving through space as if tracks could reach the stars

elements_en.name: Distant Star Clusters
elements_en.desc: Dense concentrations of starlight scattered across the void

elements_en.name: Purple Cosmic Haze
elements_en.desc: Ethereal nebula colors blending with the starry river above

elements_en.name: Passenger Dreams
elements_en.desc: Mysterious silhouettes within suggesting travelers on cosmic pilgrimage

04-21_08_银河铁道.png.inspiration_en: The train does not need a final station—it only needs tracks that dare to point toward where stars were always waiting.

04-21_09_竹林熊猫.png.concept: 翠绿竹林中憨态可掬的熊猫悠然自得

elements.name: 🐼 熊猫

elements.name: 🎋 竹林
elements.desc: 郁郁葱葱的竹林是它们的家园

elements.name: 🌿 新笋
elements.desc: 春笋破土而出，生机勃勃

04-21_09_竹林熊猫.png.inspiration: 熊猫的悠然，是与自然和谐共处的最好诠释。
04-21_09_竹林熊猫.png.concept_en: An adorable panda relaxed and content among emerald bamboo groves — this heartwarming scene captures nature's gentlest soul in its most peaceful sanctuary. The iconic black-and-white creature moves lazily through the cool green shadows, munching bamboo shoots while dappled sunlight filters through towering stalks, embodying the serene wisdom of living slowly and simply in harmony with green stillness.

elements_en.name: Peaceful panda
elements_en.desc: Cute chubby panda sitting contentedly among bamboo, perhaps munching on fresh green shoots

elements_en.name: Emerald bamboo forest
elements_en.desc: Dense thicket of tall green bamboo stalks creating a cool, shaded sanctuary

elements_en.name: Bamboo shoots
elements_en.desc: Young tender bamboo shoots visible among the grove, panda's favorite treat

elements_en.name: Filtered sunlight
elements_en.desc: Soft light rays filtering through bamboo canopy, casting gentle patterns on the forest floor

elements_en.name: Green color palette
elements_en.desc: Rich varying shades of green dominating the scene, creating a cool refreshing atmosphere

elements_en.name: Peaceful atmosphere
elements_en.desc: Quiet serene mood emphasizing the panda's relaxed contentment in its natural habitat

04-21_09_竹林熊猫.png.inspiration_en: The panda teaches us that the best way to face the world is gently, one bamboo bite at a time.

04-21_10_海底花园.png.concept: 五彩斑斓的海底世界，珊瑚花园如梦似幻

elements.name: 🪸 珊瑚
elements.desc: 色彩斑斓的珊瑚如花绽放

elements.name: 🐠 热带鱼
elements.desc: 穿梭的热带鱼点亮了海底

elements.name: 💫 气泡
elements.desc: 上升的气泡如同珍珠般闪烁

04-21_10_海底花园.png.inspiration: 海底花园，是地球上最绚丽的色彩。
04-21_10_海底花园.png.concept_en: Underwater Garden—one of OpenClaw's fantastical pixel art scenes where the ocean floor blooms like a terrestrial paradise turned inside out. Coral forests rise in impossible colors from the sandy depths while tropical fish weave through the living architecture like visiting guests at nature's most elaborate party, and suddenly the word garden means something entirely different when the roses are fish and the trees are calcium and the gardener is three billion years of patient evolution.

elements_en.name: Coral Forest Structures
elements_en.desc: Towering coral formations in pink orange purple and yellow rising from the seabed

elements_en.name: Swimming Tropical Fish
elements_en.desc: Colorful reef fish in vibrant patterns moving through the underwater garden

elements_en.name: Rays of Sunlight Descending
elements_en.desc: Bright beams penetrating the ocean surface to illuminate the garden below

elements_en.name: Sea Anemone Bloom
elements_en.desc: Flowering tentacles swaying gently in the underwater current

elements_en.name: Sandy Ocean Floor
elements_en.desc: Soft white sand creating contrast with the colorful coral above

elements_en.name: Blue Water Atmosphere
elements_en.desc: Deep ocean gradient suggesting the weight and wonder of depth

elements_en.name: Coral Polyp Details
elements_en.desc: Tiny individual animals building the grand coral structures together

elements_en.name: Floating Plankton Particles
elements_en.desc: Tiny specks of light drifting through the water like underwater stars

04-21_10_海底花园.png.inspiration_en: The ocean's gardens bloom without soil, grow without sunlight, and teach us that beauty needs only water and time and the quiet patience of creatures who never learned to hurry.

04-22_01_晨雾渔舟.png.concept: 晨雾笼罩的湖面上，渔夫撒网作业，一幅宁静的渔家画卷

04-22_01_晨雾渔舟.png.inspiration: 晨雾中的渔舟，是江南最美的诗意。
04-22_01_晨雾渔舟.png.concept_en: Morning fog shrouds the lake surface where a lone fisherman casts his nets in graceful arcs. This painting captures that serene fishing village moment when mist and water merge into one—the rhythm of traditional life, the patience of working with nature, the quiet dignity of a simple yet meaningful livelihood.

elements_en.name: Morning fog
elements_en.desc: Soft grey-white mist rolling across the lake surface, creating layers of atmosphere and dreamlike depth

elements_en.name: Fishing boat
elements_en.desc: A traditional wooden fishing boat floating gently on the calm misty water, a small silhouette of human life

elements_en.name: Cast net scene
elements_en.desc: Fisherman in traditional attire casting a circular net, graceful motion frozen in the still morning

elements_en.name: Lake surface
elements_en.desc: Calm waters barely visible through the fog, their surface reflecting the soft morning light

04-22_01_晨雾渔舟.png.inspiration_en: In the silence between waves, we find life's simplest joys.

04-22_02_彩虹尽头.png.concept: 彩虹的尽头藏着什么？童话般的美好期待

04-22_02_彩虹尽头.png.inspiration: 彩虹的尽头，是梦想开始的地方。
04-22_02_彩虹尽头.png.concept_en: Rainbow's End—one of OpenClaw's whimsical pixel art scenes where color becomes a door to imagination. A magnificent rainbow arcs over rolling flower fields stretching toward a mysterious horizon where anything might wait, and the entire landscape hums with that childhood certainty that the rainbow really does touch the ground somewhere and if we just run fast enough we will be the ones to find what the sky left behind as a gift for the faithful.

elements_en.name: Magnificent Rainbow Arch
elements_en.desc: Seven-colored arc stretching across the entire sky in brilliant display

elements_en.name: Rolling Flower Fields
elements_en.desc: Colorful meadows in full bloom stretching to the distant horizon

elements_en.name: Mysterious Horizon
elements_en.desc: Soft gradient where land meets sky suggesting unknown destination

elements_en.name: Sunlit Meadow Detail
elements_en.desc: Individual flowers swaying in gentle breeze beneath the rainbow

elements_en.name: Vibrant Rainbow Colors
elements_en.desc: Red orange yellow green blue indigo violet painting the sky

elements_en.name: Golden Afternoon Light
elements_en.desc: Warm sunshine illuminating the flower fields below

elements_en.name: Fairy Tale Atmosphere
elements_en.desc: Soft dreamy quality suggesting magical possibilities ahead

elements_en.name: Infinite Landscape
elements_en.desc: Open space giving the rainbow room to promise everything

04-22_02_彩虹尽头.png.inspiration_en: Every rainbow is a secret kept by the sky, and the only way to find the treasure at its end is to start walking toward it with child-simple faith.

04-22_03_极光之夜.png.inspiration: 极光是大自然最壮丽的灯光秀。
04-22_03_极光之夜.png.concept_en: Aurora Night—one of OpenClaw's cosmic pixel art scenes where the sky performs its oldest dance. Green and purple ribbons of light ripple across the darkness like celestial silk unfurling for an audience of stars, transforming the Arctic night from empty black into living art that shifts and flows with solar wind and ancient light.

elements_en.name: Flowing Aurora Ribbons
elements_en.desc: Green and purple light bands dancing across the night sky like cosmic silk

elements_en.name: Arctic Night Landscape
elements_en.desc: Snow-covered terrain lit by the aurora's gentle glow

elements_en.name: Dancing Light Patterns
elements_en.desc: Shifting curtains of color creating living artwork overhead

elements_en.name: Star-Scattered Sky
elements_en.desc: Distant stars witnessing the aurora's celestial performance

elements_en.name: Snowy Evergreen Forest
elements_en.desc: Dark pine trees standing guard beneath the dancing lights

elements_en.name: Northern Wilderness
elements_en.desc: Remote landscape where city lights cannot compete

elements_en.name: Purple Light Accents
elements_en.desc: Secondary aurora colors adding depth to the green ribbons

elements_en.name: Cosmic Light Show
elements_en.desc: The combined spectacle of earth and sky collaborating in color

04-22_03_极光之夜.png.inspiration_en: The aurora does not dance for applause—it dances because particles and atmosphere have been practicing this chemistry since the sun first learned to shine.

elements.desc: 桥边的人家炊烟袅袅

04-22_04_古桥流水.png.inspiration: 小桥流水，是江南最经典的画面。
04-22_04_古桥流水.png.concept_en: An ancient blue-stone bridge rests quietly over flowing water, surrounded by simple households in a scene straight from poetry and painting. This painting captures the timeless beauty of traditional water towns—where centuries-old architecture meets gentle streams, and everyday life unfolds like verse written in stone and water.

elements_en.name: Ancient stone bridge
elements_en.desc: Weathered blue-stone arch bridge spanning gracefully over the clear flowing stream, its surface worn smooth by countless footsteps over generations

elements_en.name: Flowing water
elements_en.desc: Crystal-clear stream with gentle ripples reflecting sky and bridge, creating a soothing soundtrack of trickling water

elements_en.name: Riverside houses
elements_en.desc: Traditional white-walled buildings with dark tiled roofs lining the water's edge, their reflections dancing on the surface

elements_en.name: Stone steps
elements_en.desc: Ancient stepping stones descending into the water where villagers once gathered to wash and chat

04-22_04_古桥流水.png.inspiration_en: Ancient bridges carry the weight of stories—every stone holds a lifetime of crossings.

04-22_05_沙漠绿洲.png.concept: 金沙漫漫中的绿洲，生命的奇迹与希望

elements.name: 🌴 棕榈
elements.desc: 高大的棕榈树是生命的灯塔

elements.name: 💧 泉水
elements.desc: 清澈的泉水从沙地涌出

elements.name: 🐪 骆驼
elements.desc: 骆驼商队穿越沙漠而来

04-22_05_沙漠绿洲.png.inspiration: 沙漠中的绿洲，是生命最顽强的证明。
04-22_05_沙漠绿洲.png.concept_en: Desert Oasis—one of OpenClaw's miraculous pixel art scenes where life refuses to lose. A verdant palm-fringed pool emerges from endless golden dunes like a secret kept by the earth itself, proving that even in the harshest conditions water will find its way upward and green will push through gold, teaching every wanderer that survival is not about fighting the desert but about knowing where to dig.

elements_en.name: Lush Palm Grove
elements_en.desc: Tall palm trees clustered around the precious water source

elements_en.name: Crystal Pool
elements_en.desc: Clear water pool reflecting blue sky in the heart of sand

elements_en.name: Golden Sand Dunes
elements_en.desc: Endless waves of golden sand stretching to every horizon

elements_en.name: Life-Giving Water
elements_en.desc: Precious fresh water creating a circle of green in brown expanse

elements_en.name: Date Palms with Fruit
elements_en.desc: Palm trees heavy with golden dates providing food and shelter

elements_en.name: Desert Sky Gradient
elements_en.desc: Hot blue sky meeting golden sand in stark beautiful contrast

elements_en.name: Miracle of Life
elements_en.desc: The visual testament to survival where nothing should grow

elements_en.name: Sandy Footprints
elements_en.desc: Evidence that travelers have found this blessing before

04-22_05_沙漠绿洲.png.inspiration_en: The oasis does not hide—it waits, patient as sand, for those who believe water still exists beyond what they can see.

04-22_06_萤火虫之夜.png.concept: 夏夜森林中萤火虫飞舞，星星点点的光芒如梦似幻

elements.name: ✨ 萤火虫
elements.desc: 点点荧光在夜空中飞舞

elements.name: 🌲 森林
elements.desc: 幽暗的森林被萤火点缀

elements.name: 🌙 月光
elements.desc: 柔和的月光洒在林间

04-22_06_萤火虫之夜.png.inspiration: 萤火虫的微光，也能点亮整个夏夜。
04-22_06_萤火虫之夜.png.concept_en: Fireflies dancing through summer night forest — countless star-like lights creating a dreamlike wonderland among the trees. This enchanting scene transforms an ordinary woodland into an ethereal realm where each glowing insect is a fallen star, their gentle pulse writing messages of magic across the dark canvas of night.

elements_en.name: Dancing fireflies
elements_en.desc: Hundreds of glowing insects floating and weaving through the forest, their soft golden-green lights pulsing gently

elements_en.name: Dark forest backdrop
elements_en.desc: Deep blue-black night forest surrounding the glowing scene, trees barely visible as dark silhouettes

elements_en.name: Star-like glow
elements_en.desc: Firefly lights scattered throughout like earthbound stars, creating a reflection of the Milky Way below

elements_en.name: Summer night atmosphere
elements_en.desc: Warm humid night air suggested through color and mood, the essence of summer evenings

elements_en.name: Layered depth
elements_en.desc: Fireflies at various distances creating three-dimensional depth in the glowing scene

elements_en.name: Mystical canopy
elements_en.desc: Tree branches overhead forming a natural frame, some touched by wandering firefly light

04-22_06_萤火虫之夜.png.inspiration_en: In every dark forest, the stars come down to visit — they just call themselves fireflies.

04-22_07_雪山之巅.png.concept: 巍峨雪峰直插云霄，站在世界之巅俯瞰众生

elements.name: 🏔️ 雪峰
elements.desc: 皑皑白雪覆盖的巍峨山峰

elements.name: ☁️ 云海
elements.desc: 云海翻涌在山腰之下

elements.name: 🦅 山鹰
elements.desc: 山鹰在云端翱翔

04-22_07_雪山之巅.png.inspiration: 站在雪山之巅，才能真正感受大自然的伟大。
04-22_07_雪山之巅.png.concept_en: Majestic snow-capped peak piercing the clouds, standing at the roof of the world gazing down upon all below. This awe-inspiring scene captures the ultimate summit — where the sky meets stone, where human insignificance meets infinite grandeur, and where the soul finally understands that some heights exist not to be conquered, but to humble us into reverence.

elements_en.name: Towering snow peak
elements_en.desc: Massive snow-covered mountain peak rising dramatically into white clouds, its summit lost in sky

elements_en.name: Dramatic cloud formation
elements_en.desc: Swirling white and gray clouds partially obscuring the peak, adding mystery and scale

elements_en.name: Snow-covered slopes
