elements_en.desc: Expansive white snow fields covering the mountainside in pristine untouched blanket

elements_en.name: Rocky exposed sections
elements_en.desc: Dark gray mountain rock visible through snow, showing the mountain's ancient bones

elements_en.name: Aerial perspective
elements_en.desc: View suggesting immense height and vastness, with distant valleys far below

elements_en.name: Crisp clear atmosphere
elements_en.desc: Sharp cold air feeling conveyed through bright whites, deep shadows, and clean blue accents

04-22_07_雪山之巅.png.inspiration_en: The summit doesn't touch the sky to show off — it simply grew until the clouds became its resting place.

04-22_08_湿地白鹭.png.concept: 湿地生态公园中，白鹭翩然起舞，和谐共生

elements.name: 🦢 白鹭
elements.desc: 优雅的白鹭在水中觅食

elements.name: 🌾 芦苇
elements.desc: 茂密的芦苇荡是它们的家园

elements.name: 🌅 晨曦
elements.desc: 金色的晨曦洒在湿地上

04-22_08_湿地白鹭.png.inspiration: 白鹭的优雅，是湿地生态最美的名片。
04-22_08_湿地白鹭.png.concept_en: Wetland Egret—one of OpenClaw's peaceful pixel art scenes where ecology becomes poetry. White egrets glide through marshlands on elegant wings, their graceful forms reflected in still waters while the entire wetland ecosystem hums with the quiet work of birds and fish and reeds all doing their part in nature's oldest partnership where nothing dominates and everything belongs.

elements_en.name: Elegant White Egret in Flight
elements_en.desc: Majestic bird spreading wide wings across the marsh sky

elements_en.name: Wetland Marsh Landscape
elements_en.desc: Shallow waters dotted with reeds and water plants

elements_en.name: Perfect Water Reflection
elements_en.desc: Still surface mirroring the egret's graceful silhouette

elements_en.name: Golden Morning Light
elements_en.desc: Warm sunrise casting soft glow across the wetland

elements_en.name: Reed Bed Foreground
elements_en.desc: Tall marsh reeds creating natural frame for the scene

elements_en.name: Blue Heron Companion
elements_en.desc: Smaller wading bird adding depth to the ecosystem

elements_en.name: Lily Pads Scattered
elements_en.desc: Floating aquatic plants dotting the water surface

elements_en.name: Misty Marsh Atmosphere
elements_en.desc: Soft morning vapor creating dreamy wetland ambiance

04-22_08_湿地白鹭.png.inspiration_en: The egret does not own the marsh—it simply belongs to it, and that distinction between owning and belonging is the whole difference between ecosystem and empire.

04-22_09_落日熔金.png.concept: 夕阳西下，天际被染成金红色，如熔化的金子般灿烂

elements.name: 🌅 落日
elements.desc: 金红色的落日缓缓西沉

elements.name: 🔥 火烧云
elements.desc: 天边的云彩如火焰般燃烧

elements.name: 🏜️ 剪影
elements.desc: 大地形成深色的剪影

04-22_09_落日熔金.png.inspiration: 落日的熔金，是一天中最壮丽的时刻。
04-22_09_落日熔金.png.concept_en: Molten Gold Sunset—one of OpenClaw's dramatic pixel art scenes where twilight becomes alchemy. The entire horizon dissolves into liquid gold and burning crimson as the sun surrenders to the horizon, transforming sky into precious metal and making ordinary clouds look like they were forged in some celestial foundry that only opens at closing time to show its most beautiful work.

elements_en.name: Setting Sun Disc
elements_en.desc: Deep orange-red sun half-submerged in the distant horizon line

elements_en.name: Molten Gold Sky
elements_en.desc: Golden-yellow gradient spreading across the upper atmosphere

elements_en.name: Burning Crimson Clouds
elements_en.desc: Red-orange cloud formations catching the dying light

elements_en.name: Silhouette Mountains
elements_en.desc: Dark mountain range framing the spectacular sky display

elements_en.name: Reflective Water Surface
elements_en.desc: Lake or ocean duplicating the golden sky below

elements_en.name: Fiery Horizon Line
elements_en.desc: The critical boundary where fire meets earth and sky meets water

elements_en.name: Lingering Light Rays
elements_en.desc: Radial beams shooting upward from the sun's final position

elements_en.name: Deepening Twilight Colors
elements_en.desc: Color transition from gold to purple at the edges

04-22_09_落日熔金.png.inspiration_en: The sun does not set—it pours itself out, giving everything it has left in one final dramatic gesture that makes dying look like art.

04-22_10_银河倾泻.png.concept: 银河如同瀑布般从天上倾泻而下，浩瀚壮观

elements.name: 🌌 银河
elements.desc: 璀璨的银河如瀑般倾泻

elements.name: ⭐ 繁星
elements.desc: 无数星辰点缀其间

elements.name: 🏔️ 山峦
elements.desc: 雄伟的山峦剪影映衬星光

04-22_10_银河倾泻.png.inspiration: 银河倾泻，是宇宙最震撼的画面。
04-22_10_银河倾泻.png.concept_en: Cascading Galaxy—one of OpenClaw's awe-inspiring pixel art scenes where the cosmos learns to fall. The Milky Way pours from the heavens like stellar waterfalls, its billions of stars streaming earthward in ribbons of light that make the universe feel not vast and cold but intimate and alive, as if the galaxy itself decided to come down and visit those who remember to look up.

elements_en.name: Stellar Waterfall Ribbons
elements_en.desc: Dense star streams cascading from zenith to horizon like cosmic rivers

elements_en.name: Billions of Individual Stars
elements_en.desc: Countless points of light creating the river's luminous current

elements_en.name: Deep Cosmic Darkness
elements_en.desc: The void between stars that makes each light shine brighter

elements_en.name: Earthly Foreground Landscape
elements_en.desc: Dark silhouette terrain grounding the cosmic display to earth

elements_en.name: Galactic Core Glow
elements_en.desc: Brightest concentration where the stellar cascade originates

elements_en.name: Nebula Dust Clouds
elements_en.desc: Cosmic dust creating subtle color gradients within the star river

elements_en.name: Horizon Touch Point
elements_en.desc: Where the galaxy appears to meet and merge with distant land

elements_en.name: Star Reflection on Earth
elements_en.desc: The suggestion that starlight lands softly on soil and grass

04-22_10_银河倾泻.png.inspiration_en: The galaxy does not stay above forever—it comes down sometimes, disguised as darkness, to remind us that we live inside a miracle.

04-23_01_moonlight_lake.png.concept: 月光下的湖面波光粼粼，银色月影倒映其中

elements.name: 🌙 月光
elements.desc: 银白的月光洒满湖面

elements.name: 🌊 波光
elements.desc: 微风拂过，波光粼粼

elements.name: 🌲 松林
elements.desc: 湖畔松林静默矗立

04-23_01_moonlight_lake.png.inspiration: 湖光月色，天上人间双月悬。
04-23_01_moonlight_lake.png.concept_en: Moonlit Lake—one of OpenClaw's serene pixel art scenes where silver light becomes liquid poetry. Moonbeams dance across the still water creating a pathway of silver ripples while the moon hangs like a luminous pearl in the indigo sky, and the entire lake becomes a mirror holding two moons—one above and one below—teaching us that the sky's most beautiful secrets always have reflections waiting in the quiet places below.

elements_en.name: Full Moon Disc
elements_en.desc: Bright luminous moon suspended in the deep indigo night sky

elements_en.name: Silver Moon Reflection
elements_en.desc: Perfect duplicate moon shimmering on the glassy lake surface

elements_en.name: Moonlight Ripple Trails
elements_en.desc: Gentle wave patterns spreading outward from the reflection point

elements_en.name: Dark Pine Tree Silhouettes
elements_en.desc: Black tree shapes standing watch along the distant shore

elements_en.name: Indigo Night Sky Gradient
elements_en.desc: Deep blue darkness fading to lighter blue at the horizon

elements_en.name: Glittering Water Surface
elements_en.desc: Countless small light points scattered across the lake like earth stars

elements_en.name: Misty Mountain Ridge
elements_en.desc: Distant mountains creating mysterious backdrop for the moon

elements_en.name: Soft Atmospheric Haze
elements_en.desc: Gentle fog adding dreamlike quality to the entire scene

04-23_01_moonlight_lake.png.inspiration_en: Every lake keeps a moon for safekeeping, and if we are patient enough to sit beside the water, the sky will show us both at once.

04-23_02_city_dawn.png.concept: 城市在晨光中苏醒，高楼剪影在朝霞中若隐若现

elements.name: 🏢 建筑
elements.desc: 高楼剪影在晨光中矗立

elements.name: 🌅 朝霞
elements.desc: 橙红色的朝霞染红天际

elements.name: 🌫️ 晨雾
elements.desc: 薄雾为城市增添朦胧之美

04-23_02_city_dawn.png.inspiration: 城市黎明，是希望与梦想开始的地方。
04-23_02_city_dawn.png.concept_en: City at Dawn—one of OpenClaw's hopeful pixel art scenes where darkness surrenders to possibility. The sleeping city stretches and blinks awake as first light paints building silhouettes in shades of rose and amber, windows catching the earliest rays before the world below even knows the day has begun, reminding every sleeper that morning arrives whether we are ready or not and it will always arrive on time.

elements_en.name: Glowing Sunrise Horizon
elements_en.desc: Warm orange-rose gradient where sun prepares to breach the skyline

elements_en.name: Building Silhouette Forest
elements_en.desc: Dark skyscraper shapes creating urban canyon walls against the dawn

elements_en.name: Dawn Sky Color Transition
elements_en.desc: Deep blue fading to purple fading to pink at the horizon line

elements_en.name: Window Light Beginnings
elements_en.desc: Individual bright squares appearing floor by floor in distant towers

elements_en.name: Atmospheric Dawn Haze
elements_en.desc: Soft mist adding warmth and softness to the urban edges

elements_en.name: Faint Star Survivors
elements_en.desc: Remaining night stars fading as morning claims the sky

elements_en.name: Urban Scale Contrast
elements_en.desc: Massive buildings framed against the delicate dawn colors

elements_en.name: Daily Renewal Atmosphere
elements_en.desc: That particular morning feeling of infinite fresh potential

04-23_02_city_dawn.png.inspiration_en: Every city dies at midnight and is reborn at dawn—learned from the sky that endings are just preparations for beginnings wearing different colors.

04-23_03_star_tent.png.concept: 星空下的露营帐篷，银河璀璨如钻石镶嵌

elements.name: ⛺ 帐篷
elements.desc: 温暖的帐篷灯光与星光相映

elements.name: 🌌 银河
elements.desc: 璀璨星河横跨夜空

elements.name: 🏔️ 山峦
elements.desc: 黛青色的山峦起伏在天际

04-23_03_star_tent.png.inspiration: 星空下的帐篷，是离宇宙最近的地方。
04-23_03_star_tent.png.concept_en: A camping tent nestled beneath the infinite starry sky, the Milky Way stretching across the darkness like a river of diamonds. This tranquil night scene captures humanity's small but perfect place in the cosmos — where warm tent light meets cold starlight, and lying beneath such vastness, the heart finally feels both tiny and infinitely held.

elements_en.name: Starry night sky
elements_en.desc: Countless stars scattered across deep blue-black sky, the Milky Way band glowing softly above

elements_en.name: Milky Way galaxy
elements_en.desc: Bright star cluster forming the galactic band, appearing close enough to touch with diamond-like sparkle

elements_en.name: Camping tent
elements_en.desc: Cozy small tent lit from within by warm lantern glow, creating intimate human presence in vast wilderness

elements_en.name: Distant mountains
elements_en.desc: Dark mountain silhouettes on the horizon, their peaks touching the star-filled sky

elements_en.name: Ground reflection
elements_en.desc: Grass and earth carpet beneath the tent, catching subtle starlight reflections

elements_en.name: Warm-cold contrast
elements_en.desc: Warm amber tent interior contrasting beautifully with cold blue-white starlight above

04-23_03_star_tent.png.inspiration_en: When the universe looks this close, our worries shrink — and our belonging expands.

04-23_04_dusk_birds.png.concept: 暮色中飞鸟归巢，翅膀在晚霞中闪烁

elements.name: 🦅 飞鸟
elements.desc: 剪影般的飞鸟成群归巢

elements.name: 🌅 晚霞
elements.desc: 橙红色的晚霞染红天空

elements.name: ☁️ 云彩
elements.desc: 云彩在落日边镶上金边

04-23_04_dusk_birds.png.concept_en: Dusk Birds—one of OpenClaw's nostalgic pixel art scenes where twilight becomes a journey home. Flying birds silhouette against the burning sunset sky, their wings catching the last golden light as they hurry toward distant nests, and the entire horizon fills with that daily ritual of return that has happened every evening since birds first learned to fly and discovered that nowhere in the sky was ever better than the branch where love waits.

elements_en.name: Flock of Returning Birds
elements_en.desc: Multiple bird silhouettes flying together in coordinated V-formation

elements_en.name: Burning Sunset Sky
elements_en.desc: Deep orange-red gradient filling the entire evening sky

elements_en.name: Wing Highlights in Light
elements_en.desc: Bird wings catching and reflecting the golden sunset glow

elements_en.name: Distant Roost Destination
elements_en.desc: Trees or cliff where the birds are heading before dark

elements_en.name: Dramatic Cloud Formations
elements_en.desc: Evening clouds painted in sunset colors like watercolor bleeding

elements_en.name: Descending Sun Position
elements_en.desc: Hidden sun below horizon casting its final upward light

elements_en.name: Atmospheric Depth Layers
elements_en.desc: Near birds darker and larger, distant birds lighter and smaller

elements_en.name: Golden Hour Warmth
elements_en.desc: The soft amber light that makes everything look like memory

04-23_04_dusk_birds.png.inspiration_en: Every bird knows the way home by heart—even in the dark, even in the storm, because love built the nest and left the door open every single night.

04-23_05_desert_oasis.png.concept: 沙漠中的绿洲是生命的奇迹，椰枣树在阳光下摇曳

elements.name: 🌴 椰枣树
elements.desc: 高大的椰枣树是沙漠中的生命

elements.name: 💧 泉水
elements.desc: 清澈泉水在沙海中出现

elements.name: 🦎 沙漠生物
elements.desc: 小动物在泉边饮水

04-23_05_desert_oasis.png.inspiration: 生命总会找到出路，哪怕是在沙漠中。
04-23_05_desert_oasis.png.concept_en: Desert Oasis—one of OpenClaw's miraculous pixel art scenes where life defies everything to exist. Date palms sway beside crystal waters surrounded by endless golden sand, a circle of green surrounded by gold that whispers the oldest truth: where water gathers, life insists on arriving, patient and persistent and absolutely certain that gold is not the only color that matters when you know how to find the spring beneath the dune.

elements_en.name: Towering Date Palms
elements_en.desc: Tall palm trees with feathery fronds swaying gently in warm desert breeze

elements_en.name: Life-Giving Pool
elements_en.desc: Clear blue water pool reflecting the bright desert sky

elements_en.name: Golden Sand Dunes
elements_en.desc: Rolling waves of warm sand stretching to every horizon edge

elements_en.name: Palm Shadow Play
elements_en.desc: Dark shadows cast across the sand beneath the swaying palms

elements_en.name: Bright Desert Sunlight
elements_en.desc: Intense golden sun illuminating every grain of sand

elements_en.name: Life Clustered Around Water
elements_en.desc: Dense green vegetation only where water reaches

elements_en.name: Oasis Fringe Definition
elements_en.desc: Sharp boundary where green meets gold in stark beautiful contrast

elements_en.name: Blue Sky Above Gold Below
elements_en.desc: Contrast between blue heavens and sandy earth framing the green

04-23_05_desert_oasis.png.inspiration_en: The desert teaches what cities forget—that every civilization began with someone wise enough to recognize where the water hides.

04-23_06_lighthouse.png.concept: 海边的灯塔孤独守望，为归航的船只指引方向

elements.name: 🗼 灯塔
elements.desc: 白色的灯塔矗立在海边岩壁上

elements.name: 🌊 海浪
elements.desc: 波涛拍打着礁石

elements.name: 🌅 夕阳
elements.desc: 金红的夕阳映照灯塔

04-23_06_lighthouse.png.inspiration: 灯塔的光，是永不熄灭的希望。
04-23_06_lighthouse.png.concept_en: Seaside Lighthouse—one of OpenClaw's steadfast pixel art scenes where solitude becomes service. A white tower stands sentinel on rocky cliffs above churning seas, its rotating beam cutting through fog and darkness to guide lost ships home, and the lighthouse teaches us that loneliness and purpose can live in the same place—that sometimes the most important work happens alone on the edge of the world where the only witness is the moon.

elements_en.name: Towering White Lighthouse
elements_en.desc: Striped red and white tower standing firm against the coastal wind

elements_en.name: Rotating Light Beam
elements_en.desc: Powerful beacon sweeping outward across the dark sea surface

elements_en.name: Rocky Coastal Cliffs
elements_en.desc: Rugged dark rocks battered by relentless ocean waves

elements_en.name: Churning Sea Below
elements_en.desc: White-capped waves crashing against the lighthouse foundation

elements_en.name: Foggy Atmosphere
elements_en.desc: Mist and spray creating the conditions where the light is needed most

elements_en.name: Distant Ship Silhouette
elements_en.desc: Small vessel benefiting from the lighthouse guidance homeward

elements_en.name: Dramatic Sea Spray
elements_en.desc: Mist and foam rising from the collision of wave and stone

elements_en.name: Night Sky Darkening
elements_en.desc: Evening darkness making the lighthouse light increasingly vital

04-23_06_lighthouse.png.inspiration_en: The lighthouse does not fear the storm—it was built for exactly this, to stand where others cannot and shine when others need the way shown.

04-23_07_雪夜温泉.png.concept: 雪夜中的温泉热气氤氲，白雪覆盖四周，温暖如春

elements.name: ♨️ 温泉
elements.desc: 热气腾腾的温泉在雪景中

elements.name: ❄️ 白雪
elements.desc: 皑皑白雪覆盖四周

elements.name: 🏨 旅馆
elements.desc: 温暖的灯光从旅馆透出

04-23_07_雪夜温泉.png.inspiration: 冰与火的交融，是冬日最诗意的享受。
04-23_07_雪夜温泉.png.concept_en: Snowy Hot Spring Night—one of OpenClaw's contrasting pixel art scenes where opposites become friends. Steam rises from warm waters surrounded by pristine snow, the air cold enough to freeze breath while the water invites lingering, and the snowscape teaches that warmth and cold are not enemies but dance partners who create something neither could make alone—the simple miracle of being perfectly warm in a world of perfect cold.

elements_en.name: Billowing Hot Spring Steam
elements_en.desc: Dense white vapor rising into the frozen night air in gentle waves

elements_en.name: Snow-Covered Ground
elements_en.desc: Pristine white snow blanketing every surface around the spring

elements_en.name: Rocky Spring Basin
elements_en.desc: Natural stone pool holding the precious thermal water

elements_en.name: Evergreen Pine Trees
elements_en.desc: Snow-draped pine branches framing the steamy scene

elements_en.name: Falling Snowflakes
elements_en.desc: Individual snowflakes drifting down through the steam glow

elements_en.name: Warm Water Surface
elements_en.desc: Light blue-tinged thermal water glowing softly against snow white

elements_en.name: Snow-Capped Rocks
elements_en.desc: Rounded stones decorated with fresh white powder

elements_en.name: Frozen Night Atmosphere
elements_en.desc: Deep blue darkness framing the warm golden spring glow

04-23_07_雪夜温泉.png.inspiration_en: The hot spring asks the snow for nothing and gives the snow something beautiful to watch—and friendship between opposites makes both more interesting.

04-23_08_rainbow_cabin.png.concept: 彩虹尽头的小木屋，童话般的存在，温馨而梦幻

elements.name: 🌈 彩虹
elements.desc: 七彩彩虹高悬天际

elements.name: 🏡 木屋
elements.desc: 温馨的小木屋静静伫立

elements.name: 🌸 花园
elements.desc: 小屋外开满各色花朵

04-23_08_rainbow_cabin.png.inspiration: 彩虹尽头的小屋，是梦想中的家。
04-23_08_rainbow_cabin.png.concept_en: Rainbow Cabin—one of OpenClaw's whimsical pixel art scenes where fairy tales become viewable. A charming wooden cottage rests at rainbow's end, its warm golden windows glowing against the purple-blue sky while the perfect arc of color arches overhead like the universe confirming that yes, every treasure at the end of every story looks exactly like coming home to a place that was built just for you.

elements_en.name: Perfect Rainbow Arc
elements_en.desc: Seven-color spectrum arching gracefully across the entire sky

elements_en.name: Cozy Wooden Cabin
elements_en.desc: Small cottage with warm glowing windows welcoming from below the rainbow

elements_en.name: Warm Window Light
elements_en.desc: Golden glow emanating from the cabin interior through glass

elements_en.name: Flower-Garden Surroundings
elements_en.desc: Colorful blooms growing around the base of the rainbow's endpoint

elements_en.name: Rolling Green Hills
elements_en.desc: Soft green pastoral landscape beneath the rainbow

elements_en.name: Fairy Tale Sky
elements_en.desc: Soft purple and blue gradient creating magical atmosphere

elements_en.name: Rainbow Reflection Suggestion
elements_en.desc: Faint secondary rainbow hint at the ground receiving the spectrum

elements_en.name: Storybook Charm
elements_en.desc: That unmistakable feeling of entering an illustrated children's book

04-23_08_rainbow_cabin.png.inspiration_en: Every rainbow ends somewhere—and the wise traveler knows that the treasure is never at the top of the arc but always waiting quietly where the colors land on solid ground.

04-23_09_foggy_bridge.png.concept: 薄雾笼罩的古桥，若隐若现，如水墨画般意境深远

elements.name: 🌁 薄雾
elements.desc: 轻柔的雾气漂浮在水面

elements.name: 🌉 古桥
elements.desc: 青石古桥在雾中若隐若现

elements.name: 🏞️ 山水
elements.desc: 中国风的山水画意境

04-23_09_foggy_bridge.png.inspiration: 雾中的古桥，连接着过去与现在。
04-23_09_foggy_bridge.png.concept_en: Foggy Ancient Bridge—one of OpenClaw's meditative pixel art scenes where ink wash painting meets pixel poetry. A weathered stone bridge emerges from thick mist like a brushstroke floating between earth and sky, its form dissolving and reforming in the fog while the entire scene whispers the Chinese philosophy that the greatest beauty exists not in what we see clearly but in what we sense just beyond the edge of seeing.

elements_en.name: Weathered Stone Arch Bridge
elements_en.desc: Ancient curved bridge built from moss-covered gray stone blocks

elements_en.name: Thick Rolling Fog
elements_en.desc: Dense white mist obscuring the water below and the far shore

elements_en.name: Ink Wash Sky Gradient
elements_en.desc: Soft gray-blue tones bleeding into white like traditional painting

elements_en.name: Partially Visible Stream
elements_en.desc: Dark water glimpsed beneath the mist layer below the bridge

elements_en.name: Bamboo Grove Silhouettes
elements_en.desc: Dark bamboo shapes fading into the foggy distance

elements_en.name: Bridge Reflection in Mist
elements_en.desc: Faint ghostly reflection suggesting water without showing it clearly

elements_en.name: Stone Railings Emerging
elements_en.desc: Bridge handrails appearing through the fog like floating lines

elements_en.name: Calligraphic Negative Space
elements_en.desc: Deliberate emptiness creating that Chinese painting breathing room

04-23_09_foggy_bridge.png.inspiration_en: The bridge does not need to be seen completely to be beautiful—partial glimpses held in mist often teach us more than full views ever could.

04-23_10_plum_snow.png.concept: 雪中的寒梅傲然绽放，红白相映，坚韧美丽

elements.name: 🌸 梅花
elements.desc: 红梅在白雪中傲然绽放

elements.name: ❄️ 白雪
elements.desc: 皑皑白雪覆盖大地

elements.name: 🌨️ 寒风
elements.desc: 寒风中梅香四溢

04-23_10_plum_snow.png.inspiration: 不经一番寒彻骨，哪得梅花扑鼻香。
04-23_10_plum_snow.png.concept_en: Snow Plum—one of OpenClaw's resilient pixel art scenes where winter makes beauty visible. Red plum blossoms burst through pure white snow, their delicate petals impossibly tender against the frozen ground while the ancient tree stands proof that the most precious things in life often bloom in the worst conditions, reminding frozen wanderers that beauty does not ask permission from the weather to exist.

elements_en.name: Crimson Plum Blossoms
elements_en.desc: Bright red flowers fully open despite surrounding snow and frost

elements_en.name: Fresh Snow Accumulation
elements_en.desc: Pure white snow covering branches and ground in soft layers

elements_en.name: Ancient Twisted Tree Trunk
elements_en.desc: Weathered dark bark showing the plums' long years of survival

elements_en.name: Snow-Covered Branches
elements_en.desc: White powder resting on bare limbs beside blooming flowers

elements_en.name: Red and White Contrast
elements_en.desc: Bold color clash between fiery petals and icy white snow

elements_en.name: Delicate Petal Details
elements_en.desc: Individual flower petals visible despite the small pixel scale

elements_en.name: Frozen Ground Surface
elements_en.desc: Hard snow crust beneath the blooming tree symbolizing harsh conditions

elements_en.name: Winter Sky Background
elements_en.desc: Cool gray-blue atmosphere framing the warm flower colors

04-23_10_plum_snow.png.inspiration_en: The plum does not compete with spring flowers—it finds its own season to prove that waiting for the right moment matters more than blooming when everyone else does.

04-24_01_sakura_alley.png.concept: 樱花小巷落英缤纷，粉白色的花瓣铺满青石板路

elements.name: 🌸 樱花
elements.desc: 粉白色花瓣如雪般飘落

elements.name: 🏠 小巷
elements.desc: 日式小巷两侧是古朴的建筑

elements.name: 🛤️ 石板路
elements.desc: 青石板路被花瓣染成粉色

04-24_01_sakura_alley.png.inspiration: 樱花飘落的速度，是每秒五厘米。
04-24_01_sakura_alley.png.concept_en: Sakura Alley—one of OpenClaw's poetic pixel art scenes where paths become petals. A narrow Japanese lane disappears beneath fallen cherry blossoms, its stone path carpeted in pink and white while overhanging branches arch overhead to form a living tunnel of blooms, and the alley teaches that some places are not built for walking through but for being slowly devoured by beauty until arrival and departure lose all meaning.

elements_en.name: Cherry Blossom Canopy Tunnel
elements_en.desc: Dense branches forming an arching roof of pink blooms overhead

elements_en.name: Fallen Petal Carpet
elements_en.desc: Thick layer of pink and white petals covering the entire path

elements_en.name: Traditional Stone Pavers
elements_en.desc: Gray cobblestones visible beneath the scattered blossoms

elements_en.name: Wooden Shop Facades
elements_en.desc: Warm brown wooden walls framing both sides of the narrow lane

elements_en.name: Paper Lantern Strings
elements_en.desc: Traditional lanterns hanging between buildings ready for evening glow

elements_en.name: Arching Branch Shapes
elements_en.desc: Branches curving overhead to create the characteristic tunnel effect

elements_en.name: Petal Drift Patterns
elements_en.desc: Natural groupings of petals showing wind movement and gathering

elements_en.name: Soft Pink Sky Filtering
elements_en.desc: Light tinted pink by the density of blossoms above

04-24_01_sakura_alley.png.inspiration_en: The alley does not care where you are going—it only wants you to forget destinations entirely and simply stand in the falling.

04-24_02_sunrise_sea.png.concept: 海上的日出金光万丈，第一缕阳光照亮天际线

elements.name: 🌅 日出
elements.desc: 金红的太阳从海平面升起

elements.name: 🌊 海浪
elements.desc: 金色海浪轻轻拍打沙滩

elements.name: 🐦 海鸥
elements.desc: 海鸥在晨光中翱翔

04-24_02_sunrise_sea.png.inspiration: 海上日出，是新的一天最美好的开始。
04-24_02_sunrise_sea.png.concept_en: Sunrise over the golden sea — the first rays of dawn breaking across the horizon in spectacular brilliance. This uplifting dawn scene captures the day's most hopeful moment: when darkness surrenders to light, the sky ignites in layers of gold and crimson, and the ocean becomes a mirror reflecting heaven's opening curtain on another brand new beginning.

elements_en.name: Rising sun
elements_en.desc: Brilliant golden sun emerging from ocean horizon, its first rays spreading across the sky in warm glory

elements_en.name: Golden ocean surface
elements_en.desc: Calm sea reflecting all the dawn colors, creating a shimmering pathway of light on the water

elements_en.name: Dramatic sky gradient
elements_en.desc: Layers of color from deep purple at top through orange and gold near the sun

elements_en.name: Radial light rays
elements_en.desc: Glowing sunbeams shooting upward and outward, illuminating the entire sky

elements_en.name: Horizon line
elements_en.desc: Clean dividing line where sea meets sky, emphasizing the vast flat perspective

elements_en.name: Atmospheric glow
elements_en.desc: Overall warm golden atmosphere bathing everything in hope and new beginning

04-24_02_sunrise_sea.png.inspiration_en: Every sunrise is a fresh promise — the ocean has witnessed millions, yet never stops reflecting their light.

04-24_03_bamboo_temple.png.concept: 竹林深处的古寺，晨钟暮鼓，佛法无边

elements.name: 🎋 竹林
elements.desc: 翠绿竹林环绕古寺

elements.name: 🏛️ 古寺
elements.desc: 飞檐翘角的寺庙若隐若现

elements.name: 🔔 钟声
elements.desc: 仿佛能听到晨钟暮鼓

04-24_03_bamboo_temple.png.inspiration: 竹林古寺，是修心养性的绝佳去处。
04-24_03_bamboo_temple.png.concept_en: An ancient temple nestled deep within a bamboo forest, where morning bells and evening drums echo through the green shadows. This painting captures the sacred tranquility of Buddhist monasteries—where towering bamboo sways like incense smoke, ancient stone walls hold centuries of wisdom, and every bell strike calls the soul to stillness and reflection.

elements_en.name: Bamboo forest
elements_en.desc: Dense green bamboo grove surrounding the temple, their tall stalks creating natural cathedral walls filtering soft dappled light

elements_en.name: Ancient temple
elements_en.desc: Traditional Buddhist architecture with curved roofs and weathered stone walls, emerging from the bamboo like a secret sanctuary

elements_en.name: Morning bell tower
elements_en.desc: Elevated pavilion where monks ring the morning bell, its sound believed to carry prayers to heaven

elements_en.name: Stone path
elements_en.desc: Worn stepping stones winding through bamboo, leading visitors toward the temple gates

04-24_03_bamboo_temple.png.inspiration_en: In bamboo's gentle whisper, the dharma speaks without words.

04-24_04_aurora_village.png.concept: 极光下的北欧村庄，童话般的小镇静谧而神秘

elements.name: 🌌 极光
elements.desc: 翠绿与紫色极光在夜空舞动

elements.name: 🏠 木屋
elements.desc: 北欧风格的温暖小木屋

elements.name: ❄️ 积雪
elements.desc: 白雪覆盖着村庄的每个角落

04-24_04_aurora_village.png.inspiration: 极光村庄，是地球上有极光的最美村落。
04-24_04_aurora_village.png.concept_en: A Nordic village beneath the aurora borealis — a fairy-tale settlement serene and mysterious under dancing cosmic lights. This enchanting winter scene captures Scandinavian serenity at its most magical: traditional wooden cottages dusted with snow while emerald and violet aurora ribbons perform their ancient sky ballet above, turning an ordinary village into a real-life wonderland straight from the pages of an illustrated storybook.

elements_en.name: Traditional Nordic cottages
elements_en.desc: Quaint red and wooden houses with snow-covered roofs, their warm windows glowing softly against the cold night

elements_en.name: Aurora borealis overhead
elements_en.desc: Spectacular green and violet northern lights dancing across the night sky in flowing curtains

elements_en.name: Snow-covered landscape
elements_en.desc: Pristine white snow blanketing the ground, trees, and rooftops in winter silence

elements_en.name: Fairy-tale atmosphere
elements_en.desc: Overall magical quality making the village feel like a scene from an illustrated storybook

elements_en.name: Frozen lake or fjord
elements_en.desc: Ice-covered water reflecting both aurora lights and village glow

elements_en.name: Pine forest backdrop
elements_en.desc: Dark green evergreen trees framing the village, their branches heavy with snow

04-24_04_aurora_village.png.inspiration_en: In Nordic lands, the sky puts on shows for free — and shares them only with those patient enough to wait.

04-24_05_rain_cafe.png.concept: 雨中的咖啡馆温暖宁静，窗上雨丝如帘，岁月静好

elements.name: ☕ 咖啡
elements.desc: 香气四溢的咖啡温暖人心

elements.name: 🌧️ 细雨
elements.desc: 窗外细雨淅淅沥沥

elements.name: 💡 灯光
elements.desc: 温暖的灯光照亮雨中的小店

04-24_05_rain_cafe.png.inspiration: 雨中咖啡馆，是都市中的慢时光。
04-24_05_rain_cafe.png.concept_en: A café tucked away in the rain, warm and peaceful, with rain streaks on the window forming delicate curtains. This painting captures that rare moment of stillness—outside the world rushes by in downpour, but inside there's only the aroma of coffee, the sound of rain on glass, and the quiet passage of peaceful time.

elements_en.name: Café interior
elements_en.desc: Warm wooden interior with soft amber lighting, small tables and chairs visible through rain-streaked windows

elements_en.name: Rain curtain
elements_en.desc: Graceful droplets streaming down window glass, creating natural translucent curtains that blur the outside world

elements_en.name: Wet street
elements_en.desc: Pavement glistening with rainwater, reflecting city lights in gentle ripples

elements_en.name: Passing pedestrians
elements_en.desc: Blurred silhouettes of umbrella-carrying figures hurrying past outside, contrasting with the indoor stillness

04-24_05_rain_cafe.png.inspiration_en: The best moments happen when the world outside is chaotic and you find warmth within.

04-24_06_autumn_maple.png.concept: 秋日枫林层林尽染，红叶如火焰般绚烂

elements.name: 🍁 红叶
elements.desc: 火红的枫叶如云霞般绚烂

elements.name: 🏔️ 山峦
elements.desc: 层层叠叠的山峦被红叶覆盖

elements.name: 🌅 秋阳
elements.desc: 温暖的秋阳洒在林间

04-24_06_autumn_maple.png.inspiration: 秋天的枫林，是燃烧的季节。
04-24_06_autumn_maple.png.concept_en: Autumn maple forest ablaze with color — every tree transformed into a living flame of crimson, orange, and gold. This spectacular fall scene captures nature's most fiery transformation: walking through the woods becomes a journey through fire without heat, where each red leaf carries the sun's final warmth before winter's quiet arrival transforms everything to peaceful rest.

elements_en.name: Blazing maple trees
elements_en.desc: Rows of maples in full autumn glory, their leaves ranging from bright red to deep orange to golden yellow

elements_en.name: Flame-like foliage
elements_en.desc: Red leaves catching sunlight, appearing to glow like small flames dancing on every branch

elements_en.name: Layered forest depth
elements_en.desc: Multiple rows of trees creating rich depth, each layer showing slightly different autumn tones

elements_en.name: Fallen leaf carpet
elements_en.desc: Red and golden leaves blanketing the forest floor in soft warm layers

elements_en.name: Autumn sunlight filtering
elements_en.desc: Golden autumn light streaming through the canopy, warming the colorful scene

elements_en.name: Quiet woodland atmosphere
elements_en.desc: Peaceful forest ambiance suggesting solitary autumn walk through chromatic wonder

04-24_06_autumn_maple.png.inspiration_en: Autumn maples don't burn — they simply remember summer so deeply they glow remembering it.

04-24_07_sailboat.png.concept: 帆船在蔚蓝大海上航行，白帆在风中鼓起

elements.name: ⛵ 帆船
elements.desc: 白色帆布在蓝天白云下闪耀

elements.name: 🌊 大海
elements.desc: 蔚蓝的大海一望无际

elements.name: ☁️ 白云
elements.desc: 朵朵白云在天际飘浮

04-24_07_sailboat.png.inspiration: 扬帆远航，追逐梦想的彼端。
04-24_07_sailboat.png.concept_en: A sailboat navigates across the vast blue ocean, its white sails billowing full in the wind. This painting captures the freedom and adventure of seafaring—where endless horizons meet boundless sky, where wind becomes the navigator and waves become the path, where every voyage is a story written on the boundless sea.

elements_en.name: Sailing boat
elements_en.desc: A graceful vessel with triangular white sails catching the wind, gliding across the deep blue ocean with purpose and elegance

elements_en.name: Open ocean
elements_en.desc: Endless stretches of deep blue water meeting the horizon, waves catching fragments of sunlight

elements_en.name: Wind-swelled sails
elements_en.desc: White canvas sails puffed full by ocean breezes, their curves suggesting invisible wind currents

elements_en.name: Horizon line
elements_en.desc: Where sea meets sky in a distant line, suggesting infinite space and possibility

04-24_07_sailboat.png.inspiration_en: The ocean answers only those brave enough to sail toward the horizon.

04-24_08_lighthouse.png.concept: 海边灯塔矗立在岩石上，孤寂而坚定

elements.name: 🗼 灯塔
elements.desc: 白色灯塔矗立在海边礁石上

elements.name: 🌊 浪花
elements.desc: 浪花拍打着灯塔基座

elements.name: 🌅 余晖
elements.desc: 夕阳余晖染红天际

04-24_08_lighthouse.png.inspiration: 灯塔的孤独，是一种坚守。
04-24_08_lighthouse.png.concept_en: A lighthouse stands alone on rocky cliffs by the sea, solitary yet steadfast. This painting captures the quiet heroism of the lighthouse—the steadfast guardian that never sleeps, never wavers, standing guard through every storm and darkness to guide lost ships safely home. Loneliness is not weakness; it is quiet strength that endures.

elements_en.name: Lighthouse
elements_en.desc: White tower rising from dark rock, its beacon light cutting through fog and darkness, standing resilient against crashing waves

elements_en.name: Rocky cliff
elements_en.desc: Jagged coastal rocks battered by ocean waves, rough textures contrasting with the lighthouse's elegant form

elements_en.name: Crashing waves
elements_en.desc: Foaming white waves breaking against the shore, their roar echoing the eternal conversation between sea and land

elements_en.name: Distant horizon
elements_en.desc: Where ocean meets stormy sky, ships barely visible in the distance guided by the lighthouse beam

04-24_08_lighthouse.png.inspiration_en: True strength stands alone in the dark—guiding others without needing to be seen.

04-24_09_aurora_mountain.png.concept: 极光下的雪山巍峨壮丽，光与影的绝美交织

elements.name: 🌌 极光
elements.desc: 翠绿与紫色的光带在夜空中舞动

elements.name: 🏔️ 雪山
elements.desc: 皑皑雪峰在极光下闪耀

elements.name: ⭐ 繁星
elements.desc: 无数星辰点缀在深邃夜空

04-24_09_aurora_mountain.png.inspiration: 极光雪山，是天与地最壮丽的对话。
04-24_09_aurora_mountain.png.concept_en: A majestic snow-capped mountain beneath the aurora — light and shadow weaving their most spectacular dance across the frozen peaks. This breathtaking scene captures nature's grandest theater: emerald and violet aurora ribbons swirling above pristine white summits while moonlight paints ancient glaciers in ethereal blue, creating a moment where earth and cosmos meet in perfect, silent majesty.

elements_en.name: Snow-covered mountain peaks
elements_en.desc: Dramatic mountain range with peaks blanketed in pristine white snow, rising majestically into the night sky

elements_en.name: Aurora borealis overhead
elements_en.desc: Flowing ribbons of green, violet and pink dancing across the dark sky above the mountains

elements_en.name: Glacial ice formations
elements_en.desc: Ancient blue-white glaciers and ice fields catching moonlight and aurora reflection

elements_en.name: Dramatic light contrast
elements_en.desc: Sharp interplay between warm aurora colors and cool snow whites and deep shadow blacks

elements_en.name: Star-filled sky
elements_en.desc: Countless stars visible around the aurora, adding cosmic depth to the mountain scene

elements_en.name: Atmospheric clarity
elements_en.desc: Crisp high-altitude air feeling conveyed through sharp definition and cool color palette

04-24_09_aurora_mountain.png.inspiration_en: Where the aurora meets the mountain, light and silence conspire to make us remember how small our worries truly are.

04-24_10_coral_garden.png.concept: 海底珊瑚花园色彩斑斓，热带鱼穿梭其中

elements.name: 🪸 珊瑚
elements.desc: 五彩斑斓的珊瑚如花园般绽放

elements.name: 🐠 热带鱼
elements.desc: 色彩鲜艳的热带鱼穿梭其间

elements.name: 💫 气泡
elements.desc: 上升的气泡如同珍珠闪烁

04-24_10_coral_garden.png.inspiration: 海底花园，是大自然最绚丽的调色盘。
04-24_10_coral_garden.png.concept_en: A vibrant underwater coral garden teeming with life — rainbow-colored reefs and tropical fish dancing together in sunlit depths. This spectacular oceanic scene captures the sea's most joyful wonder: where coral formations bloom in impossible colors, tiny fish dart through sunbeams, and the ocean floor becomes an underwater paradise proving that some of nature's most magical gardens grow beneath the waves.

elements_en.name: Coral reef formations
elements_en.desc: Lush coral structures in every color imaginable — branching staghorn, rounded brain coral, fan-like sea fans swaying gently

elements_en.name: Tropical fish
elements_en.desc: Schools of bright tropical fish in vivid oranges, yellows, blues and greens weaving through the coral maze

elements_en.name: Sunbeams underwater
elements_en.desc: Golden rays of sunlight streaming down through clear blue water, illuminating the reef from above

elements_en.name: Blue ocean depth
elements_en.desc: Layers of blue water creating depth and atmosphere, from bright turquoise near surface to deeper sapphire below

elements_en.name: Seaweed and plants
elements_en.desc: Gently swaying aquatic plants and seaweed adding organic movement and texture to the scene

elements_en.name: Sandy ocean floor
elements_en.desc: White sand bottom dotted with colorful shells and small sea creatures, completing the living ecosystem

04-24_10_coral_garden.png.inspiration_en: The ocean's most beautiful gardens need no soil — only patience, salt water, and millions of years of quiet growing.

04-25_02_aurora_mountain.png.concept: 翠绿与紫罗兰色的极光带在雪山上空蜿蜒起舞。白雪覆盖的山峰在光幕下闪烁，山脚村庄灯火点点，天地静谧。

elements.name: 🎨 主题
elements.desc: aurora

04-25_02_aurora_mountain.png.inspiration: 极光的美，在于它稍纵即逝。雪山不说话，却懂得如何承接这份稍纵即逝的光。
04-25_02_aurora_mountain.png.concept_en: Emerald and violet aurora ribbons dancing above snow-capped peaks — the mountainside shimmering beneath this celestial curtain of light while tiny village lights twinkle at the base. Heaven and earth share a profound stillness in this breathtaking moment where cosmic beauty meets humble human warmth.

elements_en.name: Dancing aurora ribbons
elements_en.desc: Flowing emerald green and violet bands of northern lights undulating across the night sky

elements_en.name: Snow-capped peaks
elements_en.desc: Majestic mountain summits blanketed in pristine white snow, glowing softly under aurora light

elements_en.name: Mountain village lights
elements_en.desc: Warm glowing windows of small village homes scattered along the mountain base

elements_en.name: Still night atmosphere
elements_en.desc: Deep silence and peace suggested through cool color palette and serene composition

elements_en.name: Celestial color palette
elements_en.desc: Cool blues, purples, greens and whites creating an otherworldly ethereal mood

elements_en.name: Light and shadow interplay
elements_en.desc: Aurora light reflecting off snow surfaces, creating luminous glow throughout the scene

04-25_02_aurora_mountain.png.inspiration_en: The mountains don't speak, yet they understand how to hold the aurora's fleeting beauty — and make it eternal.

04-25_05_rain_cafe.png.concept: 细雨顺着咖啡馆玻璃窗流淌，弯曲线痕如绢帛。窗内暖黄灯光柔和，咖啡热气袅袅升起，行人在雨中撑伞匆匆走过。

elements.name: 🎨 主题
elements.desc: rain

04-25_05_rain_cafe.png.inspiration: 雨天咖啡馆有一种慢下来的魔法。窗外的雨越急，杯中的咖啡越暖。
04-25_05_rain_cafe.png.concept_en: Gentle rain flowing down cafe glass windows in curved silk-like streams — warm amber interior glow with rising coffee steam while umbrella-carrying pedestrians hurry through the rain outside. A perfect rainy day sanctuary where the slower you look, the more beauty unfolds in each passing moment.

elements_en.name: Curved rain streams
elements_en.desc: Delicate raindrops tracing flowing curved paths down glass windows, resembling silk ribbons in motion

elements_en.name: Warm cafe interior
elements_en.desc: Soft amber-yellow glow emanating from cafe windows, warm and inviting against the cool rainy evening

elements_en.name: Rising coffee steam
elements_en.desc: Gentle wisps of steam curling up from hot coffee cups, adding cozy warmth to the scene

elements_en.name: Rainy street outside
elements_en.desc: Blurred wet street visible through rain-streaked windows, colors softened into watercolor impressions

elements_en.name: Umbrella pedestrians
elements_en.desc: People hurrying past with umbrellas, their shapes suggested through the rain-blurred glass

elements_en.name: Rain-on-glass texture
elements_en.desc: Natural soft-focus effect created by rain patterns, making the outside world a gentle impressionist blur

04-25_05_rain_cafe.png.inspiration_en: The heavier the rain outside, the warmer the coffee feels — strangers passing by become characters in your quiet story.

04-25_07_bamboo_stream.png.concept: 青翠竹林深处溪水清澈见底，阳光穿过竹叶洒落斑驳光影。水面波光粼粼，鱼影穿梭其间，竹影摇曳，鸟鸣清脆。

elements.name: 🎨 主题
elements.desc: bamboo

04-25_07_bamboo_stream.png.inspiration: 水声听得多了，反而忘了自己心里原本很吵。
04-25_07_bamboo_stream.png.concept_en: Deep emerald bamboo forest with crystal-clear stream — sunlight filtering through bamboo leaves casting dappled patterns while fish dart beneath sparkling water and bamboo shadows sway gently. The gentle rush of water, clear bird songs, and dancing light create a meditation on nature's perfect stillness.

elements_en.name: Towering bamboo stalks
elements_en.desc: Dense grove of tall green bamboo creating a natural cathedral, their straight forms reaching toward filtered sky light

elements_en.name: Crystal-clear stream
elements_en.desc: Pristine shallow water with smooth stones visible on the stream bed, its surface reflecting sky and bamboo above

elements_en.name: Dappled sunlight
elements_en.desc: Sunbeams filtering through bamboo canopy, creating moving circles and patterns of light and shadow on the ground

elements_en.name: Sparkling water surface
elements_en.desc: Glistening ripples catching light, making the stream surface dance with tiny points of reflected brightness

elements_en.name: Swimming fish
elements_en.desc: Silvery fish silhouettes moving through clear water, their shadows and movements adding life to the scene

elements_en.name: Swaying bamboo shadows
elements_en.desc: Gentle bamboo shadows dancing across rocks and water, creating ever-changing organic patterns

04-25_07_bamboo_stream.png.inspiration_en: When the heart grows too noisy, find a stream in bamboo — the water knows how to carry thoughts away without judging them.

04-25_01_sakura_swing.png.concept: 粉白花瓣纷纷扬扬，古朴的木质秋千在春风中轻轻摇曳。少女撑着纸伞坐在秋千上，裙摆与花瓣一同飞舞，春日气息弥漫。

elements.name: 🎨 主题
elements.desc: sakura

04-25_01_sakura_swing.png.inspiration: 樱花是春天写给大地的信，而秋千是风替树梢念给少女听的悄悄话。
04-25_01_sakura_swing.png.concept_en: Pink and white petals drift in the breeze while an antique wooden swing sways gently in spring. A girl with a paper parasol sits on the swing, her skirt dancing with the falling blossoms, filling the air with spring's warmth

elements_en.name: Cherry blossoms
elements_en.desc: Pink and white petals swirling and drifting in the spring breeze

elements_en.name: Wooden swing
elements_en.desc: Antique wooden swing with ornate detailing, swaying gently

elements_en.name: Girl with parasol
elements_en.desc: Young girl in traditional dress sitting on the swing holding a paper umbrella

elements_en.name: Flying skirt
elements_en.desc: Dress billowing gracefully as the swing moves, petals caught in the fabric

elements_en.name: Spring atmosphere
elements_en.desc: Warm golden light and soft breeze carrying the essence of spring

04-25_01_sakura_swing.png.inspiration_en: Sakura whispers spring's love letter to the earth through the swing

04-25_03_lighthouse.png.concept: 白色灯塔孤独矗立于岩石悬崖，漆黑海浪猛烈拍打礁石。灯塔光芒穿透迷雾，照亮归航之路，橙红晚霞染满天际。

elements.name: 🎨 主题
elements.desc: lighthouse

04-25_03_lighthouse.png.inspiration: 灯塔不孤独。孤独的是那些看不见它的人。
04-25_03_lighthouse.png.concept_en: A white lighthouse stands alone on rocky cliffs as black waves crash violently against the shore. The beacon cuts through dense fog, guiding ships safely home. Orange-red sunset blazes across the entire sky—a scene of solitude, resilience, and quiet hope.

elements_en.name: White lighthouse
elements_en.desc: Tall solitary tower rising from the cliff edge, its weathered white paint glowing against the dramatic sky

elements_en.name: Rocky cliff
elements_en.desc: Dark jagged coastal rocks thrusting upward, battered by relentless ocean waves

elements_en.name: Crashing waves
elements_en.desc: Dark foaming waves breaking against the shore with thunderous force, spray catching the last light

elements_en.name: Lighthouse beam
elements_en.desc: Powerful beam of light piercing through mist and fog, stretching far across the darkening sea

elements_en.name: Sunset sky
elements_en.desc: Brilliant gradient from deep orange near the horizon to purple and dark blue above, clouds painted in hues of fire

04-25_03_lighthouse.png.inspiration_en: The lighthouse never sleeps—for those lost at sea, its light is the promise of home.

04-25_06_star_tent.png.concept: 深蓝夜空繁星如钻，米色帐篷静卧草地。银河横亘天际，远处篝火明灭，夜风轻拂草尖，天地沉浸于宇宙的寂静之中。

elements.name: 🎨 主题
elements.desc: star

04-25_06_star_tent.png.inspiration: 帐篷搭在草地上，银河铺在天花板上。这一夜，万物都近。
04-25_06_star_tent.png.concept_en: Deep blue night sky sparkles with diamond-like stars above a beige tent resting peacefully on the meadow. The Milky Way arches across the heavens, a distant campfire flickers warmly, and gentle night breeze rustles the grass—earth and sky merged in cosmic silence.

elements_en.name: Starry sky
elements_en.desc: Deep blue-black night sky scattered with countless bright stars, each point shimmering like scattered diamonds against the infinite dark

elements_en.name: Beige tent
elements_en.desc: Warm-toned camping tent nestled on soft grassland, its gentle glow contrasting with the cool night sky

elements_en.name: Milky Way
elements_en.desc: Luminous band of stars spanning the entire sky, creating a river of light made of countless distant suns

elements_en.name: Distant campfire
elements_en.desc: Small warm glow of firelight flickering in the far distance, adding human warmth to the vast wilderness

04-25_06_star_tent.png.inspiration_en: Under the same stars, we are all travelers finding our way home.

04-25_08_desert_oasis.png.concept: 金黄沙丘连绵至天边，清泉与椰枣树倒映在绿洲的水面。骆驼商队缓缓走近，远处蜃楼若隐若现，荒凉与生机同在。

elements.name: 🎨 主题
elements.desc: desert

04-25_08_desert_oasis.png.inspiration: 最珍贵的，往往出现在你以为再也走不出去的地方。
04-25_08_desert_oasis.png.concept_en: Golden sand dunes stretch endlessly toward the horizon, where crystal springs and date palms reflect perfectly on the oasis surface. A camel caravan approaches slowly in the distance, a shimmering mirage flickering beyond—desolation and life coexisting in fragile harmony.

elements_en.name: Sand dunes
elements_en.desc: Rolling golden sand dunes extending to the horizon, their smooth curves glowing warm under the desert sun

elements_en.name: Oasis spring
elements_en.desc: Crystal-clear water pool surrounded by lush green vegetation, a miracle of life in the barren desert

elements_en.name: Date palms
elements_en.desc: Tall swaying date palms reflected in the still oasis waters, their fronds creating natural shade and dappled light

elements_en.name: Camel caravan
elements_en.desc: Silhouettes of camels with their handlers slowly crossing the dunes, ancient travelers on the desert trade route

elements_en.name: Distant mirage
elements_en.desc: Flickering mirage shimmering on the horizon, an illusion of water and buildings that dances in the heat

04-25_08_desert_oasis.png.inspiration_en: Where death meets water, life becomes the greatest miracle of all.

04-25_09_rainbow_cabin.png.concept: 七色彩虹横跨天际，弧线尽头指向林间红色小木屋。花丛环绕屋旁，炊烟袅袅升空，彩虹似乎为小屋镀上一层梦幻金边。

elements.name: 🎨 主题
elements.desc: rainbow

04-25_09_rainbow_cabin.png.inspiration: 彩虹的尽头住着谁？也许住着一个相信童话的人。
04-25_09_rainbow_cabin.png.concept_en: A seven-colored rainbow arches across the sky, its arc pointing toward a cozy red cabin nestled in the forest. Flowers surround the cottage while wisps of smoke curl from the chimney, the rainbow casting a dreamlike golden glow over the little house

elements_en.name: Rainbow
elements_en.desc: Seven colors arcing gracefully across the bright sky

elements_en.name: Red cabin
elements_en.desc: Charming small wooden house tucked among the trees

elements_en.name: Flower garden
elements_en.desc: Colorful blooms surrounding the cottage on all sides

elements_en.name: Chimney smoke
elements_en.desc: Gentle wisps of smoke rising into the air

elements_en.name: Golden glow
elements_en.desc: Dreamy light from the rainbow enveloping the scene

04-25_09_rainbow_cabin.png.inspiration_en: Where the rainbow ends, a warm home awaits

04-25_10_yurt.png.concept: 辽阔草原一望无际，白色蒙古包错落分布。牛羊成群悠闲觅草，牧民骑马飞驰，天空湛蓝如洗，白云悠悠飘荡。

elements.name: 🎨 主题
elements.desc: yurt

04-25_10_yurt.png.inspiration: 家不是一个地方，家是帐篷里有人等你回来的那盏灯。
04-25_10_yurt.png.concept_en: Vast grassland stretching endlessly to every horizon — white Mongolian yurts scattered across the green expanse while herds of cattle and sheep graze peacefully. A nomad rider gallops across the plains as brilliant blue sky meets drifting white clouds. Freedom, simplicity and the open sky define this timeless steppe life.

elements_en.name: Expansive green grassland
elements_en.desc: Endless rolling green meadows stretching in all directions under vast open sky

elements_en.name: White Mongolian yurts
elements_en.desc: Traditional round white felt tents with wooden lattice walls, clustered peacefully across the landscape

elements_en.name: Grazing livestock
elements_en.desc: Groups of cattle and sheep scattered across the grasslands, feeding contentedly in the sunshine

elements_en.name: Galloping horseman
elements_en.desc: Nomadic rider on horseback racing across the open plains, a symbol of freedom and herding life

elements_en.name: Crystal blue sky
elements_en.desc: Perfectly clear bright blue sky overhead, cloudless and endless

elements_en.name: Drifting white clouds
elements_en.desc: Soft white clouds slowly floating across the vast sky, adding gentle movement to the scene

04-25_10_yurt.png.inspiration_en: The steppe teaches that home isn't a place — it's the feeling of infinite sky above and grass beneath your feet.

04-25_04_dusk_birds.png.concept: 黄昏晚霞如橙红与紫罗兰交织的绸缎铺满天际。飞鸟剪影掠过天空，翅膀反射最后一缕阳光，芦苇丛在微风中摇曳。

elements.name: 🎨 主题
elements.desc: dusk

04-25_04_dusk_birds.png.inspiration: 黄昏不悲伤。悲伤的是那些在黄昏里独自赶路的人。飞鸟已归巢，你呢？
04-25_04_dusk_birds.png.concept_en: Dusk sunset spreads across the sky like silk interwoven with orange-red and violet. Bird silhouettes sweep across the heavens, wings catching the last rays of sunlight, while reed thickets sway gently in the evening breeze—a moment of twilight poetry in motion.

elements_en.name: Sunset sky
elements_en.desc: Brilliant sky ablaze with orange-red and violet-purple hues, clouds like silk draped across the heavens

elements_en.name: Bird silhouettes
elements_en.desc: Flocking birds in dark silhouette gliding gracefully across the glowing sky, wings spread against the warm light

elements_en.name: Wing glints
elements_en.desc: Delicate wing edges catching the last golden rays of sunlight, creating brief moments of warm glint

elements_en.name: Reed thickets
elements_en.desc: Tall graceful reeds swaying in the gentle evening breeze along the water's edge, their slender forms framing the sky

04-25_04_dusk_birds.png.inspiration_en: At dusk, even the birds become poets—writing stories across the burning sky.

01_moonlight_lake.png.concept: 「月光湖」—— moonlight lake 的像素画艺术作品

elements.name: 🎨 主题
elements.desc: moonlight lake

01_moonlight_lake.png.concept_en: A serene moonlit lake shimmering under silver moonlight — the full moon reflected perfectly on still dark water while gentle ripples distort its silver mirror image. Soft light transforms the entire landscape into a dreamscape of blues and silvers, inviting quiet contemplation beneath a sky full of stars.

elements_en.name: Full moon reflection
elements_en.desc: Bright round moon reflected perfectly on glass-like lake surface, its silver image rippling with every breeze

elements_en.name: Calm dark water
elements_en.desc: Deep still lake water in shades of dark blue and black, creating a perfect mirror for sky and moon

elements_en.name: Silvery moonlight
elements_en.desc: Soft silver light washing over the entire scene, creating a gentle luminous atmosphere

elements_en.name: Starlit sky
elements_en.desc: Countless stars scattered across the dark night sky above the moonlit lake

elements_en.name: Soft shoreline trees
elements_en.desc: Dark tree silhouettes lining the lake edge, their forms softened by moonlight's gentle glow

elements_en.name: Gentle ripple patterns
elements_en.desc: Subtle circular ripples on water surface creating ever-changing reflections of light

01_moonlight_lake.png.inspiration_en: The lake doesn't just reflect the moon — it teaches us how even light becomes beautiful when met with stillness.

01_plum_snow.png.concept: 「雪中红梅」—— plum snow 的像素画艺术作品

elements.name: 🎨 主题
elements.desc: plum snow

01_plum_snow.png.concept_en: Crimson plum blossoms blooming defiantly through fresh snow — red flowers against pure white snow creating nature's most striking contrast. Each blossom a brave heart opening in winter's final days, reminding us that beauty can flourish in the coldest moments when we dare to bloom.

elements_en.name: Red plum blossoms
elements_en.desc: Vibrant crimson flowers in full bloom, their delicate petals contrasting beautifully against the cold white snow

elements_en.name: Fresh white snow
elements_en.desc: Pristine snow covering branches, ground and landscape in pure white, making the red flowers absolutely pop

elements_en.name: Snow-dusted branches
elements_en.desc: Curved dark tree branches with snow resting on them, adorned with bright red blossoms

elements_en.name: Snow-covered ground
elements_en.desc: Soft white snow blanketing the earth, creating a peaceful winter ground cover

elements_en.name: Cold winter atmosphere
elements_en.desc: Cool blue and white tones suggesting crisp winter air surrounding the warm red blossoms

elements_en.name: Blossom detail
elements_en.desc: Individual flowers rendered with visible petals and stamens, each one precious and detailed

01_plum_snow.png.inspiration_en: Winter's last secret? Red plum blossoms that bloom when all else sleeps — braver than cold, more beautiful for it.

01_snow_plum.png.concept: 「雪中红梅」—— snow plum 的像素画艺术作品

elements.name: 🎨 主题
elements.desc: snow plum

01_snow_plum.png.concept_en: Delicate red plum blossoms blooming amidst winter snow — each crimson flower a small miracle of warmth against the freezing cold. Pure white snow blankets the landscape while these brave blossoms refuse to wait for spring, proving that the most precious beauty often grows where life seems most impossible.

elements_en.name: Crimson plum blossoms
elements_en.desc: Bright red flowers blossoming boldly on dark branches, their warm color defying the cold white world around them

elements_en.name: Fresh powder snow
elements_en.desc: Soft untouched snow covering branches, rocks and ground in pristine white freshness

elements_en.name: Twisted plum branches
elements_en.desc: Gnarled dark branches creating artistic frames for the bright red flowers, winter's natural sculpture

elements_en.name: Snowflake details
elements_en.desc: Individual snowflakes visible in the air, connecting the warm blossoms to the cold winter sky

elements_en.name: Contrast composition
elements_en.desc: Strong visual contrast between warm red and cool white, drawing the eye to each precious blossom

elements_en.name: Subtle warmth glow
elements_en.desc: Soft warm undertone in the red flowers suggesting inner life and resilience against the cold

01_snow_plum.png.inspiration_en: When snow covers everything in silence, the red plum whispers: the coldest seasons produce the most beautiful hearts.

02_dew_flower.png.concept: 「晨露之花」—— dew flower 的像素画艺术作品

elements.name: 🎨 主题
elements.desc: dew flower

02_dew_flower.png.concept_en: Morning dew-kissed flowers glowing in early light — crystal water droplets perched on delicate petals catch the first sunrise rays, each droplet becoming a tiny prism of rainbow. A world seen in the quiet moment before the day awakens fully, where every blade of grass holds a diamond and every flower carries a sunrise.

elements_en.name: Dew-kissed petals
elements_en.desc: Delicate flower petals covered with perfectly round water droplets, each one sparkling like a tiny gem in morning light

elements_en.name: Rainbow light refraction
elements_en.desc: Dew drops acting as natural prisms, splitting sunlight into tiny rainbows dancing across petals and leaves

elements_en.name: Early golden sunrise
elements_en.desc: Warm first light of dawn painting everything in soft golds and gentle oranges

elements_en.name: Fresh morning grass
elements_en.desc: Green grass blades with dew drops clinging to each tip, creating a field of natural diamonds

elements_en.name: Spider web details
elements_en.desc: Delicate spider webs strung between stems, each thread glittering with accumulated dew drops

elements_en.name: Soft morning mist
elements_en.desc: Subtle mist or fog in the background adding depth and dreamy atmosphere to the scene

02_dew_flower.png.inspiration_en: The dew doesn't wait for applause — it catches the sun for just a moment, then vanishes. That's what makes it precious.

02_sailboat.png.concept: 「帆船航行」—— sailboat 的像素画艺术作品

elements.name: 🎨 主题
elements.desc: sailboat

02_sailboat.png.concept_en: A graceful sailboat gliding across sparkling ocean waters — white sails catching the wind as sunlight dances on gentle waves. The horizon stretches endlessly in every direction, evoking pure freedom and the timeless romance of sea voyages where the only destination is wherever the wind decides to carry you.

elements_en.name: Graceful sailboat
elements_en.desc: Beautiful white sailing vessel with billowing sails cutting through blue waters, its elegant form captured in pixel detail

elements_en.name: Full white sails
elements_en.desc: Triangular sails catching wind fully, their white surfaces catching light and creating dynamic shapes against the sky

elements_en.name: Sparkling ocean waves
elements_en.desc: Gentle blue waters with dancing light reflections, creating a dynamic and alive sea surface

elements_en.name: Endless horizon
elements_en.desc: Vast ocean stretching to distant horizon line, suggesting infinite possibility and open adventure

elements_en.name: Bright sunny sky
elements_en.desc: Clear blue sky with soft white clouds, perfect weather for sailing into the unknown

elements_en.name: Wake trail behind boat
elements_en.desc: White foam wake trailing behind the boat, showing its path and movement through the water

02_sailboat.png.inspiration_en: The sailboat doesn't choose its destination — it trusts the wind. Perhaps that's the bravest way to travel: with open sails and letting go.

03_aurora_mountain.png.concept: 「极光雪山」—— aurora mountain 的像素画艺术作品

elements.name: 🎨 主题
elements.desc: aurora mountain

03_aurora_mountain.png.concept_en: Majestic snow-capped mountains illuminated by dancing aurora borealis — emerald green and violet ribbons of northern lights flowing across the night sky above pristine white peaks. A small village glows warmly at the mountain base while the cosmic light show dances above in ethereal silence. Heaven and earth meet where the sky becomes art and mountains hold the light.

elements_en.name: Snow-capped peaks
elements_en.desc: Towering mountain summits covered in pure white snow, their jagged peaks reaching toward the dancing aurora above

elements_en.name: Dancing aurora ribbons
elements_en.desc: Flowing emerald green and violet bands of northern lights undulating gracefully across the night sky

elements_en.name: Village lights below
elements_en.desc: Warm golden lights from village homes scattered at the mountain base, tiny sparks of human warmth beneath cosmic beauty

elements_en.name: Cosmic color palette
elements_en.desc: Rich blues, greens, violets and whites creating an otherworldly ethereal atmosphere

elements_en.name: Starfield night sky
elements_en.desc: Distant stars visible beyond the aurora, adding depth to the infinite night sky

elements_en.name: Atmospheric glow
elements_en.desc: Aurora light reflecting softly on snow surfaces, creating luminous highlights throughout the mountain scene

03_aurora_mountain.png.inspiration_en: The mountains don't speak, yet they understand how to hold the aurora's fleeting beauty — and make it eternal.

03_sakura_courtyard.png.concept: 「樱花庭院」—— sakura courtyard 的像素画艺术作品

elements.name: 🎨 主题
elements.desc: sakura courtyard

03_sakura_courtyard.png.concept_en: A serene cherry blossom courtyard bathed in soft moonlight — white and pink petals drifting gently through the night as traditional stone lanterns cast warm glows that harmonize beautifully with the blooming sakura. Ancient beauty meets quiet magic in this timeless Japanese garden scene where spring nights feel eternal.

elements_en.name: Cherry blossom branches
elements_en.desc: Graceful branches heavy with pink and white blossoms, their delicate flowers illuminated by soft moonlight overhead

elements_en.name: Drifting petals
elements_en.desc: Individual petals floating and falling through the night air, creating a dreamlike snowfall effect

elements_en.name: Traditional stone lanterns
elements_en.desc: Classic Japanese stone lanterns with warm glowing light, their traditional design adding timeless elegance to the scene

elements_en.name: Moonlit atmosphere
elements_en.desc: Soft silver-blue moonlight creating a gentle nighttime ambiance throughout the courtyard

elements_en.name: Stone pathway
elements_en.desc: Traditional stepping stones or gravel path winding through the garden beneath the blossoms

elements_en.name: Night garden harmony
elements_en.desc: Warm lantern glow contrasting beautifully with cool moonlit petals, creating visual and emotional balance

03_sakura_courtyard.png.inspiration_en: Sakura in daylight speaks of joy — but cherry blossoms under moonlight whisper of love that lingers even after the petals fall.

04-24_01_star_tent.png.concept: 「星空帐篷」—— star tent 的像素画艺术作品

elements.name: 🎨 主题
elements.desc: star tent

04-24_01_star_tent.png.concept_en: A cozy camping tent nestled beneath an infinite star-filled sky — the Milky Way stretches majestically overhead while the tent's warm glow offers a small pocket of human comfort against the vast cosmic wilderness. Perfect solitude under the stars where one can contemplate infinity while staying grounded by the simple shelter of home.

elements_en.name: Camping tent silhouette
elements_en.desc: Warm-toned tent creating a cozy human presence against the endless night sky, its shape familiar and comforting

elements_en.name: Milky Way galaxy
elements_en.desc: Luminous star band stretching across the entire sky, dense with countless stars forming our galactic home

elements_en.name: Dense starfield
elements_en.desc: Thousands of individual stars scattered across the dark sky, each one a distant sun with its own story

elements_en.name: Tent interior glow
elements_en.desc: Warm light emanating from inside the tent, suggesting comfort and shelter from the cosmic cold

elements_en.name: Night landscape
elements_en.desc: Dark mountainous or treed horizon framing the tent and creating sense of wilderness location

elements_en.name: Cosmic scale contrast
elements_en.desc: Tiny human tent against infinite stars, evoking both humility and the wonder of existence

04-24_01_star_tent.png.inspiration_en: The tent is small, the universe is infinite — but lying under the stars, we realize we are made of the same stardust, connected to everything.

04-24_03_moonlight_lake.png.concept: 「月光湖」—— moonlight lake 的像素画艺术作品

elements.name: 🎨 主题
elements.desc: moonlight lake

04-24_03_moonlight_lake.png.concept_en: A tranquil moonlit lake reflecting silver moonlight — the full moon hovers perfectly above while its glow transforms the water into liquid silver. Soft pine silhouettes frame the shoreline, stars twinkle overhead, and gentle ripples create ever-changing reflections. A meditative scene of perfect stillness where water meets sky and time dissolves into peaceful eternity.

elements_en.name: Full moon reflection
elements_en.desc: Bright moon perfectly reflected on mirror-still lake surface, creating a double circle of silver light

elements_en.name: Silvery water surface
elements_en.desc: Calm dark water transforming into liquid silver under moonlight's touch, smooth as glass

elements_en.name: Moonlit pine trees
elements_en.desc: Dark silhouette trees lining the shore, their forms softened by gentle silver moonlight glow

elements_en.name: Starlit night sky
elements_en.desc: Countless stars scattered across the dark sky above the moonlit lake scene

elements_en.name: Rippling reflections
elements_en.desc: Subtle circular ripples distorting the moon's reflection, adding life to the stillness

elements_en.name: Silver-blue atmosphere
elements_en.desc: Cool silver and blue tones throughout, creating a serene contemplative nighttime mood

04-24_03_moonlight_lake.png.inspiration_en: The lake doesn't compete with the moon — it listens, reflects, and creates beauty by staying perfectly still.

04-24_04_waterfall.png.concept: 「山间瀑布」—— waterfall 的像素画艺术作品

elements.name: 🎨 主题
elements.desc: waterfall

04-24_04_waterfall.png.concept_en: A majestic waterfall cascading down mossy mountain cliffs — white water tumbling through green forest with rainbow mists rising from the impact pool below. Surrounding pine trees frame the scene while birds dart through the spray, capturing nature's raw power softened by lush greenery in this timeless mountain sanctuary.

elements_en.name: Cascading waterfall
elements_en.desc: Powerful white water stream tumbling down rocky cliff face, its movement creating dynamic life against static stone

elements_en.name: Misty rainbow spray
elements_en.desc: Fine water droplets catching light to create rainbow shimmer in the mist rising from the impact pool

elements_en.name: Lush green forest
elements_en.desc: Dense verdant trees and moss covering surrounding mountains, their rich greens framing the white water

elements_en.name: Mossy mountain rocks
elements_en.desc: Ancient rocks covered in soft green moss, their textures adding age and natural beauty to the scene

elements_en.name: Impact pool below
elements_en.desc: Calm pool at waterfall base where crashing water creates swirling foam before flowing onward

elements_en.name: Flying birds
elements_en.desc: Small birds darting through the misty air, adding movement and life to the natural paradise

04-24_04_waterfall.png.inspiration_en: The waterfall never stops falling — not because it doesn't know exhaustion, but because it believes every drop will eventually reach the sea.

04-24_06_plum_snow.png.concept: 「雪中红梅」—— plum snow 的像素画艺术作品

elements.name: 🎨 主题
elements.desc: plum snow

04-24_06_plum_snow.png.concept_en: Red plum blossoms bloom defiantly in falling snow, their vibrant crimson petals standing out against the pristine white landscape. This pixel art painting captures the enduring symbol of Chinese poetry—where winter's harshness meets nature's resilient spirit, and beauty flourishes precisely where frost bites deepest.

elements_en.name: Red plum blossoms
elements_en.desc: Bright crimson five-petaled flowers in full bloom, their delicate petals covered with flecks of white snow, radiating warmth against the cold

elements_en.name: Falling snow
elements_en.desc: Gentle snowflakes drifting down from the grey winter sky, settling on branches and ground in soft white layers

elements_en.name: Winter branches
elements_en.desc: Dark gnarled tree branches stretching across the scene, adorned with blooming flowers and snow-capped twigs

elements_en.name: Snow-covered ground
elements_en.desc: Pristine white snow blanketing the earth, its untouched surface reflecting the soft winter light

04-24_06_plum_snow.png.inspiration_en: The plum blooms not despite the snow, but because of it—adversity reveals true beauty.

04-24_07_starry_desert.png.concept: 「星空沙漠」—— starry desert 的像素画艺术作品

elements.name: 🎨 主题
elements.desc: starry desert

04-24_07_starry_desert.png.concept_en: A vast desert transformed under a spectacular star-filled sky — endless golden sand dunes meeting infinite darkness above where the Milky Way blazes like a river of light. The desert's quiet desolation somehow makes the stars feel closer, as if the earth itself has become a window to the cosmos. Solitude meets infinity in this surreal nighttime wilderness where silence speaks loudest.

elements_en.name: Endless sand dunes
elements_en.desc: Rolling golden-brown sand dunes stretching to distant horizons, their curved shapes catching starlight and shadow

elements_en.name: Milky Way river of stars
elements_en.desc: Dense luminous star band crossing the entire sky, brighter and more vivid than any city could allow

elements_en.name: Intense starfield
elements_en.desc: Countless individual stars visible across the dark sky, creating a sense of cosmic density and depth

elements_en.name: Desert night atmosphere
elements_en.desc: Cool blue-black night tones contrasting with warm sand colors, perfect stargazing conditions

elements_en.name: Dune ridge shadows
elements_en.desc: Long shadows cast by starlight along dune ridges, creating dramatic light and dark patterns

elements_en.name: Infinite dark horizon
elements_en.desc: Flat horizon line where earth meets sky seamlessly, enhancing the sense of vastness and solitude

04-24_07_starry_desert.png.inspiration_en: The desert keeps nothing, hides nothing — that's why the stars shine so brightly here. Emptiness becomes infinity.

04-24_08_waterfall_mill.png.concept: 「瀑布水车」—— waterfall mill 的像素画艺术作品

elements.name: 🎨 主题
elements.desc: waterfall mill

04-24_08_waterfall_mill.png.concept_en: A charming traditional waterwheel turning slowly beside a cascading waterfall — ancient wooden mill wheel splashing through mountain stream while mossy stones and lush green banks frame this peaceful scene. Time-honored craftsmanship meets natural beauty in this harmonious blend of human ingenuity and wild landscape where water has turned the wheel for centuries.

elements_en.name: Traditional wooden waterwheel
elements_en.desc: Large rustic water wheel with wooden paddles turning slowly as stream water flows through and around it

elements_en.name: Cascading waterfall
elements_en.desc: Falling water streaming down rocky cliff, its force creating the power that turns the wheel below

elements_en.name: Mossy river stones
elements_en.desc: Weathered stones covered in soft green moss, adding age and natural texture to the streambed

elements_en.name: Flowing mountain stream
elements_en.desc: Clear water rushing past the mill, its movement creating white foam and gentle splashing sounds

elements_en.name: Lush green banks
elements_en.desc: Dense vegetation and plant life growing along the water's edge, framing the scene in natural green

elements_en.name: Rustic mill house
elements_en.desc: Simple traditional mill structure connected to the wheel, its wooden walls weathered by time and water spray

04-24_08_waterfall_mill.png.inspiration_en: The waterwheel doesn't fight the current — it embraces it. Surrender becomes strength when we work with nature instead of against it.

04-24_09_snowy_town.png.concept: 「雪后小镇」—— snowy town 的像素画艺术作品

elements.name: 🎨 主题
elements.desc: snowy town

04-24_09_snowy_town.png.concept_en: A picturesque snow-covered town in peaceful winter stillness — charming cottages with snow-dusted roofs, warm lights glowing in windows, and smoke curling from chimneys. Soft white snow blankets every surface while bare trees stand quiet sentinel and a frozen pond reflects the grey winter sky. A storybook winter scene where warmth and cold coexist in perfect harmony.

elements_en.name: Snow-covered rooftops
elements_en.desc: Traditional houses with thick snow resting on every roof, their warm interior lights glowing through windows

elements_en.name: Curling chimney smoke
elements_en.desc: Soft grey smoke rising gently from chimneys into cold winter air, suggesting cozy warmth inside

elements_en.name: White snow blankets
elements_en.desc: Deep white snow covering streets, paths and all outdoor surfaces in pristine peaceful covering

elements_en.name: Bare winter trees
elements_en.desc: Leafless trees standing quietly along paths and around buildings, their branches dusted with snow

elements_en.name: Frozen pond reflection
elements_en.desc: Still frozen pond reflecting grey sky and white surroundings, its mirror surface adding stillness to the scene

elements_en.name: Snowy street scene
elements_en.desc: Quiet village street winding between houses, its snow unmarked and perfectly peaceful

elements_en.name: Winter atmosphere
elements_en.desc: Cool blue-grey winter palette throughout, evoking the quiet beauty of cold season stillness

04-24_09_snowy_town.png.inspiration_en: Snow doesn't bury a town — it gives it permission to rest, and reminds us that even silence has a soft side.

04_autumn_wheat.png.concept: 「秋日麦田」—— autumn wheat 的像素画艺术作品

elements.name: 🎨 主题
elements.desc: autumn wheat

04_autumn_wheat.png.concept_en: Golden wheat fields ripple like ocean waves under the autumn sun, their amber heads bowing in the harvest breeze. This pixel art painting celebrates autumn's bounty—where endless golden waves meet the distant horizon, embodying the season of reaping what was sown, of gratitude for nature's generous gifts.

elements_en.name: Wheat field
elements_en.desc: Endless golden wheat stalks stretching to the horizon, their ripe heads heavy with grain and swaying in gentle waves

elements_en.name: Harvest gold
elements_en.desc: Rich amber and gold color palette capturing the warmth of autumn sunlight filtering through the wheat

elements_en.name: Distant horizon
elements_en.desc: Where golden wheat meets blue sky in a luminous line, creating a sense of infinite space and possibility

elements_en.name: Autumn sky
elements_en.desc: Clear blue autumn sky with wisps of white clouds, contrasting beautifully with the warm golden fields

04_autumn_wheat.png.inspiration_en: Autumn's gold is earned through spring's patience and summer's labor.

04_dew_flower.png.concept: 「晨露之花」—— dew flower 的像素画艺术作品

elements.name: 🎨 主题
elements.desc: dew flower

04_dew_flower.png.concept_en: Morning dew-kissed flowers awakening in golden first light — crystal droplets perched on delicate petals catch the early sunrise, each becoming a tiny prism of rainbow. The world holds its breath in that quiet moment before dawn fully arrives, where every blade of grass cradles a diamond and every flower carries its own small sunrise.

elements_en.name: Sparkling dewdrops
elements_en.desc: Perfectly round water droplets clinging to petals and leaves, each one catching light and sparkling like precious gems

elements_en.name: First sunrise glow
elements_en.desc: Warm golden dawn light painting everything in soft amber and rose tones, the gentlest illumination of day

elements_en.name: Delicate flower petals
elements_en.desc: Soft colored petals with visible dew accumulation, their surfaces reflecting rainbow light through each droplet

elements_en.name: Gem-like grass blades
elements_en.desc: Green grass tips adorned with hanging dew drops, each one a miniature mirror reflecting the sky

elements_en.name: Rainbow light refraction
elements_en.desc: Dewdrops acting as natural prisms, splitting sunlight into tiny rainbows dancing across the scene

elements_en.name: Morning mist atmosphere
elements_en.desc: Soft ethereal mist or fog adding dreamy depth and a sense of peaceful awakening to the scene

04_dew_flower.png.inspiration_en: Morning dew catches the sun for just one brief moment — and that fleeting flash is what makes it the most precious light of the day.

06_fireplace_cat.png.concept: 「壁炉旁的猫」—— fireplace cat 的像素画艺术作品

elements.name: 🎨 主题
elements.desc: fireplace cat

06_fireplace_cat.png.concept_en: A cozy cat curled up beside a crackling fireplace — warm amber flames dance behind the grate while the feline sleeps peacefully on a soft rug. Flickering firelight paints warm shadows across the room while cold winter rain patters against the window outside. This perfect moment of comfort reminds us that home is not a place but a feeling of being safe and warm.

elements_en.name: Sleeping cat curled up
elements_en.desc: Fluffy cat in peaceful sleeping pose, curled into a perfect circle with tail tucked warmly around its body

elements_en.name: Crackling fireplace flames
elements_en.desc: Dancing orange and amber flames in brick hearth, casting warm dancing light across the entire room

elements_en.name: Stone brick fireplace
elements_en.desc: Traditional stone fireplace surround framing the warm fire, its rustic texture contrasting with soft furnishings

elements_en.name: Woven rug
