elements_en.desc: Soft patterned rug where the cat rests, its warm earth tones creating a cozy nest beside the fire

elements_en.name: Winter rain outside
elements_en.desc: Rain streaks visible on nearby window, cold droplets emphasizing the warm interior contrast

elements_en.name: Warm firelight shadows
elements_en.desc: Dancing orange light and soft shadows playing across walls and floor, creating living room atmosphere

06_fireplace_cat.png.inspiration_en: The cat doesn't need a throne — just warmth, safety, and the sound of rain outside. Perhaps that's all any of us truly need.

07_sakura_courtyard.png.concept: 「樱花庭院」—— sakura courtyard 的像素画艺术作品

elements.name: 🎨 主题
elements.desc: sakura courtyard

07_sakura_courtyard.png.concept_en: A moonlit traditional courtyard where cherry blossom branches extend gracefully across the night sky. Stone lanterns glow softly beside a tranquil koi pond, while pink petals drift gently through the silver moonlight—peace and elegance frozen in pixel art form.

elements_en.name: Cherry blossom branches
elements_en.desc: Graceful dark branches heavy with delicate pink blossoms, their silhouettes painting abstract poetry against the moonlit sky

elements_en.name: Traditional courtyard
elements_en.desc: Classic East Asian architecture with curved roof tiles and wooden latticed windows, peaceful and timeless

elements_en.name: Stone lanterns
elements_en.desc: Traditional stone lanterns casting warm amber glows, guiding the eye through the moonlit garden

elements_en.name: Koi pond
elements_en.desc: Calm reflective pond where moonlight dances on the surface, with koi shadows gliding beneath

07_sakura_courtyard.png.inspiration_en: Where moonlight meets falling petals, time itself holds its breath.

09_dusk_birds.png.concept: 「黄昏飞鸟」—— dusk birds 的像素画艺术作品

elements.name: 🎨 主题
elements.desc: dusk birds

09_dusk_birds.png.concept_en: Flocking birds returning home at golden sunset — silhouettes of graceful birds cutting across a blazing orange and purple sky as the day surrenders to evening. Wings dark against the fiery sunset, their formations creating natural calligraphy across the heavens while distant mountains fade into purple haze below.

elements_en.name: Flocking bird silhouettes
elements_en.desc: Multiple birds in graceful formation against the bright sky, their dark shapes creating elegant natural patterns

elements_en.name: Burning sunset sky
elements_en.desc: Vivid orange, gold and purple gradient sky, each color bleeding into the next in painterly sunset beauty

elements_en.name: Purple mountain horizon
elements_en.desc: Distant mountain range fading into purple mist, creating depth and ending the visible landscape

elements_en.name: Warm color gradient
elements_en.desc: Seamless transition from bright orange near the sun to deep purple at the horizon

elements_en.name: Birds in flight
elements_en.desc: Individual birds with visible wing shapes, some soaring high while others fly lower in scattered formation

elements_en.name: Setting sun glow
elements_en.desc: Bright glowing sun near the horizon, its light illuminating birds from below and creating dramatic silhouettes

09_dusk_birds.png.inspiration_en: The birds don't fly toward a destination — they fly toward home. And home is wherever the sunset decides to meet them.

10_lighthouse.png.concept: 「海边灯塔」—— lighthouse 的像素画艺术作品

elements.name: 🎨 主题
elements.desc: lighthouse

10_lighthouse.png.concept_en: A solitary lighthouse standing proud on rocky coastal cliffs — its brilliant white tower against stormy grey skies while powerful ocean waves crash below. The beacon glows warm yellow through the mist, guiding ships safely home through any darkness. Hope and resilience in pixel form, where one small light holds back the vast indifferent sea.

elements_en.name: White lighthouse tower
elements_en.desc: Classic striped or solid white lighthouse rising tall from rocky cliff base, its elegant cylindrical form enduring against the elements

elements_en.name: Dramatic stormy sky
elements_en.desc: Heavy grey clouds rolling across the sky, their dark tones creating mood and drama behind the bright lighthouse

elements_en.name: Powerful ocean waves
elements_en.desc: Foaming waves crashing against jagged coastal rocks below, their white spray visible against dark water

elements_en.name: Rocky cliff base
elements_en.desc: Rugged grey coastal rocks where the lighthouse stands anchored, their irregular shapes grounding the scene

elements_en.name: Rotating beacon light
elements_en.desc: Warm yellow light glowing from the lighthouse top, its rays cutting through mist and fog

elements_en.name: Mist and sea spray
elements_en.desc: Atmospheric haze and salt spray creating soft focus around the lighthouse, enhancing its lonely isolation

10_lighthouse.png.inspiration_en: The lighthouse doesn't fight the storm — it simply stands firm and shines. Sometimes courage is just not giving up on being who you are.

04-26_04_aurora_mountain.png.concept: 关于「极光下的雪山」的画作

elements.name: 🎨 主题
elements.desc: 极光下的雪山

04-26_07_lighthouse.png.concept: 关于「海边的灯塔」的画作

elements.name: 🎨 主题
elements.desc: 海边的灯塔

04-26_09_desert_oasis.png.concept: 这幅像素画捕捉了沙漠深处那片令人惊叹的绿洲。画面中央是一片宁静的清澈湖水，水面倒映着岸边的棕榈树。远处连绵起伏的金色沙丘在阳光下闪烁，骆驼商队缓缓穿过沙海。天空中飘浮着几朵洁白的云朵，为这片炙热的荒漠带来一丝凉意。整体意境表现了生命在绝境中的顽强与希望，展现了大自然的神奇与宁静。

elements.name: 🌴 棕榈树群
elements.desc: 湖畔生长着几棵高大的棕榈树，翠绿的叶片在微风中轻轻摇曳，树干挺拔而有力

elements.name: 🐪 骆驼商队
elements.desc: 沙丘间有骆驼商队缓缓前行，它们背负着货物，是沙漠中生命力的象征

elements.name: 💧 清澈湖泊
elements.desc: 绿洲中央的湖水碧蓝如玉，清澈见底，倒映着天空与周围景色

04-26_09_desert_oasis.png.inspiration: 灵感来源于丝绸之路的传奇故事与对生命奇迹的敬畏，愿每个人心中都有一片属于自己的绿洲。

04-26_01_city_dawn.png.concept: 关于「晨曦中的城市天际线」的画作

elements.name: 🎨 主题
elements.desc: 晨曦中的城市天际线

04-26_01_city_dawn.png.inspiration: 清晨的城市有一种特别的安静。街上的人还不多，但路灯正一盏一盏熄灭，像是在和夜晚告别。

04-26_05_bamboo_stream.png.concept: 关于「竹林深处的溪流」的画作

elements.name: 🎨 主题
elements.desc: 竹林深处的溪流

04-26_05_bamboo_stream.png.inspiration: 水声听得多了，反而忘了自己心里原本很吵。

04-26_06_star_tent.png.concept: 关于「星空下的帐篷」的画作

elements.name: 🎨 主题
elements.desc: 星空下的帐篷

04-26_06_star_tent.png.inspiration: 帐篷搭在草地上，银河铺在天花板上。这一夜，万物都近。

04-26_02_rain_cafe.png.concept: 关于「雨中的咖啡馆」的画作

elements.name: 🎨 主题
elements.desc: 雨中的咖啡馆

04-26_02_rain_cafe.png.inspiration: 雨天咖啡馆有一种慢下来的魔法。窗外的雨越急，杯中的咖啡越暖。

04-26_03_sakura_courtyard.png.concept: 关于「樱花飘落的庭院」的画作

elements.name: 🎨 主题
elements.desc: 樱花飘落的庭院

04-26_03_sakura_courtyard.png.inspiration: 樱花的美，不在于开得多盛，而在于飘落的那一刻。像极了所有美好的事物，最动人时恰是最短暂处。

04-26_10_fireplace_cat.png.concept: 关于「冬日壁炉旁的猫」的画作

elements.name: 🎨 主题
elements.desc: 冬日壁炉旁的猫

04-26_10_fireplace_cat.png.inspiration: 壁炉里的火不用旺，够暖就行。猫不用理你，陪你就行。

04-26_08_autumn_wheat.png.concept: 关于「秋日午后的麦田」的画作

elements.name: 🎨 主题
elements.desc: 秋日午后的麦田

04-26_08_autumn_wheat.png.inspiration: 麦田的金黄是秋天写给大地的一封信，等着风来朗读。

04-27_01_rainbow_town.png.description: 暴风雨过后的天空下，古镇与彩虹交相辉映

04-27_10_bounce_castle.png.description: 彩虹下的充气城堡，孩子们的快乐天堂
